name: The Stand
description: In a plague-scarred world, survivors struggle under an intense battle between good and evil. Their hopes rest on an elderly leader and a small group of people as nightmares take shape in a powerful man known for lethal charisma.

name: INVINCIBLE
description: Mark Grayson is a typical teenager—until his father’s role as Earth’s most powerful superhero puts him in the spotlight. Soon after turning seventeen, Mark starts developing abilities of his own and is guided by his father’s tutelage.

name: Shadow and Bone
description: In a world divided by a barrier of perpetual darkness, a young soldier discovers a power that could help unite her country. As she tries to learn and control it, dangerous groups close in, turning survival into a struggle against enemies and shifting loyalties.

name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
description: Set during the Galactic Empire, a former Jedi Master takes on a high-stakes mission involving former allies turned enemies. As the Empire closes in, the quest pushes him to confront danger and use what he knows to survive and protect those in need.

name: The Last of Us
description: Twenty years after civilization collapses, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a teenage girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What begins as a job turns into a brutal, heartbreaking trek across the United States, forcing them to rely on each other for survival.

name: Tokyo Vice
description: An American journalist lands in Tokyo and embeds himself with the local police press corps, chasing a story that pulls him into corruption, crime, and the city’s hidden power games. Based on a non-fiction book, the series follows his effort to fit in while uncovering what lies beneath the surface.

name: The Sandman
description: After years trapped away from his realm, a powerful ruler of dreams sets out across strange worlds to reclaim what was taken from him. The journey blends dark fantasy, mythic encounters, and shifting stories about power, identity, and the human need for dreams.

name: Severance
description: Mark leads a team of office workers whose memories are split between their jobs and their personal lives. When a mysterious colleague appears outside the usual work routine, it sparks an unsettling investigation into what their work really means.

name: Platonic
description: Former childhood best friends with a long rift reconnect as they approach midlife. Their friendship turns increasingly consuming, triggering destabilizing—and very funny—changes in their everyday lives.

name: Jeen-yuhs: A Kanye Trilogy
description: This intense, intimate docuseries follows the intertwined paths of a rising superstar and a filmmaker friend, chronicling the career of Kanye West over more than two decades. Filmed across years, it shows the drive, hustle, and personal influences behind his rise to stardom.

name: Black Doves
description: When a spy posing as a politician's wife discovers her lover has been murdered, she teams up with an old assassin friend to chase the truth. Their search quickly turns into a dangerous mission driven by vengeance, secrets, and shifting loyalties.

name: Snowpiercer
description: More than seven years after the world turns into a frozen wasteland, survivors live aboard a colossal train that constantly circles the globe. Inside, strict class divisions drive social injustice and the ongoing politics of survival.

name: The Time Traveler's Wife
description: A married relationship is put under strain by an impossible connection that sends one partner back to different points in time. As meetings repeat across years, love and uncertainty tangle together, making each new arrival feel both fated and difficult to control.

name: Emily in Paris
description: A young American marketing professional moves to Paris for a dream job and tries to balance work, romance, friendships, and culture clashes in a glamorous new city. The series keeps things light with fashion, ambition, awkward moments, and plenty of romantic complications.

name: The Undoing
description: Grace and Jonathan Fraser seem to have the life they always wanted, until a violent death and a wave of public, troubling revelations upend everything. With a disaster spreading around them, Grace must untangle what happened and reshape life for her child and family.

name: The Gilded Age
description: In 1882 New York, Marian Brook, an orphaned young woman, moves in with her rigid, conventional aunts and must navigate high-society rules. As she draws closer to the lives of wealthy neighbors, her bond with a woman posing as her maid helps spark a struggle between fitting in and forging her own path.

name: Lovecraft Country
description: This anthology horror series follows a young man traveling through 1950s segregated America to find his missing father, aided by family and friends on a tense road trip. Along the way, they face both racist terrors and unsettling supernatural threats tied to Lovecraftian lore.

name: The Continental
description: The origin story behind an iconic hotel for assassins, following a young Winston Scott as he’s pulled into the dangerous underworld of 1970s New York City. Driven to claim the hotel’s mysterious power, he charts a deadly path through its secrets and past he thought was gone.

name: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
description: In an age of uneasy peace, different peoples across a vast fantasy world begin to sense that darkness is returning. As distant kingdoms, hidden communities, and ancient powers face growing danger, the series follows a wide-ranging struggle to protect fragile hopes and shape lasting legacies.

name: Loki
description: After stealing a powerful artifact during “Avengers: Endgame,” an alternate version of Loki is taken to the Time Variance Authority, a mysterious organization that oversees the timeline. Loki must either be erased for being a “time variant” or help correct the timeline and confront a larger threat.

name: Gangs of London
description: After the leader of a powerful criminal organisation is assassinated, a dangerous power vacuum threatens a fragile peace between rival gangs across the city. Grieving and determined to regain control, a volatile successor sets out to find who is behind the killing and restore order.

name: Guillermo del Toro's Cabinet of Curiosities
description: Bizarre nightmares arrive in eight separate tales of terror, forming a visually striking horror collection curated by Guillermo del Toro. Each episode brings its own eerie setup and spine-tingling atmosphere.

name: Andor
description: Set in a time of danger and deception, Cassian Andor learns what difference one person can make against the tyrannical Galactic Empire. His choices push him onto a hard, uncertain path that leads toward becoming a rebel hero.

name: WandaVision
description: Wanda Maximoff and Vision settle into stylized suburban living that initially feels like a picture-perfect sitcom. But as their “ideal” world starts to feel off, they grow suspicious that something deeper is shaping what they experience.

name: Raised by Wolves
description: After Earth is devastated by a religious war, an atheistic android sends two of his creations to Kepler-22b to establish a peaceful, godless colony. Their mission is threatened when the devout Mithraic arrive, forcing the new settlers to confront faith, survival, and control in an unforgiving new world.

name: Star Trek: Lower Decks
description: Set in 2380, the series follows the support crew aboard one of Starfleet’s least important ships as they juggle their day-to-day duties and personal lives. The ship is constantly thrown off balance by a stream of strange sci-fi anomalies, turning routine work into nonstop trouble.

name: Upload
description: In 2033, people who are near death can be “uploaded” into virtual reality hotels run by tech firms. Cash-strapped customer service worker Nora works at “Lakeview,” while a tech crash leaves new arrivals tangled in her world and the hotel’s high-stakes promises.

name: Space Force
description: A four-star general reluctantly partners with an eccentric scientist to get a brand-new space-focused military agency ready to launch. As preparations ramp up, the mission mixes workplace friction, big ambitions, and outlandish teamwork.

name: P-Valley
description: Down in the Mississippi Delta, this series blends trap music with a film noir vibe as it follows a strip club and the wide range of people who walk through its doors. The story focuses on hope, heartbreak, and tough choices, building a kaleidoscopic picture of life around the Pynk.

name: Firefly Lane
description: For decades, two childhood best friends have stood by each other through changing lives and hard times. But when betrayal enters the picture, their long bond is put to the test and threatens to fracture for good.

name: Close Enough
description: Close Enough follows a surreal, adult animated look at moving from your 20s to your 30s. A married couple balance everyday struggles like parenthood, friendship hangouts, and hilariously strange mishaps that test their routines.

name: Warrior Nun
description: After waking in a morgue, a teen girl discovers she has superpowers and becomes the chosen Halo-Bearer for a secret sect of demon-hunting nuns. Thrust into a dangerous mission mixing faith and mystery, she must learn what her new role means as demons threaten her world.

name: Defending Jacob
description: A family's life is shattered when their 14-year-old son is accused of murdering a classmate. As the case unfolds, the family is forced to navigate intense scrutiny, conflicting information, and mounting pressure.

name: I Know This Much Is True
description: This TV miniseries follows identical twin brothers living parallel lives in a sweeping story shaped by betrayal, sacrifice, and forgiveness. Spanning 20th century America, their choices and relationships build a long, emotional chain of consequences.

name: Hawkeye
description: A former Avenger hopes for a quiet trip home in time for Christmas, but trouble tied to his past pulls him into a new mess. With help from an eager young archer who dreams of being a hero, he faces a street-level threat that turns the holiday season chaotic.

name: The Wheel of Time
description: Five young villagers are pulled into a dangerous, prophecy-driven conflict when a strange, powerful woman arrives with troubling claims about one of them. As the Dark One threatens to break free, they must decide what to trust and work together to prevent the Last Battle from beginning.

name: The Nevers
description: In the last years of Victoria’s reign, London is shaken by the “Touched,” people who suddenly gain abnormal abilities—some charming, some disturbing. A mysterious widow and a brilliant young inventor work to build a home for these outsiders while pushing back against forces that want to keep them out.

name: I Am Not Okay with This
description: Angsty Syd juggles awkward high school moments, family drama, and an unrequited crush on her best friend. As her emotions flare, her budding superpowers create trouble she can’t quite control.

name: Dune: Prophecy
description: Set thousands of years before the familiar Dune saga, this prequel follows the rise of a powerful female order seeking to guide humanity’s future. Political schemes, family legacy, and faith collide as its founders build influence in a dangerous universe.

name: Chucky
description: After a vintage killer doll turns up in a suburban town, horrifying murders begin to uncover the community’s secrets. New threats and old connections from the doll’s past raise questions about where it truly came from, even as people try to survive what’s happening.

name: What If...?
description: Inspired by the comics, this animated anthology reexamines classic Marvel Cinematic moments through alternate “what if” universes. Each episode asks a new question and revisits familiar events in unexpected ways within the MCU multiverse.

name: The Owl House
description: An animated fantasy-comedy series follows a self-assured teen who accidentally finds a portal to a magical realm. There, she befriends a rebellious witch and an adorably tiny warrior, and without magical powers, works to become an apprentice while building a surprising found family.

name: Ms. Marvel
description: A dedicated student and comic-loving fan-fic writer, Kamala Khan, longs to belong at home and school—until she discovers superpowers inspired by the heroes she’s admired. With her new abilities, life starts to feel different, raising both excitement and questions about who she wants to be.

name: She-Hulk: Attorney at Law
description: Jennifer Walters is a single, 30-something attorney juggling her complicated personal life and high-stakes legal work—while also dealing with a surprising superpowered transformation into a giant green hulk. The show mixes cases, chaos, and larger-than-life superhero problems as she tries to stay in control.

name: Jupiter's Legacy
description: As the world’s first generation of superheroes, powered decades ago, enters the present as a celebrated elder guard, their children struggle to live up to the legends. The story follows both the past that shaped their powers and the pressures of carrying on heroism now.

name: Squid Game
description: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a mysterious invitation to compete in children’s games. A huge prize promises hope, but the competition quickly turns deadly with shocking consequences for those who fall behind.

name: Ripley
description: A grifter in 1960s New York is hired to convince a wealthy man’s son to return home from Italy. The job quickly turns into a dangerous pattern of deceit and fraud, pulling everything toward murder.

name: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
description: Six teens head to an adventure camp on the other side of Isla Nublar, hoping for fun and bonding. But when dinosaurs break loose, they must work together with help from others to survive.

name: The Outsider
description: A brutal child murder investigation in a small community seems clear at first, but unsettling evidence pushes it into stranger territory. As a weary detective teams up with an unconventional investigator, the case begins to challenge logic, belief, and everyone involved.

name: Hazbin Hotel
description: In this adult animated series, the daughter of Lucifer tries to create a peaceful way to cut down Hell’s overcrowding by opening a hotel for demons seeking redemption. As the unlikely staff and guests come together, the plan faces plenty of chaos, conflict, and challenges.

name: House of the Dragon
description: At the height of a dragon-riding dynasty’s power, a ruler challenges long-held tradition by choosing a daughter as heir. When a male child later enters the line of succession, rival ambitions and court politics begin to strain the realm from within.

name: Superman & Lois
description: After years of facing world-ending threats, a superhero couple must handle their toughest challenge yet: the everyday pressures of working parenthood. As monsters, alien invaders, and supervillains collide with family life, they juggle responsibility, stress, and complexity in modern society.

name: Prehistoric Planet
description: Travel back 66 million years in this epic TV series, experiencing dinosaurs and extraordinary creatures across land, sea, and sky. Brought to life in a nature-documentary style, it explores how prehistoric life survived through daily struggles across habitats and seasons.

name: Slow Horses
description: A sidelined team of intelligence agents is stuck in a shabby corner of MI5, handling failures, office politics, and dangerous cases. As threats build around them, their messy methods and clashing personalities pull them into a murky world of secrets, rivalries, and deception.

name: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
description: A sheltered girl is forced to leave her underground home after a mutant attack. Suddenly she’s thrown onto the surface and must learn survival fast, teaming up with others as she pushes forward into a dangerous new world.

name: Ragnarok
description: In a small Norwegian town, unusually warm winters and violent downpours signal that another Ragnarök may be coming. As strange myths and modern-day life collide, the town’s future hinges on whether someone can intervene in time.

name: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist
description: After an unusual event, a San Francisco coder begins hearing the innermost wants and thoughts of people around her through popular songs. She can’t turn it off, so everyday moments become both surprising and emotionally revealing.

name: Foundation
description: In a distant future, a group of exiles sets out to preserve humanity’s knowledge and rebuild civilization as a vast Galactic Empire begins to crumble. The series blends large-scale space drama with political tension and questions about society’s future.

name: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
description: After her father’s death leaves her penniless, Eliza Scarlet keeps his detective agency running in 1880s London. She recruits a partner—the Duke—to navigate a male-dominated world and team up to solve crimes in the city’s darkest corners.

name: The Stranger
description: A stranger makes a shocking claim about a man’s wife, upending his life and pulling him into a web of secrets. As investigations unfold, hidden truths collide with everyday relationships, building mystery and suspense across an eight-part story.

name: Normal People
description: Marianne and Connell move through each other’s lives, pulled by attraction, complicated emotions, and the need to feel loved. Their story explores sex and power alongside longing, missteps, and the quiet ways relationships change over time.

name: Hollywood
description: Set in post-World War II Hollywood, the story follows aspiring actors and filmmakers chasing showbiz dreams in a world where ambition can be relentless. The series imagines a possible alternate Hollywood and shows what it might take to get a break.

name: Lupin
description: Inspired by Arsène Lupin’s adventures, a gentleman thief sets out to avenge his father after a wealthy family causes an injustice. The series follows his plans and shifting targets as he tries to set things right.

name: Behind Her Eyes
description: A single mother gets pulled into unsettling mind games after starting an affair with her psychiatrist boss. As her relationship deepens, she also forms a secret friendship with his mysterious wife, creating a tense web of secrets and manipulation.

name: Fate: The Winx Saga
description: Five fairies attend Alfea, a magical boarding school in the Otherworld, where they must learn to control their powers. As they deal with love, rivalries, and dangerous threats, the journey turns into a tense coming-of-age adventure.

name: Midnight Mass
description: The arrival of a charismatic young priest sparks glorious miracles in a dying town, along with ominous mysteries. As religious fervor spreads, the community’s desperation to believe fuels unsettling transformations and escalating questions.

name: Power Book II: Ghost
description: Picking up just days after the events of Power, this sequel series follows Tariq as he tries to move on from his father’s legacy. But the pressure to protect his family keeps piling up, forcing him to make tough choices in a high-stakes world.

name: Home Before Dark
description: A young investigative journalist moves with her family to the small town her father once left behind, determined to follow the truth. Her curiosity pulls her into a growing web of shocking secrets and troubling mysteries.

name: Trying
description: All Nikki and Jason want is a baby, but it’s not something they can have the usual way. They choose adoption and must navigate a challenging adoption panel while dealing with messy, funny day-to-day life and support from their chaotic circles.

name: Big Sky
description: Private detective Cassie Dewell teams up with ex-cop Jenny Hoyt to search for two kidnapped sisters on a remote Montana highway. As more disappearances come to light, they scramble to stop the culprit before another woman is taken.

name: Feel Good
description: Recovering addict and comedian Mae tries to rein in addictive behaviors and intense romantic feelings that affect everything in their life. Their world gets even more complicated when a new, consuming relationship with their girlfriend George takes hold, testing boundaries and personal growth.

name: Solar Opposites
description: A family of aliens from a ruined world is forced to hide in middle America after their planet is destroyed. Their mission centers on protecting a living super computer that will eventually evolve and consume them while reshaping Earth.

name: Tiger King
description: This true-crime TV series follows a zoo owner whose life spirals amid a cast of eccentric people in the world of big cat breeding. As underground rivalries and schemes unfold, the story paints a chaotic, high-stakes picture around exotic animals.

name: Alex Rider
description: A seemingly ordinary teenager is pulled into the world of British intelligence and asked to take on dangerous spy work. As the mission grows more complicated, he discovers instincts and abilities he never knew he had.

name: Outer Banks
description: A tight group of teens stumbles onto a buried secret that pulls them into a risky summer adventure. As the mystery grows, friendship, class tensions, romance, and danger all collide in an increasingly wild treasure-hunt story.

name: The Midnight Gospel
description: Traversing trippy, imagined worlds inside a universe simulator, a space-caster explores existential questions about life and death, with encounters that feel both playful and reflective. The series mixes otherworldly journeys with big, personal conversations that keep circling life’s biggest themes.

name: Sweet Magnolias
description: Lifelong friends in a small Southern town of Serenity support each other while balancing relationships, family, and careers. Centered on friendship and everyday struggles, the series follows their close bond as their lives evolve.

name: I May Destroy You
description: Set in London, a confident young writer navigates friendships, a busy social life, and a boyfriend abroad—until a drink is spiked. The experience forces her to question what happened and rebuild how she lives.

name: The Cuphead Show!
description: Two mischievous brothers stumble from one chaotic scrape to the next, with one charging ahead and the other trying to keep things under control. Inspired by the hit video game, this animated series leans into fast, silly adventures, classic-cartoon vibes, and occasional run-ins with larger-than-life trouble.

name: Tehran
description: A Mossad hacker-agent infiltrates Tehran under a false identity to help take down Iran’s nuclear reactor. When the mission fails, she must rapidly craft a new plan, with the stakes escalating and close relationships put at risk.

name: Unsolved Mysteries
description: This revival of the classic documentary series explores real cases that remain unresolved, from disappearances and murders to eerie encounters. Each episode focuses on a different mystery, sharing witness accounts and clues while leaving plenty for viewers to puzzle over.

name: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
description: Set in a dystopian future city of corruption and cybernetic enhancements, a talented but reckless street kid sets out to become a mercenary outlaw. Struggling to survive amid gangs, conflict, and a world obsessed with body modification, they try to rise through the ranks as an “edgerunner.”

name: Alice in Borderland
description: When a video-game-obsessed young man and his two friends wake up in a strange version of Tokyo, they’re forced to compete in dangerous games to survive. As the rules feel unclear and the challenges escalate, they try to keep going with teamwork and determination.

name: Law & Order: Organized Crime
description: Detectives in the Organized Crime Control Bureau take on New York City’s most vicious and violent illegal enterprises. Across multi-episode cases, they work to dismantle powerful criminal networks and bring those responsible down.

name: Julie and the Phantoms
description: A teenage girl rediscovers her love of music and starts performing again with help from three ghostly bandmates. As they chase the dream they never got to live, she finds new confidence, friendship, and a fresh spark for life through upbeat, heartfelt songs.

name: JUJUTSU KAISEN
description: A super-strong high schooler is pulled from ordinary life into a hidden world of curses after a desperate act to save someone. Trained by sorcerers at a special school, he must fight dangerous supernatural threats while carrying a curse within himself.

name: The Afterparty
description: Nothing is as it seems in this hilarious murder mystery, where each suspect’s story is told through a different film genre. As the night of the crime gets retold from multiple angles, the clues—and the comedy—keep reshaping what you think you know.

name: A League of Their Own
description: In 1943, women from different walks of life chase a chance to play professional baseball while finding friendship, confidence, and new possibilities. As one hopeful is welcomed into the league and another is turned away, both must navigate barriers and rethink what their dreams can look like.

name: Staged
description: When a planned West End play is halted by the pandemic, its director tries to keep the project alive from a distance. Remote rehearsals turn into a comic mix of clashing egos, boredom, creative panic, and everyday lockdown frustrations.

name: The Haunting of Bly Manor
description: After an au pair’s death, a young nanny is hired to care for orphaned children at Bly Manor. As she settles into her role, unsettling truths about the estate’s past begin to surface, revealing centuries of dark secrets tied to love and loss.

name: How to with John Wilson
description: In this uniquely funny documentary series, an anxious New Yorker sets out to film everyday life across the city while offering awkward “how to” advice on relatable topics. Each episode follows unexpected detours, grounded in candid, unpolished commentary and a refreshing honesty about modern life.

name: One Piece
description: A cheerful young pirate sets out across dangerous seas in search of legendary treasure, gathering an unlikely crew along the way. Their journey mixes wild fantasy, friendship, humor, and clashes with rivals who stand between them and their dreams.

name: Blood of Zeus
description: In ancient Greece, a commoner living on the edge of society gets pulled into a brutal struggle between gods, titans, and a demon army. As war spreads, he begins to uncover secrets about his past and becomes a key hope for survival.

name: Pachinko
description: Pachinko is a sweeping, multi-generational saga about a Korean immigrant family chasing survival and a better life. Spanning four generations, it follows their hopes and dreams as they leave home and navigate hardship over time.

name: Maid
description: After escaping an abusive relationship, a young mother takes a cleaning job to support her child and slowly work toward a safer, more stable life. Along the way, she faces housing problems, financial strain, and an exhausting system that keeps putting obstacles in her path.

name: Bridgerton
description: In Regency-era England, a wealthy family moves through a social season shaped by romance, desire, gossip, and status. The series blends high-society matchmaking with family pressure, secrets, and emotional complications in a polished period-drama setting.

name: Resident Evil
description: Nearly three decades after the T-virus is discovered, a new outbreak exposes dark secrets connected to the Umbrella Corporation. The series draws from the horror game franchise while leaping between different time periods as the threat spreads.

name: Fallout
description: Two centuries after an apocalypse, sheltered survivors leave their protected underground world and enter a dangerous wasteland full of strange communities, brutal violence, and dark humor. The series follows clashing paths through a ruined society where survival, power, and old ideals collide.

name: Willow
description: Years after the original adventure, a legendary sorcerer returns to guide a ragtag group of unlikely heroes. Together they set out on a high-stakes rescue quest that pushes them far from home, into strange lands filled with danger, magic, and surprises they never imagined.

name: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
description: After a 34-year-old underachiever is hit by a truck, his life continues through reincarnation in a new world. Reborn as an infant, he carries his past experience forward and sets out to grab every chance to build the life he’s dreamed of, with new friends and growing magical abilities driving an epic adventure.

name: Scenes from a Marriage
description: This TV miniseries chronicles the long, shifting relationship of a contemporary American couple as it moves through stages of matrimony, parenthood, infidelity, divorce, and later partnerships. Across many years, their love and turmoil build toward an emotionally complex portrait of commitment and change.

name: The Witcher: Blood Origin
description: More than a thousand years before the world of The Witcher, seven outcasts in the elven world unite in a blood quest against an unstoppable power. The story follows their struggles as they face danger and pursue something bigger than themselves.

name: The Curse
description: An alleged curse unsettles a newly married couple as they try to build a life together while filming a troubled home-improvement show. As pressure grows, their relationship, public image, and sense of reality all start to feel increasingly off.

name: It's a Sin
description: A chronicle follows five friends as a decade of big changes unfolds, including the rise of AIDS. It captures their lives as they navigate shifting attitudes, fear, misinformation, and the fight for survival.

name: Vincenzo
description: During a trip to his homeland, a Korean-Italian mafia lawyer clashes with an all-powerful conglomerate, turning their power games into a justice mission. Expect legal maneuvering, intimidation, and darkly comic comeuppances as he tries to settle scores.

name: Dota: Dragon's Blood
description: After crossing paths with a powerful dragon and a determined princess, a battle-hardened knight is pulled into a sweeping fantasy conflict. As alliances shift and ancient forces stir, the journey grows bigger and stranger than expected, testing loyalties and pushing the pair toward a fate tied to the wider world.

name: Fisk
description: When Helen Tudor-Fisk’s life begins to unravel, she takes a job at a small suburban firm handling wills and probate. She expects the work to be simple, but soon must face living clients and their complicated situations.

name: Mare of Easttown
description: A detective in a small Pennsylvania town investigates a local murder as her own life starts to unravel. The case pulls her deeper into a community where everyone seems connected, and secrets affect both the investigation and the people around her.

name: My Name
description: After her father is murdered, a revenge-driven woman places her faith in a powerful crime boss and begins working within the police force under his direction. The story follows her attempt to navigate shifting loyalties as she pursues justice through infiltration and danger.

name: Tokyo Revengers
description: A broke drifter learns that the girlfriend he lost in middle school was killed by a violent Tokyo gang. After an accident on a station platform, he suddenly wakes up 12 years earlier and tries to change the past while pursuing revenge.

name: Them
description: A limited anthology series that explores terror in America.

name: Sweet Tooth
description: In a post-apocalyptic world, a half-human, half-deer boy sets off on a dangerous journey with a gruff protector. Together, they search for a new beginning while navigating the dangers and uncertainty of survival.

name: Sweet Home
description: As people begin transforming into savage monsters, a handful of survivors are trapped together and must fight for their lives while trying to stay human. Set inside an apartment complex, the tension rises as they struggle with fear, survival, and what’s really happening.

name: Young Royals
description: Prince Wilhelm settles into life at the prestigious boarding school Hillerska, where rules and expectations press in from every side. As he tries to follow what he feels is right, the emotional and social challenges at school prove harder than he anticipated.

name: Hacks
description: Hacks follows a dark mentorship between a legendary Las Vegas comedian and a privileged young outcast trying to find a place in the comedy world. Their push-and-pull relationship is shaped by the entertainment industry’s extremes and the personal demons behind the jokes.

name: Time
description: Guilt, violence, and impossible choices drive a tense, gritty, and heartbreaking prison drama. It asks what it takes to survive inside a harsh system and how people cope when survival comes at a personal cost.

name: Sex/Life
description: A woman’s daring sexual past collides with her married, family-filled present when her hard-to-forget bad-boy ex suddenly reappears. As fantasies and old feelings resurface, her relationship and home life become increasingly difficult to manage.

name: American Horror Stories
description: American Horror Stories is an anthology series where each episode stands alone, exploring horror myths, legends, and lore. The show delivers fresh scares and eerie stories instead of a single continuing plot.

name: Invasion
description: Earth faces an alien presence that threatens humanity, unfolding in real time. The story follows five ordinary people around the globe as they try to understand the escalating chaos affecting their lives.

name: McDonald & Dodds
description: Two detectives who seem nothing alike are forced into a partnership, where their mismatched styles gradually turn into a lively friendship. Together, they tackle intricate mystery plots with entertaining teamwork and growing chemistry.

name: Schmigadoon!
description: Josh and Melissa, a struggling couple, find their lives upended when they become trapped in a magical town where everyone breaks into song and dance. They must complete a mission inside this musical world, turning daily struggles into a bigger, brighter adventure.

name: All of Us Are Dead
description: A sudden zombie outbreak turns a high school into a dangerous trap, forcing students to fight for survival while panic spreads around them. As the infection grows, fear, loyalty, and desperate choices shape their struggle to escape.

name: The Great
description: This genre-bending, anti-historical series follows the rise of Catherine from an unexpected newcomer to Catherine the Great. Her explosive relationship with her husband adds romance, drama, and nonstop friction as power and ideas clash in 18th century Russia.

name: Hometown Cha-Cha-Cha
description: A big-city dentist moves into a close-knit seaside village and sets up a new practice. There, she meets a charming jack-of-all-trades who couldn’t be more different, and their contrasting worlds spark both everyday community life and growing feelings.

name: Dexter: New Blood
description: A man who disappeared years ago is living quietly under a new identity in a snowy small town. When unexpected events shake the close-knit community, the darker urges he has tried to bury begin pushing back into his carefully controlled life.

name: Inside Job
description: For employees of the Deep State, conspiracies aren’t just theories—they’re treated like everyday truth. Keeping them hidden becomes a constant job, blending secrecy, absurd situations, and ongoing pressure to maintain the cover-up.

name: Yellowjackets
description: After a plane crash strands a high school girls soccer team in a remote wilderness, the survivors face fear, hunger, and shifting loyalties. Years later, the past still shadows the lives they have tried to rebuild, blending survival drama with psychological horror and mystery.

name: The Chestnut Man
description: A grisly murder leaves behind a chestnut figurine, turning a small clue into a chilling case. Two detectives track a killer connected to a politician’s missing child as the investigation grows darker and more unsettling.

name: Mayor of Kingstown
description: In a small Michigan town, the prison system drives the local economy and power structure. The McClusky family connects police, criminals, inmates, prison guards, and politicians, navigating a cycle of deals and violence in a place where everything revolves around incarceration.

name: Ghosts
description: Samantha and Jay turn a recently inherited country estate into a bed-and-breakfast, despite everything falling apart. The property is also home to spirits of previous residents, and only Samantha can see and hear them, turning everyday hosting plans into ongoing supernatural chaos.

name: Acapulco
description: In 1984, a man lands a dream job at a glamorous resort in Acapulco, Las Colinas. As he tries to fit in, he quickly discovers the work—and his hopes for the future—are a lot more complicated than he expected.

name: Hellbound
description: Unearthly beings arrive with bloody condemnations, sending people to hell and sparking fear across society. The events fuel a religious movement built around the idea of divine justice, while questions about punishment and human morality come to the forefront.

name: Arcane
description: In a divided steampunk-fantasy world, two neighboring cities clash over power, class, and dangerous new magic-driven technology. At the center is a fractured sisterhood, as personal loyalties and political tensions pull people toward opposing sides of a growing conflict.

name: The Book of Boba Fett
description: Legendary bounty hunter Boba Fett and mercenary Fennec Shand return to Tatooine to stake a claim on territory tied to Jabba the Hutt’s crime syndicate. As they navigate the galaxy’s underworld, they face shifting power struggles in the sands and beyond.

name: The Outlaws
description: Seven strangers from very different backgrounds are ordered to work together renovating a neglected community centre. As tensions flare and resentments grow, a brush with organised crime forces the group to rely on each other in unexpected ways.

name: Star Wars: The Bad Batch
description: A small group of elite, experimental clones travels through an ever-changing galaxy in the immediate aftermath of the Clone Wars. Each stop brings new dangers and shifting circumstances as they figure out what comes next.

name: Hit-Monkey
description: After a high-profile political assassination goes wrong, an injured hitman hides out in the mountains of Japan among a tribe of snow monkeys. As the hunt and fallout close in, he and his new surroundings collide in unpredictable ways.

name: Abbott Elementary
description: A group of passionate teachers and a slightly tone-deaf principal work in a Philadelphia public school where resources are limited. Despite the district’s attitude and the odds stacked against them, they stay determined to help their students succeed.

name: FROM
description: A strange town traps everyone who enters, forcing its residents to build routines while searching for a way out. As night falls, danger rises from the surrounding forest, turning survival into a daily struggle filled with fear, mystery, and unanswered questions.

name: Archive 81
description: An archivist hired to restore damaged videotapes becomes entangled in a mounting mystery tied to a missing director. As the tapes reveal disturbing connections, a shadowy cult grows closer to the truth.

name: Vikings: Valhalla
description: A century after the original Vikings saga, a new generation of legendary heroes rises to forge their own destiny and make history. Set in a changing world, the story follows fresh ambitions and hard choices in a time of power and conflict.

name: My Dress-Up Darling
description: A high school student trained in making traditional Japanese Hina dolls feels out of place at school and struggles to keep up with current trends. When a popular classmate reaches out for help with cosplay, their worlds collide and friendship (and new feelings) begin to grow.

name: Reacher
description: Jack Reacher, a veteran military police investigator, has recently stepped into civilian life as a drifter. With no phone and only essentials, he travels the country, taking in the places he once served while investigating a new mystery.

name: Somebody Somewhere
description: A woman in Kansas struggles to fit the hometown mold while working through loss and acceptance. With singing as her escape, she sets out to find herself and a community of outsiders who feel like outsiders everywhere, proving that finding your people and voice is possible.

name: Power Book IV: Force
description: Tommy Egan heads to Chicago with big plans to take over the drug business. He leans on being an outsider to challenge local rules and push his way toward becoming the biggest power player in the city.

name: The Responder
description: Under relentless night-time pressure in Liverpool, a seasoned police first responder is paired with a rookie. As incidents pile up, their work tests loyalties and mental strength—raising the question of whether they can protect others without breaking each other.

name: As If
description: Two close friends keep turning everyday moments into chaotic, overblown situations, sparking constant bickering and unexpected trouble. Each episode takes ordinary frustrations and strange coincidences and pushes them into absurd, relatable comedy that mirrors daily misfortunes and social habits.

name: Business Proposal
description: To scare off a blind date, a woman shows up in disguise as a friend. But the night takes an unexpected turn when the man is actually her CEO, and the situation shifts into a proposal.

name: This Is Going to Hurt
description: An unflinching hospital dramedy follows the daily grind of an overworked doctor in obstetrics and gynaecology. It mixes sharp humour with intense, emotional moments while showing the pressure, exhaustion, and messy humanity of life inside a stretched health system.

name: Anatomy of a Scandal
description: A privileged wife’s life starts to unravel when scandalous secrets come to light and her powerful politician husband faces accusations tied to a shocking crime. As the case unfolds, private relationships and public power collide in tense, high-stakes drama.

name: Rabbit Hole
description: Nothing is what it seems when a corporate espionage expert is framed for murder by powerful forces that can influence and control populations. As deception closes in, he fights to uncover what’s real while navigating a dangerous web where trust is constantly tested.

name: Minx
description: An earnest young feminist teams up with a struggling publisher to create an erotic magazine made specifically for women. The project brings ambitious ideas, awkward challenges, and plenty of workplace momentum as the publication tries to find its voice.

name: Our Flag Means Death
description: A gentleman-turned-pirate captain takes charge of the ship Revenge, trying to earn the respect of a crew that may not be fully on board. After a tense encounter with a notorious pirate, their struggle to stay together turns into a mix of planning, humor, and survival on the high seas.

name: Kaleidoscope
description: A master thief and a crew set out to pull off an enormous, carefully planned heist, but betrayal, greed, and other dangers keep throwing everything off. The story is told in a nontraditional way, with episodes that can be watched in different orders.

name: Shining Girls
description: Years after a brutal attack leaves her trapped in a reality that won’t stay still, she discovers a new murder connects to her own assault. Teaming up with a seasoned reporter, she investigates what’s really happening and faces the truth behind her past.

name: Disclaimer
description: An acclaimed journalist is shaken when an unsettling novel appears by her bedside, insisting she is central to a long-hidden story. As the book’s revelations threaten her carefully built career, she must confront what she’s kept buried for years.

name: Secret Invasion
description: Nick Fury and Talos uncover a secret faction of shapeshifting Skrulls operating on Earth for years. As infiltration reaches high levels of power, they must sort out allies and threats while the balance of safety hangs in the balance.

name: Heartstopper
description: A gentle coming-of-age series follows two teens whose close friendship begins to shift into something deeper. As they move through school, identity, friendship, and first love, the story keeps its focus on warmth, uncertainty, and the emotional highs and lows of being young.

name: Hell's Paradise
description: To earn a pardon, a deadly ninja assassin is forced to team up with other condemned criminals on a dangerous trip to a mysterious island. Their mission is to retrieve an elixir of immortality, but the island holds far more than they expect.

name: Presumed Innocent
description: A brutal murder shakes a Chicago legal office when one of its own becomes the prime suspect. As the case grows more personal and public, the accused must navigate suspicion, family strain, and a high-pressure fight to protect everything at stake.

name: Lawmen: Bass Reeves
description: Set in the years after the Civil War, this western drama follows a formerly enslaved man who becomes a federal law officer in Indian Territory. As he tracks dangerous outlaws, the series also looks at the personal cost of duty, justice, and life on the frontier.

name: Landman
description: In the boomtowns of West Texas, the oil business drives a tense world of risk, money, labor, and ambition. The series follows the clash between workers, dealmakers, and wealthy power players as the boom affects lives, fortunes, and the wider world.

name: Tulsa King
description: After 25 years in prison, a former New York mob figure is sent to Oklahoma to start over far from his old power base. In unfamiliar territory, he begins building new connections while questioning whether the people who sent him there are truly on his side.

name: Lioness
description: A rough-edged young Marine is recruited for the CIA’s Lioness Engagement Team to help take down a terrorist organization from within. Led by a station chief, the program trains and manages female undercover operatives as missions blur the line between personal life and dangerous work.

name: Julia
description: The series follows Julia Child’s life and her infectious zest for food as it intersects with major shifts in American culture. It explores the rise of public television, the women’s movement, changing ideas about fame, and how society evolves through the lens of her public presence.

name: The Crowded Room
description: Set in 1979 Manhattan, this miniseries begins after a young man is arrested for a shocking act of violence. As questioning unfolds, the story shifts into a tense, emotional mystery about trauma, memory, and the difficult search for understanding.

name: The Terminal List
description: After a disastrous military operation wipes out an elite team, a surviving commander begins questioning the official story. Outside the usual chain of command, he uses years of combat experience to pursue a violent trail of vengeance and conspiracy.

name: The Acolyte
description: Set long before the Empire rises, this Star Wars series follows a period of peace that is shaken by a series of shocking crimes. As an investigation unfolds, a Jedi Master is pulled into a tense confrontation with a dangerous figure from his past.

name: Kaos
description: As chaos spreads on Mount Olympus, Zeus spirals into paranoia as three mortals are pulled into a destiny that could change humanity’s future. Blending Greek myth with a modern world, the series follows their attempts to steer what’s coming next.

name: Wednesday
description: At a school for unusual outcasts, a sharp, gloomy teen gets pulled into a string of strange mysteries that unsettle the surrounding town. As clues pile up, she must navigate new friendships, rivalries, family expectations, and a supernatural world that may be more dangerous than it first appears.

name: X-Men '97
description: A team of gifted mutants returns to protect a world that often fears and rejects them. As new threats and an uncertain future emerge, they must balance action, loyalty, and personal struggles while facing challenges that test their ideals.

name: Twisted Metal
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a fast-talking outsider with no memory is offered a shot at a better life if he can deliver a mysterious package across deadly roads. Teaming up with a tough car thief, he faces brutal marauders, chaotic roadside threats, and a terrifying clown in an ice cream truck.

In the early twentieth-century mountain West, a ranching family struggles to hold on through disease, drought, shifting laws, and economic hardship. The series blends frontier conflict, family loyalty, romance, and survival in a harsh changing world.

name: Interview with the Vampire
description: A centuries-old vampire in New Orleans reconnects with a journalist to tell the story of his violent past and his complicated bond with the Frenchman who changed his life. The series blends gothic horror, romance, and emotional conflict as it revisits a dark, haunting legacy.

name: SPY x FAMILY
description: A spy, an assassin, and a telepath are brought together to live as a family, each hiding a secret identity for their own reasons. Their strange arrangement leads to plenty of funny moments, warm bonds, and tense situations as they try to keep their double lives hidden.

name: The Lazarus Project
description: A man wakes up months in the past and is pulled into a secret group that can turn back time when the world is in danger. As he learns how it works, he gets caught in a fast-moving race to stop disaster and make sense of his new reality.

name: Outer Range
description: A Wyoming rancher fights to protect his land and family, but the wilderness soon pulls him toward an unfathomable mystery. What begins as a personal struggle grows into a tense confrontation with something unknown, both intimate and cosmic, on the untamed frontier.

name: The Summer I Turned Pretty
description: Every summer, Belly and her family escape to a beach house in Cousins, where familiar rhythms start to shift when she turns sixteen. First love and heartbreak collide as relationships are tested and painful truths surface, pushing her through a year of growing up and changing forever.

name: BEEF
description: A tense road-rage encounter between two frustrated strangers spirals into an increasingly personal feud. As each tries to get even, their anger exposes deeper disappointments, messy relationships, and the pressure of trying to hold their lives together.

name: Dark Winds
description: Dark Winds is a psychological thriller set in the 1970s Southwest, following two Navajo police officers as they investigate a grisly double murder. Their search for clues pushes them to question their beliefs and confront the lasting trauma from their pasts.

name: XO, Kitty
description: Teen matchmaker Kitty Song Covey believes she has it all figured out about love—until she travels halfway across the world to reconnect with her long-distance boyfriend. As her heart gets involved, relationships start to feel far more complicated than her matchmaking plans suggested.

name: Extraordinary
description: In a world where most people gain a special ability when they come of age, one young adult is still waiting years later. Feeling stuck and left behind, she sets out to figure out what makes her unique, navigating messy friendships, everyday chaos, and the possibility that being “normal” might be enough.

name: Tell Me Lies
description: When two students meet at college, their early, seemingly ordinary choices spark an addictive relationship. As their bond tightens, the fallout starts to spread beyond them, reshaping the lives of those around them.

name: The Idol
description: After a breakdown derailed a singer’s last tour, she pushes to reclaim her place at the top of pop music. A mysterious nightclub figure pulls her into a risky new romance that stirs up ambition, desire, and the darker side of fame.

name: Dark Matter
description: A man is abducted into an alternate version of his life and must navigate a harrowing journey to reunite with his true family. Facing the most terrifying foe imaginable, he fights to escape a reality that’s been turned against him.

name: Black Bird
description: After starting a long prison sentence, Jimmy receives a shocking condition: if he can persuade a suspected killer to confess, he may be released. The mission drives him through difficult talks, pressure, and uncertainty as the stakes climb over time.

name: The Lincoln Lawyer
description: Hotshot LA defense attorney Mickey Haller takes cases in the criminal justice system, using his signature Lincoln to push for wins. As he works through legal challenges, he also deals with the personal baggage that follows him from one job to the next.

name: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
description: Meet two lonely strangers who surrender their identities to start over as a married couple and as partners in espionage. Thrown together by an agency, they’re forced to juggle missions and their relationship while trying to find their footing in a new life.

name: Echo
description: Pursued by a powerful criminal empire, a young woman returns home and is forced to face the family ties, history, and traditions she tried to leave behind. As her past catches up with her, she must decide what kind of future she wants to build.

name: Dead Boy Detectives
description: Two teen ghosts team up with a clairvoyant to take on supernatural mysteries for clients who need help. Their case-solving partnership is thrown off when a powerful witch steps in and complicates their plans.

name: My Life with the Walter Boys
description: After a tragedy upends her life, a teen moves in with her guardian’s big family in a small town. As she adjusts, she navigates new relationships and learns about love, hope, and friendship.

name: Bad Sisters
description: The Garvey sisters rely on each other through thick and thin, until a long-simmering situation involving a toxic in-law suddenly goes in an unexpected direction. With their bond tested, they scramble to make sense of what comes next and what it means for their lives.

name: Mo
description: Set in Texas, Mo navigates daily life while living between cultures, speaking three languages, and waiting on an asylum request. He works hard to support his Palestinian family, balancing hustle, identity, and pressure at every turn.

name: Justified: City Primeval
description: A marshal living in Florida gets pulled into a dangerous case after a chance encounter sends him to Detroit. There, he faces a ruthless criminal who has already slipped away from the city’s police once before, while also trying to balance work with being a father.

name: Chainsaw Man
description: A debt-ridden young man dreams of a peaceful life, but his reality is brutal work hunting devils for the yakuza. With a loyal pet devil at his side, he takes dangerous jobs for cash while getting pulled deeper into a violent supernatural world.

name: Ted
description: Set in 1993, a foul-mouthed teddy bear’s brief moment of fame is over, and he’s back in everyday life with his best friend, a 16-year-old boy in a working-class Boston home. When things get messy, the bear may be a questionable influence, but he’s willing to take big chances to help his friend and family.

name: Welcome to Wrexham
description: This documentary series follows the dreams and worries of Wrexham, a working-class town in North Wales, as two Hollywood stars take ownership of a historic football club. It balances small-town life with the effort to turn things around for the team and the people who care most.

name: Adventure Time: Fionna and Cake
description: Fionna and Cake, guided by the former Ice King, embark on a multiverse-hopping adventure that turns into a journey of self-discovery. As they travel between worlds, a powerful antagonist determined to erase them from existence lurks in the shadows.

name: Fire Country
description: Seeking redemption and a shorter sentence, a young convict joins a firefighting program and returns to his Northern California hometown. Working with elite firefighters, he and other inmates help tackle massive blazes across the region.

name: So Help Me Todd
description: Despite clashing personalities, a talented but aimless private investigator reluctantly takes an in-house investigator role under his overbearing mother, a successful attorney dealing with the fallout of her recent divorce.

name: Monarch: Legacy of Monsters
description: After surviving Godzilla’s attack on San Francisco, Cate is shaken by a shocking secret and pulled into a globe-trotting mission. As monstrous threats grow, she sets out to uncover the truth about her family and the mysterious organization known as Monarch.

name: Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi
description: Journey into the lives of two different Jedi from the prequel era as they face defining choices. Set in the prequel era, their paths are explored through short stories that show how decisions shape their destinies.

name: Star Wars: Skeleton Crew
description: Four ordinary kids search for their home planet after getting lost in the Star Wars galaxy. Their journey turns into a wide-ranging adventure built around teamwork, curiosity, and trying to make their way through unfamiliar places.

name: Berlin
description: In his glory days, Berlin assembles a gang in Paris for one of his biggest plans yet: stealing 44 million euros’ worth of jewels in a single night. As preparations build, the mission’s pressure collides with intense personal relationships.

name: My Lady Jane
description: In 1553, a young Tudor noblewoman is thrust into power for an extremely brief time, and the story reframes what came next as something she can fight back against. Expect high-stakes history with action, fantasy elements, rompy adventure, and a romcom-style spark that keeps the mood moving.

name: Colin from Accounts
description: Two complicated people cross paths after a car accident involving an injured dog, and are pulled into a messy, heartfelt connection. As they try to navigate life together, they keep choosing each other and showing their real selves, scars and all.

name: Castlevania: Nocturne
description: As revolution spreads through France, a young vampire hunter tries to protect his family’s legacy and stop a ruthless vampire from seizing power. Along the way, allies with their own painful pasts join the fight as the world around them grows more dangerous and chaotic.

name: Sugar
description: A stylish private detective investigates the disappearance of a Hollywood producer’s beloved granddaughter, while battling his own personal demons. The case unfolds with noir-flavored twists and shifting stakes, blending classic detective energy with a modern, unsettling edge.

name: Five Days at Memorial
description: When floodwaters rise, power fails, and temperatures climb inside a New Orleans hospital, overwhelmed caregivers face impossible, heart-wrenching choices. The series explores the pressure and moral strain of caring for people as the disaster worsens.

name: SkyMed
description: Set in remote Northern Canada, this series follows rookie nurses and pilots flying air ambulances through dangerous, high-pressure rescues. Between life-or-death calls and personal struggles, the team has to learn fast and depend on each other to get through each day.

name: Scavengers Reign
description: After a deep space freighter is damaged by a solar flare, the surviving crew is stranded on a beautiful but brutal planet. They must learn how to endure its dangers while searching for a way to escape or to be rescued.

name: Renegade Nell
description: England, 1705: Nell Jackson is framed for murder and forced to flee, turning to highway robbery just to survive with her sisters. With help from a superpowered sidekick, she learns her troubles tie into a larger magical plot targeting the Queen of England.

name: One Hundred Years of Solitude
description: Set in the mythical town of Macondo, seven generations of a family grapple with love, memory, and the weight of what came before. As their lives unfold, they confront repeating patterns that make the past feel impossible to escape.

name: Oshi No Ko
description: A small-town doctor is pulled into the ruthless entertainment world after crossing paths with a popular teen idol. What starts as a personal connection quickly turns into a high-stakes life of secrets, pressure, and big expectations.

name: The Way Home
description: When three generations of women reconnect after years of estrangement, they set out on a journey that blends family drama with a mysterious way to look back. As old memories resurface, they work through grief and forgiveness while trying to understand how to rebuild their bonds.

name: School Spirits
description: A teen wakes up stuck in her high school after a mysterious disappearance and begins investigating what happened, exploring the strange rules of “high school purgatory.” As she gets closer to the truth, she uncovers more secrets and lies tied to the people around her.

name: Will Trent
description: Special Agent Will Trent was abandoned at birth and raised through difficult foster care experiences in Atlanta before becoming a top investigator for the Georgia Bureau of Investigation. Now he tackles tough, high-profile cases with a strong drive to make sure no one goes unheard.

name: Rivals
description: Set in 1986, this series plunges into the cutthroat world of TV, where big hair and bigger ambitions fuel constant power struggles. Deals happen as readily in boardrooms as in bedrooms, leaving plenty of uncertainty about who will win—and whether love can still take root.

name: The Bastard Son & The Devil Himself
description: In a world where witches are split into rival factions, a teenager born into the conflict is pulled between both sides as he nears the age when powers awaken. Forced to train, run, and rely on uneasy allies, he searches for belonging while dangerous secrets and old grudges close in.

name: Tyler Perry's Zatima
description: Zac and Fatima take a big step to strengthen their bond, but new friends and lingering past actions keep complicating their blossoming relationship. Their connection grows while external pressures threaten to pull them off course.

name: Tracker
description: Tracker follows lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw as he travels the country as a “reward seeker,” using his tracking skills to help both private citizens and law enforcement solve mysteries. Between each case, he wrestles with a fractured family history that keeps complicating his life.

name: Sullivan's Crossing
description: A troubled neurosurgeon returns to her hometown in Sullivan’s Crossing to rebuild her life after everything gets thrown into turmoil. There, she must face what she’s been avoiding for years while navigating tense relationships and the lasting impact of the past.

name: Mashle: Magic and Muscles
description: In a world where magic is used for everything, a young man who can’t use magic relies on intense training and a peaceful life until danger comes for him. Now he must face threats from those who hunt him, proving whether sheer physical strength can outmatch powerful magic users.

name: Gyeongseong Creature
description: Set in 1945 Seoul under colonial rule, an entrepreneur and a detective-turned-sleuth struggle to survive as a monster emerges from human greed. Blending mystery and horror, their hunt forces them to confront the era’s darkness while fighting for a way forward.

name: Weak Hero Class 1
description: A gifted but withdrawn student gets drawn into escalating school violence and finds support in a few unexpected friendships. As bullying turns more dangerous, the series follows a tense fight for self-protection, loyalty, and survival in a harsh environment.

name: Lockwood & Co.
description: A girl with extraordinary psychic abilities teams up with two gifted teen boys at a small ghost-hunting agency to confront deadly spirits across London. With ghosts spreading after a mysterious “Problem,” they fight back using their rare talents and daring teamwork.

name: I Am Groot
description: There’s no guarding the galaxy from this mischievous toddler as Baby Groot takes center stage in a collection of shorts. Each adventure shows his “glory days” while he explores and gets into trouble among the stars.

name: Hijack
description: An expert negotiator is pulled into a high-stakes crisis after a group of hijackers takes control of an aircraft. He tries every move from his playbook to stop the takeover, even as danger and urgency keep rising aboard and beyond the plane.

name: Life on Our Planet
description: Life on Our Planet follows life’s long journey as it changes, adapts, and survives on Earth over billions of years. It presents how different eras of life connect, from ancient beginnings to later shifts that shape what we see today.

name: The Glory
description: Years after surviving horrific abuse in high school, a woman builds an elaborate revenge plan to make the people who hurt her pay. The story jumps between past and present, using careful, calculated steps to bring accountability.

name: Poker Face
description: Charlie Cale, a woman who can tell when someone is lying, hits the road and finds herself at every stop facing new crimes. Each encounter brings a fresh set of characters and a mystery she can’t ignore as she works to solve it.

name: Cross
description: A driven homicide detective balances a demanding job with being a devoted parent while carrying deep grief from a personal loss. As a new case pulls him into a tense hunt for a dangerous killer, his determination and contradictions push him to the edge at work and at home.

name: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
description: Washed ashore in France, a lone survivor must figure out how he got there and find a way home. Along the way, he protects a young boy believed to be important, while facing dangerous walkers, hostile human groups, and unexpected bonds that make the journey more complicated.

name: The Artful Dodger
description: The Artful Dodger follows a young man trying to reinvent himself after a life of petty crime, as he steps into a surprising new path and battles loyalties he can’t ignore. Amid betrayal and redemption, love complicates everything while the criminal underworld keeps pulling him back.

name: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
description: Rick and Michonne are pushed into a new, harsher world where survival means fighting the dead and facing threats from the living. With everything they know upended, they must search for each other and what they used to be, even as questions of trust and safety loom large.

name: Fellow Travelers
description: Across several turbulent decades, a secret romance unfolds between two men navigating fear, desire, politics, and changing attitudes toward queer life in America. From the 1950s Lavender Scare to the AIDS crisis of the 1980s, their bond is shaped by public danger and private longing.

name: Under the Bridge
description: A 14-year-old goes to a party and never returns home, prompting a story told through two viewpoints. As the investigation unfolds, it also explores the troubled lives of the young girls accused of the murder, revealing uncomfortable truths behind the accusations and the community around them.

name: Blue Lights
description: Blue Lights follows rookie police officers working in Belfast, facing the pressures and dangers of frontline response policing. In a city shaped by ongoing tensions, they deal with warring factions and everyday crime while trying to stay human under strain.

name: The Gold
description: In 1983, six armed men break into a security depot and uncover gold bullion worth £26m. As the fallout begins, investigators work to unravel what happened and who was behind it, in a story built around real events.

name: Those About to Die
description: Set inside the glittering but corrupt world of gladiatorial sports in Ancient Rome, the series follows multiple characters across different levels of society. As sports, politics, and business collide, personal struggles and shifting power shape life in and around the arena.

name: Creature Commandos
description: An inescapable team of incarcerated monsters is recruited for missions humans can’t handle. Their work blends secret assignments with personal histories, as they’re sent in when everything else fails and danger takes the lead.

name: My Adventures with Superman
description: Twenty-somethings Clark Kent, Lois Lane, and Jimmy Olsen team up at the Daily Planet to investigate stories while figuring out who they are. As they grow closer through their work and friendships, their adventures blend everyday reporting with bigger-than-life superhero action and escalating challenges.

name: FUBAR
description: A veteran spy preparing to step away from the job learns that a close family member has been living the same secret life. Their missions collide, turning dangerous operations into a messy mix of action, rivalry, and family tension.

name: Bookie
description: A veteran bookie tries to keep his life together as sports gambling legalization looms and the people around him become increasingly volatile. Packed into a fast-moving ride across Los Angeles, his work and relationships start to collide in unpredictable ways.

name: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
description: After the heroes’ party defeats the Demon King and restores peace, time moves on and lives drift apart. Generations later, an immortal elf mage faces humanity’s mortality and sets out again with a new apprentice, honoring old promises and trying to understand life and death.

name: Jury Duty Presents
description: Jury Duty Presents follows one juror as he takes part in what he believes is an American jury trial. Unbeknownst to him, the case is entirely staged, with everyone else acting and events carefully planned inside and outside the courtroom.

name: The Day of the Jackal
description: An elusive lone assassin takes the highest-paying jobs, but after a recent hit, a determined British intelligence officer begins to close in. Their rivalry sparks a fast cat-and-mouse chase across Europe, escalating into widespread destruction along the way.

name: Pluto
description: Seven of the world’s most advanced robots are murdered one by one, throwing the world into a tightening mystery. As an inspector investigates the killings, it becomes clear he may be targeted too.

name: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off
description: Scott Pilgrim meets the girl of his dreams, but her seven evil exes create obstacles for their love. The story shifts into a new, unpredictable direction as characters clash and fight to untangle what’s in the way of romance.

name: Blue Eye Samurai
description: Driven by a dream of revenge against those who made her an outcast in Edo-period Japan, a young warrior carves a bloody path toward her destiny. Fueled by isolation and determination, she pushes forward through dangerous confrontations and shifting loyalties.

name: Arnold
description: This intimate docuseries traces a larger-than-life life story, from bodybuilding champion days to Hollywood icon success and later political work. Through three phases, it covers his rise, key relationships, and the drive that shaped both careers and public life.

name: Matlock
description: An older legal mind returns to work at a prestigious law firm, using a harmless-looking persona and sharp strategy to win cases. As the weekly courtroom fights unfold, the job also becomes a way to probe wrongdoing inside the firm.

name: Elsbeth
description: After a successful career in Chicago, an astute, unconventional attorney brings her sharp, unusual perspective to New York. She teams up with the NYPD, spotting key details and using her point of view to corner brilliant criminals in each case.

name: The Eternaut
description: After a toxic snowfall devastates Buenos Aires, survivors must band together to endure an invisible, otherworldly threat. With help and conflict among a small group, they search for safety while the city grows more dangerous by the day.

name: Bloodhounds
description: Two young boxers join forces when they face ruthless enemies who are willing to go too far. Their fight for justice pulls them into the dangerous loan-shark underworld, where they protect loved ones while chasing down a powerful criminal network.

name: High Potential
description: Morgan, a single mom with an exceptional mind, uses her knack for spotting patterns to step into crime investigations. Her unconventional approach sparks an unusual partnership with a by-the-book detective, driving smart, case-focused episodes that keep building momentum.

name: King the Land
description: In a luxury hotel world of power struggles, a charming heir gets pulled into conflict with his hardworking employee, who’s known for her bright, confident smile. Their clashing attitudes spark friction as a tense inheritance fight hangs over everything.

name: The Brothers Sun
description: When a mysterious enemy targets his family, a Taipei triad member heads to Los Angeles to protect his strong-willed mother and oblivious younger brother. The threat forces them into a dangerous new life where loyalty, family pressure, and survival collide.

name: My Demon
description: A powerless demon gets tangled up with an icy heiress, and their strange connection could explain what he’s lost and what he may feel instead. As their lives collide, they’re pulled into a supernatural deal-making dynamic that mixes romance, mystery, and escalating conflict.

name: Based on a True Story
description: A real-estate agent, a plumber, and a former tennis star find their lives colliding in unexpected ways, pulling them into America’s obsession with true crime. What starts as a chaotic overlap soon turns into a dark, satirical tangle of murder talk, podcast energy, and oddly specific household humor.

name: Moving
description: Children living in hiding with superpowers, and their parents carrying painful secrets, try to survive escalating dangers together. The story centers on how extraordinary abilities collide with family life and the need to protect one another.

name: Club Hooligans
description: After brutal infighting, two brothers are thrown out of their beloved team’s gang. With no money or protection, they strike out alone and their new conflict turns into a test of their loyalty and brotherhood.

name: Lovely Runner
description: Right after a beloved top star dies, his most devoted fan finds herself in his high-school past, determined to protect him. As their lives cross in different moments, a fantasy romance unfolds with the feeling that missed time can finally be met.

name: Death's Game
description: On the brink of going to hell, Yee-jae faces a reincarnation drama that forces him to repeat twelve separate lives and twelve separate deaths. Each cycle tests what he values as he searches for a way forward, even as endings keep resetting him.

name: Lord of Mysteries
description: In a Victorian world of steam and occult dread, a man awakens into a new identity and must live between light and darkness. Pulled into conflict among powerful religious groups, he discovers dangers tied to hidden abilities and a growing web of mysteries.

name: Lessons in Chemistry
description: Set in the 1950s, a woman’s ambition to be a scientist collides with a society that pushes women into domestic life. She takes a job on a TV cooking show and turns it into a platform for more than recipes—encouraging overlooked housewives to think bigger and stand up for themselves.

name: Beckham
description: With never-before-seen footage, this docuseries charts David Beckham’s rise from humble beginnings to football stardom. It revisits major moments across his career, including the pressures and scrutiny that followed his success.

name: The Gentlemen
description: After inheriting a grand family estate, an aristocratic heir discovers a large cannabis operation hidden on the property. Trying to remove it pulls the family into a dangerous, darkly comic criminal world where every solution creates new trouble.

name: Dragon Ball Daima
description: Mysteriously transformed into mini versions of themselves, Goku and his friends travel to the Demon Realm to uncover what happened and search for a cure. Their journey mixes adventure and action as they navigate strange new places and fresh threats tied to the larger world.

name: The Amazing Digital Circus
description: A woman becomes trapped in a strange virtual circus with other humans, all forced to endure the unpredictable games of an eccentric AI host. As colorful chaos turns unsettling, the group faces bizarre digital threats while struggling with fear, stress, and personal wounds.

name: Kaiju No. 8
description: In a Japan constantly threatened by giant monsters, a cleanup worker finds his old dream of joining the Defense Force reignited after meeting a determined new recruit. The series follows the push to protect humanity while balancing action, humor, teamwork, and personal resolve.

name: The Narrow Road to the Deep North
description: An Australian surgeon during WWII is forced to work on the Burma Railway, and his time as a POW continues to haunt him. The series also revisits a pre-war affair and the emotional conflict between love, guilt, and the past’s grip on the present.

name: Queen of Tears
description: The queen of department stores and the prince of supermarkets face a serious strain in their marriage. As their relationship breaks down under pressure, love unexpectedly starts to return and they work through the challenges together.

name: Dan Da Dan
description: A bet between two high schoolers over ghosts and aliens pulls them into a chaotic world of paranormal danger. As strange threats pile up, they discover unusual powers, unlikely teamwork, and the possibility of something more between them.

name: The Count of Monte Cristo
description: Edmond Dantes, a sailor falsely accused of treason, is imprisoned in the Château d'If off Marseille. After escaping, he becomes the Count of Monte Cristo and builds a revenge plan against those who wrongly accused him.

name: One Day
description: After spending graduation night together, two young people go their separate ways, but their lives keep crossing over the years. The story traces how time changes them, while the connection between them stays present in different forms.

name: No Good Deed
description: Several couples enter the same open house for a glamorous LA home, while the owners’ seemingly perfect life starts to unravel. As prying eyes and aggressive buyers close in, painful family secrets must be kept hidden, turning home-sale excitement into a tense, twisty ride.

name: Baby Reindeer
