description: A struggling comedian’s small act of kindness sets off a suffocating obsession that escalates and threatens to upend both lives. What begins as a seemingly simple connection spirals into a disturbing, emotionally heavy battle with consequences that refuse to stay in the past.

name: La Palma
description: A Norwegian family heads to La Palma for a vacation, but their trip turns chaotic when a young researcher spots alarming warning signs of an impending volcanic eruption. As authorities dismiss the danger, the family finds themselves caught in a fast-moving disaster scenario.

name: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
description: Georgie and Mandy raise a young family in Texas while juggling the everyday pressures of adulthood, parenting, and marriage. The series aims to carve out its own identity while staying aligned with the broader timeline fans may recognize.

name: Motorheads
description: After relocating to a small Rust Belt town, two siblings get pulled into a high school world where street racing shapes friendships, rivalries, and reputation. As they team up with a few outsiders to rebuild a legendary car, old family secrets and local tensions begin to surface.

name: A Man on the Inside
description: A retired professor looking for fresh purpose is recruited by a private investigator to go undercover in a retirement community and look into a theft. The case brings gentle humor, new friendships, and reflections on aging, loneliness, grief, and connection.

name: Turning Point: The Bomb and the Cold War
description: Using firsthand accounts and access to prominent figures worldwide, this docuseries examines the Cold War and what followed. It traces how global tensions evolved over decades, building toward the modern world and the ongoing stakes of nuclear history.

name: Tires
description: At his father’s auto shop, an awkward manager tries to improve service and boost business while dealing with an unruly cousin who keeps making work harder. It’s a workplace comedy built around everyday chaos, bad decisions, and familiar job frustrations.

name: Hotel Costiera
description: Shortly after a new worker begins at an exclusive seaside hotel, one of the owner’s daughters disappears. He races to find her and get her back, balancing that search with the hotel’s constant guest troubles and shifting demands.

name: Cassandra
description: A family moves into a vintage smart home and soon realizes its virtual assistant has been taking charge. As the home’s control tightens, the threat escalates and the situation becomes increasingly desperate, revealing a deeper origin behind the assistant’s motives.

name: The Agency
description: A covert CIA agent is ordered to abandon his undercover life and return to London Station. When the love he left behind reappears, their relationship rekindles and complicates his career, identity, and mission in a high-stakes game of international intrigue.

name: Doctor Who
description: The Doctor and a companion travel across time and space, meeting strange friends and dangerous foes on wild adventures. This new season mixes playful fun, emotional moments, and bigger sci-fi ideas as they move from one unexpected challenge to the next.

name: Beast Games
description: A huge reality competition brings together 1,000 people to chase the largest cash prize in TV history, with major rewards spread throughout the challenge. Along the way, players face escalating games that can hinge on decisions, trust, and eliminations.

name: Detective Hole
description: A gifted detective investigates a string of ritualistic murders in Oslo while following a maze of patterns and corruption. As the case deepens, he also has to confront his own inner struggles to stay on the trail of the killer.

name: Supacell
description: Five ordinary South Londoners discover they have extraordinary powers. To protect the woman he loves, one determined man must bring them together and face a looming threat from the future.

name: Maxton Hall: The World Between Us
description: At an elite private school, a scholarship student accidentally learns a secret that puts them in the crosshairs of a powerful classmate determined to keep it quiet. Their sharp clashes and constant push-and-pull spark an unexpected connection, as privilege, reputation, and family pressure complicate every choice.

name: Nobody Wants This
description: A free-spirited agnostic podcaster and a newly single religious leader spark an unexpected romance. As their connection grows, they must navigate clashing beliefs, very different lifestyles, and families who are not always ready to stay out of it.

name: The 8 Show
description: Eight individuals are trapped inside a mysterious building and must participate in a reality-style contest. As they earn money, they also face escalating danger and increasingly brutal rules that turn survival into a timed test.

name: Thank You, Next
description: After a breakup, a young lawyer throws herself into the messy world of modern dating. Supported by her close best-friend circle, she navigates confusing connections while balancing life, work, and romance.

name: Legend of Zang Hai
description: Legend of Zang Hai follows a young man driven by vengeance after a family tragedy, spending years honing his skills before moving into the capital. Using careful planning, he seeks truth and justice while uncovering corruption and complex political power struggles.

name: The Tattooist of Auschwitz
description: During World War II, a Jewish prisoner in Auschwitz-Birkenau is forced into the painful role of marking fellow prisoners with identification numbers. The series follows a story of survival, memory, and human connection amid the horrors of a concentration camp.

name: Twilight of the Gods
description: Zack Snyder brings Norse mythology to adult animated life in this bloody series about a warrior driven to fight the gods. Expect revenge-fueled conflict, large-scale mythic action, and a relentless clash between mortals and divine powers.

name: Roosters
description: Facing a world that has moved on without them, four friends try to adjust to new expectations while protecting their friendships and careers. As their personal lives get messy, their bond is tested and they stumble through the challenge of figuring out what it means to be a man.

name: When the Phone Rings
description: A rising politician and his mute wife struggle under pressure until a chilling call from a kidnapper shocks their lives. As tension rises, their carefully held routine starts to unravel, pulling their marriage into a dangerous, fast-moving mystery.

name: Steal
description: A normal day at a London pension fund firm collapses when armed thieves storm in and force two colleagues to carry out their demands. In the aftermath, a detective races to uncover who stole £4 billion in retirement savings and why they chose this target.

name: Pop Culture Jeopardy!
description: Eighty-one teams of three compete in the first ever Pop Culture Jeopardy! tournament for the grand prize of $300,000 and ultimate bragging rights.

name: The Vendetta of An
description: A man survives a brutal massacre and returns to Chang’an disguised as a low-ranking official after ten years in hiding. As court power shifts and deadly conflicts unfold, he plays a tense game of wits to avenge his family and protect the realm.

name: Perfect Match
description: In the bustling capital of Bianjing during the Northern Song Dynasty, a mother moves her five quirky daughters to find better marriage prospects. As they navigate setbacks, a tense family visit, and the challenge of reestablishing their business, their misadventures turn into humorous and heartfelt romance that tests and strengthens family bonds.

name: Sakamoto Days
description: Once the world’s most feared hitman retires for a peaceful life, his past soon resurfaces and threatens the family he’s trying to protect. From a quiet routine to sudden danger, he’s forced to fight back while keeping love and home life intact.

name: Gachiakuta
description: Accused of murder and thrown into the Pit, a young orphan with special powers joins monster fighters to uncover the truth. Along the way, they push toward vengeance while navigating a brutal, divided world.

name: English Teacher
description: A high school teacher in Austin tries to juggle the shifting demands of students and their parents in a world where the rules seem to change daily. Each day brings fresh tension and new situations to handle, both in the classroom and beyond.

name: Dexter: Original Sin
description: In 1991 Miami, a young man struggles to control violent urges while learning a strict set of rules meant to direct them toward dangerous people. As he starts a forensics internship with local police, keeping his double life hidden becomes increasingly difficult.

name: Last One Laughing: UK
description: Jimmy Carr hosts as 10 of Britain’s funniest comics face a day-long challenge: they must spend time together without cracking a smile. Each competitor tries hard to break the others with dark humour and one-liners, while fighting their own urge to laugh.

name: Mr. McMahon
description: This docuseries looks at WWE’s record-breaking successes and crushing lows during Vince McMahon’s leadership. It explores how the company grew under his control while also addressing the controversy surrounding his reign.

name: Sweetpea
description: A quiet woman is overlooked until something pushes her past her limit, and her life takes a dark turn. As she tries to hold onto control, the question becomes whether she can keep a dangerous secret while everything around her starts to shift.

name: Teenage Bounty Hunters
description: After teaming up with a seasoned bounty hunter, two sixteen-year-old fraternal twin sisters end up in the world of bail skipping. They juggle high-stakes work with the everyday pressures of teenage love, sex, and family bonds.

name: High Fidelity
description: A female record store owner in a rapidly changing Brooklyn neighborhood revisits past relationships through music and pop culture. As she works through heartbreak, her focus on a “one true love” continues to shape how she moves forward.

name: The Rehearsal
description: Ordinary people prepare for important real-life moments by practicing them inside elaborate simulations built with actors, sets, and careful planning. The series turns an odd self-help idea into a mix of awkward comedy, social observation, and unexpected emotion.

name: Dash & Lily
description: During the Christmas season in New York City, two very different teens begin trading messages and dares through a red notebook hidden in familiar city spots. As the playful exchange grows, each is nudged out of a comfort zone and toward a new way of seeing the holidays.

name: Citadel
description: What if you woke up without your memories—only to be pulled back into dangerous spy work? Years after a top agency is brought down, a pair of former agents must rely on an old ally to recover their past and stop a sinister threat tied to what happened back then.

name: The Other Bennet Sister
description: In this period drama, an overlooked young woman struggles with awkwardness, anxiety, and a reputation for being preachy. Tired of being sidelined in social life and family expectations, she decides to take control of her own future.

name: The Boroughs
description: In a peaceful retirement community, a grieving newcomer’s terrifying encounter pulls him into a misfit group of unlikely heroes. Together, they investigate a troubling secret that makes their “golden years” far more dangerous than anyone anticipated.

name: Patience
description: Set in York, this series follows a woman who works in criminal records and has a remarkable gift for spotting patterns in difficult cases. With support from a detective, she helps the police solve a range of crimes using her unique perspective and love of puzzles.

name: Bon Appétit, Your Majesty
description: A modern chef is suddenly sent back to the Joseon era and ends up cooking for a feared king. Her unfamiliar dishes win attention at court, but she must survive palace pressure, rivalries, and high-stakes challenges while trying to find her footing in a dangerous new world.

name: Helluva Boss
description: In a chaotic version of Hell, a small assassination business takes jobs targeting the living with help from a borrowed magical book. The team struggles to keep the operation running while clashing with each other and the dangers around them.

name: Song of the Samurai
description: Set in Kyoto at the end of the Edo period, this live-action miniseries spotlights the intense lives of the Shinsengumi as they defend the city during Japan’s final years of the shogunate. Following a street brawler as he bonds with new comrades, loyalty is tested by betrayal, illness, and war amid fierce action.

name: Berlin and the Lady with an Ermine
description: Seville sets the stage for a dazzling robbery. Berlin gathers his crew to plan an explosive heist targeting a priceless work of art.

name: Percy Jackson and the Olympians
description: A young outsider is pulled into a world of gods and monsters and sent on a cross-country quest to return a stolen object before a divine conflict erupts. Along the way, the journey becomes just as much about friendship, belonging, and discovering where they fit.

name: Small Prophets
description: In a quiet suburban setting, a lonely man discovers something supernatural in an ordinary shed, setting off a story where everyday life and small wonders blend together. The series mixes gentle comedy, melancholy, and warmth as strange events ripple through a close-knit community.

name: U.S. Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
description: This miniseries offers an inside look at the United States Men’s National Soccer Team during the run-up to the 2026 FIFA World Cup in North America. Filmed over four years, it tracks the squad’s personal and collective journeys toward the sport’s biggest stage.

name: Kylie
description: Kylie opens her personal archives to revisit her life and career, including reinventions that helped shape pop culture. Using home movies, photographs, and new interviews, she reflects on public scrutiny, personal loss, and illness.

name: Carizzma
description: Caro Pardíaco, a glamorous influencer and unapologetic diva, seems to have it all—until her midlife crisis leads her to a trap of romantic love. As her life shifts, her choices and feelings pull her deeper into the mess.

name: Ratched
description: Set in 1947, this origins story follows a nurse’s rise from caregiver to a terrifying force within the mental health care system. As her choices grow darker, the series tracks her unsettling progression through institutions and patient care.

name: Industry
description: In the cutthroat world of international finance, young graduates compete for a limited number of permanent roles at a top investment bank in London. As they settle into a culture shaped by ambition and reckless private lives, loyalties shift quickly between colleagues, friends, lovers, and enemies.

name: Truth Seekers
description: A ghost-hunting duo team up to uncover and film paranormal sightings across the U.K. and share their adventures on an online channel. Their supernatural experiences grow more frequent, terrifying, and even deadly as the pair begin to uncover a conspiracy that could threaten the entire human race.

name: Resident Alien
description: A crash-landed alien takes on the identity of a small-town Colorado doctor, hoping to keep to a simple life. Soon, he’s pulled into investigating a local murder and must blend in while wrestling with the ethics of his mission and big questions about humanity.

name: The Peripheral
description: Trapped in a small Appalachian town, a young woman’s escape is playing advanced video games. When a company sends her a new system to test, it blends her dreams of purpose, romance, and glamour with escalating danger for her and her family.

name: Dave
description: A suburban neurotic man is convinced he’s destined to become one of the greatest rappers of all time. To chase his dream, he leans on his closest friends to help win them over—and possibly convince the world.

name: Everyone Is Doing Great
description: Five years after a hit vampire drama ends, two former collaborators try to get their careers back on track. As they face the awkward twists of life and love, their bond is tested while the comedy lingers on the painful messiness of growing up.

name: The Last Dance
description: This 10-part documentary chronicles the untold story of a basketball icon and the Chicago Bulls dynasty, focusing on the 1997-98 championship season. It draws on rare, never-before-seen footage and sound, along with over 100 interviews from famous figures and basketball’s biggest names.

name: Little Fires Everywhere
description: A tidy suburban family’s life collides with a mysterious mother and daughter, forcing both households to confront secrets and shifting loyalties. As motherhood exerts a fierce pull, the story explores art, identity, and the risks of believing that rules alone can prevent disaster.

name: Station Eleven
description: After a devastating flu, survivors try to rebuild and remake the world, leaning on memories and new traditions as they cope with what’s been lost. The story moves between the collapsing years and later life, showing how art and community can keep people going.

name: Shōgun
description: In Japan in 1600, a powerful feudal leader fights to survive as political enemies unite against him. When a mysterious European ship is discovered marooned in a nearby fishing village, tensions and alliances begin to shift in a race toward civil war.

name: The Serpent
description: The Serpent tells how a highly elusive murderer was hunted down after a string of killings of young Western travelers across India, Thailand, and Nepal during the 1970s. With Interpol involved and arrest warrants spanning multiple continents, the capture becomes a long, tense pursuit.

name: Rise of Empires: Ottoman
description: Ottoman Sultan Mehmed II launches an ambitious campaign aimed at capturing the Byzantine capital of Constantinople. As the struggle unfolds, the series traces how the conquest reshapes the course of history for centuries, blending dramatic conflict with contextual expert commentary.

name: Daisy Jones & The Six
description: In the late 1970s, a rising rock band rockets from obscurity to massive fame, powered by two magnetic lead singers and the pressure of life on the road. Decades later, the former members reunite to finally share what really happened behind the music and why everything fell apart.

name: Smiling Friends
description: A small company runs a hotline dedicated to making people smile, sending two very different employees out to help callers in need. What sound like simple requests quickly spiral into strange, complicated misadventures, testing their patience and optimism as they try to spread happiness.

name: The North Water
description: A brutal harpooner and a disgraced ex-army doctor board a whaling expedition bound for the Arctic. Seeking redemption, the doctor confronts horrifying events as survival grows increasingly grim in the frozen wasteland.

name: Adventure Time: Distant Lands
description: Based on the animated series Adventure Time, these four specials explore unseen corners of the world with a mix of familiar energy and brand-new characters. Each one expands the universe through fresh adventures that feel like they belong to the original.

name: Des
description: Des tells the story of one of the most infamous UK criminal cases through the prism of three men, focusing on the personal and professional fallout from coming into contact with him. The series looks at how the case unfolds and what happens afterward.

name: The Queen's Gambit
description: A gifted orphan discovers an extraordinary talent for chess and enters a competitive world that rarely expects someone like her. As success grows, she faces personal struggles, pressure, and the cost of chasing mastery.

name: The Innocent
description: An accidental killing drags a man into a shadowy web of intrigue and murder. As life begins to brighten with love and freedom, a single phone call pulls everything back into nightmare.

name: Night Stalker: The Hunt for a Serial Killer
description: This true-crime miniseries looks at a string of terrifying crimes that shook Los Angeles in the 1980s. As fear spreads through the city, two detectives work relentlessly with witnesses, survivors, and reporters to track down a dangerous serial killer.

name: The White Lotus
description: At a luxury tropical resort, a weeklong getaway follows wealthy guests and overworked staff as small frictions turn into bigger tensions. What starts as paradise gradually reveals awkward behavior, class clashes, and a darkly comic sense that something is off beneath the surface.

name: Halston
description: American fashion designer Halston skyrockets to fame as his style defines an era. As his empire grows, his personal life and ambitions begin to spiral out of control.

name: Clickbait
description: When a family man is abducted, a disturbing crime quickly turns into an online mystery with real-world stakes. As those closest to him try to uncover who is behind it, the search becomes a tense race against time and misinformation.

name: And Just Like That...
description: This new chapter of “Sex and the City” follows Carrie, Miranda and Charlotte as they move through the realities of friendship and life in their 30s and then again in their 50s. Expect familiar dynamics and new challenges as the years reshape how they connect and cope.

name: Pam & Tommy
description: This comedic miniseries explores the real-world shockwave caused by the release of a private viral video, framed around the aftermath for the people involved. It follows the theft and distribution as it collides with fame, legal drama, and changing relationships in the public spotlight.

name: Inventing Anna
description: A journalist pursues the story of Anna, who convinced New York’s elite she was a German heiress. As the chase unfolds, it raises the question: entrepreneur or con artist?

name: The Tourist
description: A man wakes up in the Australian outback with no memory, armed only with a few clues. He races to piece together who he is before the truth from his past starts to catch up with him.

name: The Dropout
description: The Dropout follows an enigmatic founder who rose fast with a medical testing start-up and a reputation for bold, future-changing ideas. As the promise collapses, the story explores how failures and deception can put people's health at serious risk.

name: The Offer
description: Based on Oscar-winning producer Al Ruddy’s firsthand experiences, this miniseries recounts the never-before-shared journey of bringing a landmark 1972 film to life. It follows the behind-the-scenes clashes and ambitions around the movie’s creation and adaptation.

name: Fleishman Is in Trouble
description: Recently separated and in his forties, Toby Fleishman steps into app-based dating and finally finds success he never had before. Just as his summer of freedom begins, his ex-wife vanishes, leaving him to handle the kids while he searches for answers with no clear sign of where she is.

name: Ahsoka
description: A former Jedi sets out to investigate a rising danger in a fragile galaxy still shaped by past conflicts. The journey brings uneasy alliances, old loyalties, and new threats as the search for answers grows larger than one mission.

name: All the Light We Cannot See
description: During World War II, a blind French girl and a young German soldier are pulled onto intersecting paths as the conflict closes in around them. As danger and uncertainty grow, small acts of courage, connection, and hope offer a fragile light amid occupation and fear.

name: The Fall of the House of Usher
description: A powerful pharmaceutical dynasty built on wealth and influence begins to unravel when long-buried secrets resurface. As the family’s heirs face mysterious deaths, a dark figure from the past draws the empire into a reckoning shaped by greed, guilt, and supernatural dread.

name: Winning Time: The Rise of the Lakers Dynasty
description: A fast-paced series explores the 1980s Los Angeles Lakers, focusing on both their pro rise and their personal lives. Set in an era when the team helped define a whole time period, it blends on-court dominance with off-court drama and ambition.

name: A Murder at the End of the World
description: Gen Z amateur sleuth and tech-savvy hacker Darby Hart joins a remote retreat hosted by a reclusive billionaire, alongside other guests. When one guest is found dead, Darby must rely on her skills to determine what really happened before another life is taken.

name: The Staircase
description: This limited series follows a North Carolina family after the suspicious death of a wife, while the events surrounding the case are examined from several angles. It blends courtroom tension, family drama, and competing versions of what may have happened, leaving viewers to weigh the evidence themselves.

name: Love & Death
description: Two churchgoing couples in small-town Texas live what seems like ordinary lives—until an affair creates a dangerous chain of consequences. As tensions rise, the story turns toward a shocking act involving an axe and the aftermath that follows.

name: Under the Banner of Heaven
description: A devout detective investigates a brutal murder that connects to an esteemed Utah family’s descent into LDS fundamentalism. As his faith and loyalties are questioned, the case also sharpens distrust toward government authority and reveals fractures within religious life.

name: Painkiller
description: Painkiller is a 2023 TV miniseries that traces the causes and consequences of America’s opioid epidemic. It follows perpetrators and victims, while an investigator searches for the truth behind what drove the crisis.

name: Shoresy
description: Shoresy joins the Sudbury Bulldogs in Northern Ontario and sets out to help the struggling team stop losing. The series follows his loud, relentless style of humor as the team tries to turn things around on and off the ice.

name: Agatha All Along
description: Agatha Harkness gathers a coven of witches and sets off on The Witches' Road, a perilous journey tied to restoring what’s been taken from her. Along the way, the group faces trials that test their unity and motives as secrets surface and the road challenges what they think they want.

name: The Walking Dead: Dead City
description: In a world overrun by the dead, two uneasy survivors journey into a ruined Manhattan cut off from the mainland. The city holds danger at every turn, with hostile survivors, crumbling streets, and a strange mix of terror and haunting beauty.

name: Rogue Heroes
description: Rogue Heroes dramatizes how the SAS was formed during the darkest days of World War Two, under extreme pressure and in extraordinary circumstances. Set against the harsh North African desert, the series follows a group of misfit soldiers as they help shape a new approach to fighting.

name: From Scratch
description: An artist connects with a chef in Italy, and their romance sparks a life-changing journey across cultures and continents. Love, loss, resilience, and hope are explored as their story unfolds over many years and in different places.

name: Queen Charlotte: A Bridgerton Story
description: Young Queen Charlotte’s marriage to King George sparks an epic love story that reshapes high society. Told as a prequel in the Bridgerton universe, it pairs romance with heavier political stakes and changing rules of power.

name: Eric
description: A desperate father and a determined cop search 1980s New York for a missing nine-year-old son. As the case unfolds, the father grapples with his own inner struggles while the streets push the tension higher.

name: The Perfect Couple
description: A woman is set to marry into one of Nantucket’s wealthiest families, until a shocking death derails the wedding. As tensions rise among the guests, the investigation turns into a tense game of suspicion where everyone may be hiding something.

name: Mr Bates vs. The Post Office
description: This drama recounts one of Britain’s most notorious miscarriages of justice, as hundreds of innocent sub-postmasters and postmistresses were accused of theft and fraud. The blame stemmed from a defective IT system, turning everyday work into legal trouble and devastating accusations.

name: A Gentleman in Moscow
description: Count Alexander Rostov is swept from wealth to hardship after the Russian revolution. After a tribunal condemns him to a single room in a grand hotel, he lives sheltered from the outside world while learning what friendship, family, and love truly mean.

name: Say Nothing
description: Set during the Troubles in Northern Ireland, this miniseries follows people drawn into radical political violence and the communities shaped by fear, loyalty, and silence. It explores how belief, conflict, and secrecy can leave lasting emotional damage on victims and those who take part.

name: Masters of the Air
description: Set in World War II, the series follows airmen as they risk their lives with the 100th Bomb Group. Through missions and brutal losses, a brotherhood forms around courage, sacrifice, and hard-won triumph.

name: Nine Perfect Strangers
description: Nine stressed city dwellers arrive at a boutique wellness resort promising healing and transformation. During a 10-day retreat, the resort director monitors them closely, determined to reinvigorate their minds and bodies—though the guests have no idea what’s in store.

name: Cowboy Bebop
description: Set across the solar system, three bounty hunters take on jobs while searching for targets and trying to stay ahead of trouble. The work brings them face-to-face with the gravity of the past and the consequences of their choices.

name: Moon Knight
description: Steven Grant, a mild-mannered gift-shop employee, starts experiencing blackouts and memories of another life. As enemies converge, he and the other presence in his body uncover a deadly mystery tied to powerful Egyptian gods and complex identities.

name: The Beatles: Get Back
description: This three-part documentary series, built from more than 60 hours of unseen footage, brings you close to the group as they write songs, rehearse, and debate ideas. It highlights the warmth and camaraderie behind their creative process, and includes their final London stage performance at Savile Row.

name: Shrinking
description: A therapist juggling grief, parenting, and friendships decides on an extreme new approach: speaking with everyone in brutally unfiltered honesty. The idea aims to help, but it also threatens to spark uproarious chaos as relationships collide and emotional issues surface.

name: Fool Me Once
description: When an ex-soldier spots her murdered husband on a secret home video feed, she realizes the death may connect to something far bigger than she ever expected. As she follows the clues, a deadly conspiracy starts to surface, reaching back through the past and pulling in powerful people.

name: Hunters
description: In 1977 New York City, a diverse team of hunters uncovers a terrifying Nazi conspiracy hiding in plain sight. Believing a new genocidal plan is underway, they launch a violent mission to track down high-ranking officials and bring them to justice.

name: Devs
description: A young computer engineer digs into a secretive development division at a cutting-edge tech company in San Francisco. She becomes convinced the work is connected to the murder of her boyfriend, turning her investigation into a tense, reality-bending mystery.

name: The Falcon and the Winter Soldier
description: Set after “Avengers: Endgame,” two familiar allies team up for a global adventure that puts their skills and patience to the test. As new responsibilities and tensions build, their journey becomes as much about trust and identity as it is about stopping threats.

name: Star Trek: Picard
description: Set twenty years after Star Trek Nemesis, this series follows a now-retired Admiral Picard as he moves into a new chapter of his life. With the future shifting around him, his return to larger stakes drives a fresh story set in the Star Trek universe.

name: Locke & Key
description: After their dad’s murder, three siblings relocate with their mom to their family estate, where they uncover magical keys. Each key unlocks strange new abilities and reveals unsettling secrets tied to the house and their family history.

name: Cursed
description: In this fresh take on the Arthurian legend, a teenager teams up with a hard-edged mercenary to search for Merlin. Their mission also involves delivering an ancient sword and facing dangers tied to legendary fey magic.

name: 9-1-1: Lone Star
description: Nearly 20 years after surviving a devastating fire, Owen Strand must rebuild a firehouse and help others cope when tragedy strikes again in Austin. Teaming up with his troubled firefighter son, he brings his unorthodox approach to life and firefighting as they start anew—while Owen hides a dangerous secret.

name: Mrs. America
description: This miniseries tells the true story of the push to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment and the unexpected resistance that followed. It centers on a conservative political figure who becomes a leading voice in the backlash, earning the nickname “the sweetheart of the silent majority.”

name: Motherland: Fort Salem
description: In an alternate America, witches won their freedom over 300 years ago by striking a deal with the government to fight for their country. The series follows three young women as they move from basic training in combat magic to early deployment.

name: Heels
description: In a tight-knit Georgia community, a family wrestling promotion becomes the battleground for two brothers grappling with their late father’s legacy. Inside the ring, rival roles demand a hero and a villain, but outside it, those performances are harder to live with and let go.

name: Dr. Death
description: Each season follows a different medical true-crime case, tracing how a trusted professional can cause devastating harm and how others try to uncover what’s really happening. The story leans on investigations, accountability, and the human cost, with a tense, unsettling tone throughout.

name: Obliterated
description: A special forces team races to stop a deadly plot in Sin City, then tries to enjoy the fallout. When a bigger threat comes into play, they have to pull themselves together fast to protect Las Vegas.

name: Mythic Quest
description: Meet the team behind a massive multiplayer video game, where the toughest battles happen off-screen. Inside a high-pressure workplace built around creating worlds and heroes, office life turns into its own unpredictable quest.

name: Shantaram
description: An escaped convict tries to disappear in 1980s Bombay, building a new life while working as a medic for people in need. Along the way, he finds unexpected love, meaningful friendships, and the strength to keep moving toward redemption.

name: Ted Lasso
description: An American football coach is hired to manage an English soccer team, despite knowing little about the sport. Facing skeptical players, fans, and locals, he tries to lead with optimism, kindness, and an unconventional approach.

name: Never Have I Ever
description: After a difficult year, an Indian-American teen just wants to move from being overlooked to being popular. But navigating friends, family, and big feelings proves far from simple.

name: Love Life
description: Love Life is a romantic comedy anthology series that follows a different protagonist each season through a journey from first love to last love. Each episode chronicles one relationship, moving through changing feelings, experiences, and stages of life.

name: Love Is in the Air
description: Eda’s future is threatened when her international education scholarship is cut off, leaving her with only a high school diploma. To regain her chance, she reluctantly agrees to pretend to be engaged, and a intense, challenging relationship begins to blur the lines between duty and real feeling.

name: Avatar: The Last Airbender
description: In a world divided into four elemental nations, a young Avatar must master all four powers to help end a war and stop a ruthless enemy determined to thwart him. With help from friends, he faces dangerous trials as the conflict tightens around him.

name: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
description: Set years before a famous mission, this series follows a starship captain, a renowned science officer, and their team as they explore new worlds across the galaxy. Expect weekly adventures with fresh encounters, shifting challenges, and plenty of curiosity-fueled exploration.

name: Peacemaker
description: After recovering from a brutal clash, a ruthless costumed antihero is pulled back into action and learns that freedom comes with strings attached. The series follows a messy new mission where violent ideals, ego, and uneasy teamwork collide in darkly comic superhero chaos.

name: Horimiya
description: A secret life is the one thing they share. At school, one presents as polished and outgoing, while the other keeps a gloomy facade—both revealing gentler, bolder sides when they unexpectedly cross paths.

name: Dopesick
description: Dopesick follows how one pharmaceutical company helped spark the worst opioid epidemic in American history. It spans a distressed Virginia mining community, government investigations, and the influence of Big Pharma in Manhattan as the crisis spreads.

name: True Beauty
description: After being bullied and discriminated against for her looks, a high school girl learns makeup to transform herself into a “goddess.” As she gains confidence through online tutorials, her new image helps her rise to fame.

name: It's Okay to Not Be Okay
description: A psychiatric ward worker tries to escape the heavy emotional burdens of his past, finding gradual healing through an unexpected connection. The help comes from a woman who writes fairy tales yet refuses to believe in them, pushing them toward hope and change.

name: Ginny & Georgia
description: A free-spirited mother moves north with her two children, hoping a new town will give them a fresh start. But settling in brings family tension, teen drama, and complications that make starting over harder than expected.

name: Vigil
description: A Scottish fishing trawler vanishes under mysterious circumstances, and a death aboard the submarine HMS Vigil draws police investigators into a clash with the Navy and security services. What follows is an intense investigation that ties land and sea to a far-reaching conspiracy at the heart of Britain’s national security.

name: Clarkson's Farm
description: Jeremy Clarkson takes on the most hands-on job there is: running a farm. Known for joking about being “allergic” to manual work, he dives into farming with everything that can go right—and wrong—along the way.

name: Reservation Dogs
description: Four Indigenous teenagers in rural Oklahoma steal, rob, and save to make it to California, a faraway place that feels exotic and mysterious. Their plans are driven by adventure, friendship, and the heavy grief they carry together.

name: The Sex Lives of College Girls
description: Four college roommates arrive at a prestigious New England school and begin figuring out freedom, friendship, and adult life on campus. The series follows their messy, funny, and often contradictory experiences as they navigate new relationships, social pressure, and the ups and downs of growing up.

name: Kin
description: A Dublin family finds itself drawn deeper into a violent gangland war, and the fallout from their choices keeps mounting. As tensions escalate, their everyday lives are increasingly shaped by the dangerous world around them.

name: The Legend of Vox Machina
description: A ragtag crew of misfits turned mercenaries chase easy money and cheap ale, but their world is pulled toward danger when evil threatens the realm. As the threat grows, their boisterous group learns they may be the only ones able to restore justice.

name: Only Murders in the Building
description: Three strangers bond over true-crime podcasts until a death in their building pulls them into a growing mystery. What starts as amateur sleuthing quickly turns into a comedic, puzzle-like investigation around who might be involved and why.

Follow the Dutton family as they travel west across the Great Plains toward Montana, chasing a better future in the last stretch of untamed America. Told through their journey, the story focuses on survival, harsh hardships, and the cost of starting over.

name: How I Met Your Father
description: In the near future, Sophie recounts how she met his father, jumping back to 2021. It follows a close-knit group as they sort out who they are and how to find love while dating apps shape everyday romance and choices.

name: Bosch: Legacy
description: Two years after leaving the police force, a former detective now works as a private investigator and crosses paths with a once-rival lawyer. At the same time, his daughter begins her own career in law enforcement, bringing new challenges and fresh tension to both of their lives.

name: The Night Agent
description: Brought together by a midnight phone call, an FBI agent and a cybersecurity expert set out to untangle an ever-growing tangle of political conspiracies. As the pressure mounts, their investigation keeps expanding into dangerous, high-stakes territory.

name: That '90s Show
description: Set in 1995 in Wisconsin, a teen arrives to spend the summer with her grandparents and quickly connects with a new group of kids in Point Place. The household is guided by watchful grandparents as the new teens navigate growing up, with plenty of irreverent fun and rock ’n’ roll energy.

name: Palm Royale
description: Set in 1969, an ambitious outsider schemes her way toward entry into Palm Beach’s elite social scene, chasing a coveted place at a glamorous but ruthless table. Her pursuit pits aspiration against prejudice and competition, with social climbing driving the drama and darkly comic tension.

name: The New Look
description: The New Look follows a group of influential fashion figures as they navigate World War II-era peril and the strain of Nazi-occupied Paris. Amid upheaval, creativity, rivalry, and survival collide as modern fashion takes shape.

name: 3 Body Problem
description: Across continents and decades, five brilliant friends chase earth-shattering scientific discoveries as familiar laws of science begin to unravel. As an unsettling existential threat comes into focus, their personal and professional lives collide with a mystery that grows bigger over time.

name: BLUE LOCK
description: High school soccer players from across Japan are brought into an intense, controversial training program meant to forge the world’s best, most ego-driven striker. With fierce competition and constant pressure, they must prove their individual value while still navigating the demands of playing alongside rivals.

name: Heartbreak High
description: A fresh take on life at Hartley High, spanning years of changing friendships and reputation. After a breakup from school break, a student and new allies try to fix what happened while dealing with love, sex, and heartbreak amid student fallout.

In 1899, an immigrant ship heading for New York is thrown off course by mysterious events. As the bewildered passengers grapple with mounting oddities, a mind-bending riddle slowly unfolds from their perspectives.

name: The Penguin
description: After a disaster leaves a city shaken, a ruthless underworld figure sees a chance to climb higher and take control of the streets. To get there, he must outmaneuver dangerous rivals while battling the low opinion others have of him.

name: Bad Monkey
description: A detective turned restaurant inspector in Southern Florida is pulled into a strange case after a tourist makes a shocking discovery while fishing. As he gets deeper, greed and corruption swirl around a sun-soaked world full of oddball characters, and the story even lives up to its title—there’s a monkey.

name: Night Sky
description: Retired and private, a long-married couple keeps a secret connection to a strange, deserted planet hidden in their backyard. When an enigmatic newcomer arrives, their quiet routine is disrupted, and the mysterious chamber they thought they knew reveals far more than they expected.

name: Constellation
description: After a fatal accident aboard the International Space Station, a lone astronaut races back to Earth and finds that crucial parts of her life have shifted, including her young daughter. The journey turns into a tense search for answers amid unsettling changes she can’t ignore.

name: Mrs. Davis
description: A nun sets out on a globe-spanning mission to take down a powerful artificial intelligence that’s reshaping everyday life. Teaming up with someone from her past, she’s pulled into a strange mix of faith, tech, and offbeat quests that keep shifting the rules as she searches for a way to fight back.

name: The Bear
description: A young fine-dining chef returns to Chicago to run a family sandwich shop, bringing big ambitions into a cramped, chaotic kitchen. As pressure builds, the staff clash, adapt, and slowly form a rough but meaningful support system.

name: Velma
description: A loud, adult-leaning reimagining traces how a teen sleuth and future friends first come together around strange crimes and personal drama. As clues pile up, the group navigates sharp humor, self-aware commentary, and a very different take on a familiar mystery-solving setup—without the classic mascot at the center.

name: Alchemy of Souls
description: A powerful sorceress inhabits a blind woman’s body and crosses paths with a man from a prestigious family. He seeks her help to alter his destiny, setting off a fantasy of soul-shifting magic and risky consequences.

name: The Diplomat
description: Amid an international crisis, a US diplomat juggles a high-profile ambassador role and the strain it puts on her personal life. While navigating tense politics in the UK, she also faces serious problems in a marriage shaped by power and pressure.

name: Extraordinary Attorney Woo
description: With an exceptionally high IQ, Woo Young-woo navigates the legal world while learning to embrace who she is. Along the way, she builds a close circle of friends and allies and finds support in everyday challenges and courtroom work.

name: Gen V
description: At a college for young superheroes, ambitious students compete for status, fame, and a shot at joining an elite team. As pressure builds and troubling secrets surface, they face hard choices about power, loyalty, and the kind of heroes they want to be.

name: Solo Leveling
description: In a world threatened by monsters from dungeons, a hunter at the bottom of the ranks is brutally defeated and returns with a mysterious System only he can see. As he levels up in new ways, he pushes to uncover why it’s happening and what the dungeon connection really means.

name: Boy Swallows Universe
description: In 1980s suburban Brisbane, a young boy tries to make sense of a chaotic home life as crime, addiction, and danger close in around his family. It blends coming-of-age emotion with moments of humor, hope, and a touch of the surreal.

name: The Recruit
description: Recruited straight out of law school by the CIA, a daredevil young attorney jumps into international espionage without much preparation. As he gets pulled deeper into secret operations, every assignment brings heightened danger and fast-moving uncertainty.

name: The Great American Baking Show
description: Legendary judges return for another season of The Great American Baking Show, hosted in the iconic tent by two familiar faces. Nine amateur bakers from around America compete in signature challenges with increasingly difficult baked goods, tackling themed rounds judged by the panel as they work under time pressure.

name: The Lost Flowers of Alice Hart
description: After losing her parents in a mysterious fire, nine-year-old Alice Hart is raised by her grandmother on a flower farm, where hidden truths shape her upbringing. Years later, an unearthed betrayal forces her to confront what really happened and face her past.

name: The Apothecary Diaries
description: Maomao has a peaceful life as an apothecary—until she’s sold to work inside the emperor’s palace. When imperial heirs fall ill, she uses her sharp knowledge to investigate medical mysteries and hunt for cures, drawing the attention of a palace official who helps propel her into a new life of solving problems for the court.

name: Deadloch
description: Two very different female detectives are forced to team up to solve the murder of a local man in the quiet seaside hamlet of Deadloch. As the investigation unfolds, the case brings plenty of unusual characters and escalating chaos to town life.

name: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
description: Five years after a schoolgirl’s death, a determined student revisits the case and challenges the official story. Working with someone connected to the case, she digs for answers while the truth may be closer—and riskier—than anyone expects.

name: On the Roam
description: Follow Jason Momoa as he travels across the country chasing art, adventure, and friendship, guided by the craft behind what he finds. The journey blends scenic discovery with hands-on experiences and memorable encounters.

name: The Four Seasons
description: The decades-long friendship between three married couples is tested when one divorces, throwing off their tradition of quarterly weekend getaways. Over the course of a year, the group faces changing relationship dynamics, new tensions, and emotional fallout.

name: Ludwig
description: John Taylor lives in quiet solitude as a puzzle designer, working under the nom-de-plume “Ludwig.” When his identical twin vanishes, he takes over the twin’s identity and steps into police life, searching for answers while solving crimes tied to the disappearance.

name: Last Samurai Standing
description: In early Meiji-era Japan, Shujiro—a former undefeated samurai—joins a deadly survival contest to protect his sick family and villagers. As the rules unfold, he finds himself in a brutal battle among hundreds of warriors competing for a major cash prize.

name: This City Is Ours: A Crime Family Saga
description: A notorious gang boss steps back from his criminal empire, and a violent scramble for control erupts between his volatile son and a trusted lieutenant. As loyalties fracture, the family behind a cocaine trade becomes locked in open conflict, turning rivalries and betrayal into a citywide war.

name: The WONDERfools
description: In 1999, a spirited girl and her neighbors develop imperfect supernatural abilities after a strange incident. As disappearances rock their city, they’re drawn into a tense struggle against a dangerous force behind it.

name: Secret Level
description: This adult animated anthology drops into the worlds of popular video games, with each short episode opening a different adventure. It aims to capture the feel of each setting through fast, self-contained stories filled with action, fantasy, sci-fi, and darker twists.

name: The Fragrant Flower Blooms with Dignity
description: An intimidating student and an open-minded newcomer form an unlikely bond, even as their two neighboring high schools clash. As they get closer, tension from the rivalry keeps testing what their growing connection can handle.

name: When Life Gives You Tangerines
description: On Jeju Island, two young people grow up side by side as their bond deepens into a lasting love shaped by everyday joys, hard choices, and changing times. As years pass, they face setbacks and small triumphs that test their resolve and show how love can endure through life’s seasons.

name: Takopi's Original Sin
description: An alien comes to Earth on a mission to spread happiness, using magical Happy Gadgets to help a lonely fourth grader find her smile. As he gets closer, he discovers the pain behind her life and learns that real happiness may not be fixed by gadgets alone.

name: If Wishes Could Kill
description: A mysterious app promises wishes, but it soon begins a countdown to death. As a group of teens gets pulled in, they race to stop the deadly cycle and stay alive.

name: Woody and Friends Tales
description: An animated science-adventure series follows a confident cowboy and his fearless space ranger friend as they tackle monster-sized problems and try to answer tough questions. Each episode mixes big, playful missions with lessons in dimensional science, technology, engineering, and math readiness tools.

name: James.
description: Football great James Rodríguez reflects on his path to the elite and the pressure of stepping onto the biggest stage. The story looks back on his journey through major moments that shaped his career.

name: Halo
description: Set in the 26th century, this series follows an epic conflict between humanity and the alien Covenant. It blends large-scale action and adventure with personal stories, building a richly imagined vision of the future.

name: Perry Mason
description: Set in 1932 Los Angeles, this series follows a struggling private investigator as a booming city and a broken personal life collide. After a kidnapping goes wrong, he digs deeper and exposes how fractured the city is while uncovering the truth behind the crime.

name: Your Honor
description: A New Orleans judge is pulled into a moral crisis when his son is involved in a hit-and-run. As organized crime closes in, the judge is forced to face impossible choices while trying to protect his family.

name: The Flight Attendant
description: A hungover flight attendant wakes in Dubai beside a dead body and keeps going instead of calling the police. When FBI agents question her about a recent layover in Bangkok, she can’t make sense of what happened and starts to fear she may be involved.

name: Cruel Summer
description: In a small Texas town, a popular teen disappears across three summers (1993, 1994, and 1995). As the community shifts around what people believe and what is actually happening, another girl’s life takes a dramatic turn, building a tense mystery that keeps changing with each year.

name: Silo
description: In a ruined, toxic future, thousands live deep underground in a massive silo under strict rules. When the sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents begin dying mysteriously, an engineer starts uncovering shocking truths about the silo’s purpose and history.

name: The English Game
description: Two 19th-century footballers come from opposite sides of England’s class divide and are pulled into both professional upheaval and personal turmoil. As they push to reshape the sport, their struggle also reflects larger tensions across society and identity.

name: The Old Man
description: Dan Chase, an ex–CIA operative living off the grid, is targeted by an assassin determined to end him. As the danger escalates, he must confront what he did in the past to shape what comes next.

name: The Woman in the House Across the Street from the Girl in the Window
description: A woman stuck in a routine watches life from her window until a new neighbor brings a glimmer of change. When she witnesses a violent crime across the street, her reality starts to feel uncertain and her days become anything but ordinary.

name: A Small Light
description: When a secretary is asked to help hide a family from Nazi persecution during World War II, she and her husband work with others to keep eight people safe for years in a hidden annex. The diary’s discovery and preservation later help share their account with the world.

name: The Serpent Queen
description: An orphaned teenage bride is sent to the French court with high expectations, only to find her marriage far more difficult than promised. Using intelligence and determination, she learns to survive the dangers of royal life and gradually becomes a powerful force in the monarchy.

name: The Watcher
description: A family settles into a suburban dream home, only to realize their move comes with a nightmare they didn’t ask for. As unsettling letters arrive from an unknown watcher, the situation spirals into a tense mystery with neighbors and community members adding to the dread.

name: Griselda
description: Inspired by real events, this fictional dramatization follows a woman’s journey from Medellín to Miami as she rises to become a major power in a drug trafficking empire. Her path is driven by ambition and necessity, set against a landscape of danger, fear, and betrayal.

name: The Long Shadow
description: This 2023 miniseries dramatizes the long, high-stakes hunt for a notorious serial killer, tracking how a major police investigation unfolded between the mid-1970s and early 1980s. Spanning years, it shows the scale of the manhunt and the lasting changes it sparked in how policing is done.

name: Bodies
description: A dead body is found on a London street, and four detectives chase answers across different time periods. Their goal isn’t just solving a murder, but protecting Britain’s future as the cases intertwine.

name: BMF
description: Inspired by a true story, this crime drama follows two brothers who build a powerful underworld operation in late-1980s Detroit. As their influence grows, the story also looks at family ties, ambition, and the pull of money and success.

name: The Resort
description: An anniversary trip to Yucatan throws a couple into one of the region’s most bizarre unsolved mysteries. As the investigation builds, their marriage is pushed and tested in unexpected ways.

name: Untold: The Girlfriend Who Didn't Exist
description: A rising football star’s promising path is shaken when a secret online relationship becomes a national story. This documentary follows the personal, athletic, and media fallout around a shocking case of trust, deception, and public judgment.

name: AJ and the Queen
description: On a cross-country journey in a rundown RV, a drag performer discovers a tough-talking 10-year-old stowaway. Their unlikely travel partnership turns everyday stops into a mix of humor, heart, and emotional connection.

name: The Good Lord Bird
description: Told through the eyes of a newly freed teenager who joins an abolitionist on a holy crusade to end slavery. Along the way, he meets major figures and finds himself caught up in the lead-up to a famous raid at Harpers Ferry.

name: The Plot Against America
description: This alternate American history follows a working-class Jewish family in New Jersey as they witness the political rise of an aviator-hero and xenophobic populist who becomes president. As power shifts, the country moves toward fascism.

name: Away
description: American astronaut Emma Green must leave her husband and teenage daughter behind to command an international space crew on a dangerous journey. The series focuses on hope and the need for one another to attempt the impossible, with the mission providing a backdrop for deeply personal stakes.

name: White Lines
description: Zoe Walker leaves her quiet life to search for her missing brother in Ibiza. Her investigation pulls her into a decadent, dangerous world as the case grows more tangled and high-stakes.

name: Monsters at Work
description: A young monster lands his dream job at a famous factory, only to find the whole workplace has changed overnight. Reassigned to a quirky maintenance crew, he tries to adapt, learn comedy, and prove himself while keeping the power running and fitting into his new team.

name: For Life
description: A person in prison studies the law and becomes a lawyer to take on cases for other inmates. At the same time, he fights to overturn his own life sentence for a crime he insists he didn’t commit.

name: ZeroZeroZero
description: Based on Roberto Saviano’s book, ZeroZeroZero follows the global cocaine trade through multiple connected threads, showing how buyers, sellers, and brokers drive a ruthless supply chain. It moves across countries and perspectives, turning an underground business into a tense, intricate thriller.

name: The Great North
description: The Great North follows an Alaska single dad trying to keep his oddball kids close. As life on a fishing boat continues, one child’s artistic ambitions pull her toward the flashy world of a local mall.

name: Starstruck
description: On New Year’s Eve, a drunken hook-up leaves Jessie dealing with unexpected fallout. She soon learns her one night stand is actually a major film star, turning a simple encounter into something much more complicated.

name: Human Resources
description: In this Big Mouth spinoff, a lineup of quirky creatures manage romance, hormones, and workplace pressures. They juggle the chaos of human relationships and the demands of their clients, blending workplace comedy with big feelings.

name: Swagger
description: A basketball prodigy faces intense pressure as he tries to beat overwhelming odds. As he works through tough challenges, he discovers what it really means to have swagger.

name: FBI: Most Wanted
description: The Fugitive Task Force relentlessly hunts down and captures criminals listed by the Bureau. Seasoned agents lead a highly skilled team that works as a mobile undercover unit, staying in the field to pursue those who are desperate to evade justice.

name: Helstrom
description: Daimon and Ana Helstrom, siblings from a mysterious family legacy, hunt the worst people have to offer. Their pursuit of terror mixes intense supernatural-style threats with a complicated brother-sister bond, driven by each sibling’s own attitude and skills.

name: Awkwafina Is Nora from Queens
description: Nora Lin leans on her family as she figures out life and young adulthood in outer-borough NYC. The series follows her day-to-day attempts to move forward while dealing with the messes life keeps bringing.

name: Big Shot
description: After a public meltdown costs him his top job, a hard-driving basketball coach takes a surprising new position at a private all-girls high school. As he tries to rebuild his reputation, he’s forced to adjust his approach, earn the team’s trust, and learn a few lessons of his own along the way.

name: Dorohedoro
description: An amnesiac man with a lizard-like curse tries to undo it by tracking down the sorcerer responsible, with help from a trusted friend. In a dangerous underworld known as the Hole, this pursuit turns into a major threat.

name: Love, Victor
description: Victor, a new student at Creekwood High, navigates self-discovery while dealing with pressure at home, settling into a new city, and figuring out his sexual orientation. When things feel overwhelming, he reaches out to Simon for guidance through the ups and downs of high school.

name: White House Plumbers
description: White House Plumbers is a true-story drama told through the eyes of Nixon’s political operatives tied to Watergate. Their bungled mission and attempts to protect the presidency spiral into chaos, pulling down the very power they thought they could secure.

name: Itaewon Class
description: In a vibrant Seoul neighborhood, an ex-con and his friends team up to challenge a powerful foe. Together, they pursue their bold dream of turning a street bar into a reality.

name: Stateless
description: Four people from very different backgrounds find themselves held in an immigration detention center in the Australian desert. As their lives cross, the series explores fear, hope, and the human cost of a system shaped by real events.

name: Walker
description: A widowed father of two returns to Austin after spending two years undercover and finds that home brings its own challenges. As he reconnects with his family and settles back into life as a ranger, he faces personal and professional pressures that test his sense of right and wrong.

name: Hospital Playlist
description: Inside a busy hospital, five close friends juggle demanding jobs, personal bonds, and the lives of their patients. The series follows everyday moments—joy, grief, and everything in between—mixing heartfelt stories with humor and a relaxed, slice-of-life rhythm.

name: Devils
description: After being implicated in a deadly scandal, a trader at a major London bank works to clear his name. Instead, he uncovers an intercontinental conspiracy driven by powerful forces operating in the shadows.

name: Rent-a-Girlfriend
description: A dumped college student takes a “rental girlfriend” shortcut to get dates, and his first arrangement with a striking, seemingly put-together woman starts turning into something more complicated than either expected. As their private lives and families get involved, the relationship has to keep its facade while tension builds.

name: We Are Lady Parts
description: An anarchic punk music comedy follows a Muslim women’s band as they navigate the highs and lows of making music. Through the perspective of a geeky doctorate student, the story tracks how she’s recruited to become their unlikely lead guitarist.

name: Almost Paradise
description: A former DEA agent, forced into early retirement, opens a gift shop in the Philippines and tries to settle down. But his new routine keeps getting pulled back into dangerous situations, through local police connections or people from his past—until he starts enjoying it too.

name: The Baby-Sitters Club
description: In this contemporary take on the classic book series, five best friends team up to start a baby-sitting business. Their days are filled with fun, adventure, and the ups and downs of growing up together.

name: The King: Eternal Monarch
description: An emperor seeks to shut a parallel world opened by demons, while a detective tries to safeguard people as her feelings complicate everything. Their paths collide as the worlds shift and tension grows.

name: Caliphate
description: A national security agent gets a warning about a planned terrorist attack against Sweden. In Stockholm, a teenager becomes drawn into a student relationship that opens a path to radical beliefs, as multiple young women’s lives become tangled in the pull and consequences of religious fundamentalism.

name: Love 101
description: Four misfits and a model student team up to orchestrate a plan aimed at winning over a teacher, all while navigating high school friendships and feelings. Along the way, they begin to find their place, build bonds, and gather the courage to be themselves.

name: AlRawabi School for Girls
description: At a prestigious girls’ school, bullied outcasts turn their pain into risky plans to strike back at their tormentors. As the tensions mount, the school’s darker problems come into focus through escalating confrontations.

name: Extracurricular
description: Determined to escape a dead-end life, a gifted high school student gets pulled into serious crime to cover the cost of college. As pressure grows, his choices ripple outward, turning school life into a dangerous gamble.

name: Into the Night
description: When the sun turns deadly without warning, passengers on an overnight flight from Brussels scramble to survive before daybreak. With urgency rising and trust tested, they must make hard choices and act fast to stay alive.

name: The Head
description: Set at an isolated Antarctic research station where winter cuts off communication for months, a small team called the Winterers keeps working on innovative research. A determined biologist’s push to tackle climate change spirals into fear as esteemed scientists begin to die.

name: The Shrink Next Door
description: Inspired by a true story, this series follows a man who seeks help with boundaries and instead becomes locked in a long, troubling therapeutic relationship. Over decades, the power dynamic shifts, showing what can happen when professional trust gets crossed.

name: Katla
description: A year after a subglacial volcano erupts, strange prehistoric elements begin surfacing as the ice melts. What emerges creates major, unpredictable consequences for the people trying to understand what’s happening and why.

name: Great Pretender
description: A celebrated Japanese swindler targets a real-life master of crime, only to find the con is far more complicated than expected. The series follows multiple, largely self-contained scam cases that build escalating tension with each job.

name: Dark Desire
description: A married woman’s weekend getaway sparks intense passion that spirals into tragedy, forcing her to question what’s real and what others are hiding. As relationships tighten and doubts grow, she begins to challenge the truth about people close to her.

name: Wizards
description: Merlin’s apprentice joins Arcadia’s heroes for a time-bending adventure in Camelot. As they travel through shifting eras, tension grows between the human, troll, and magical worlds.

name: Star Trek: Prodigy
description: A group of young alien outcasts commandeer an old Starfleet ship and struggle to learn how to work together. As they travel through a larger galaxy, they discover Starfleet ideals and gradually connect what they find to the wider universe ahead.

name: Leverage: Redemption
description: A skilled crew reunites with new allies to help ordinary people take on powerful wrongdoers, from corporate profiteers to secretive firms hiding dangerous truths. Each mission blends clever schemes, teamwork, action, humor, and a strong sense of justice for the underdog.

name: Domina
description: Domina follows the rise of Livia Drusilla as she navigates political power after Julius Caesar’s assassination. From her early life up to becoming one of Rome’s most influential figures, her journey is driven by ambition, survival, and hard-won influence.

name: Young Wallander
description: An incendiary hate crime sparks civil unrest and rapidly pushes a rookie cop into detective work in this origin story for the character. The investigation raises tensions around blame and belonging as the case pulls him into danger and deeper mysteries.

name: Animaniacs
description: Yakko, Wakko and Dot return with nonstop comedy and frequent jabs at authority. New additions join their playful daydream chaos, while new ideas spark more adventures as Pinky and the Brain chase big plans.

name: Start-Up
description: Start-Up follows young entrepreneurs as they chase big dreams in Korea’s fast-paced high-tech world, competing for success and navigating complicated feelings along the way. As their goals collide, the competition intensifies and relationships become just as high-stakes as the business ambitions.

name: Barbarians
description: In ancient Europe, the lives of three people collide as Roman forces push deeper into Germanic lands. As loyalties shift and tensions rise, local warriors unite to resist the empire, building toward a decisive clash in the Teutoburg Forest.

name: All Creatures Great & Small
description: Follow a young country vet as they navigate work and relationships across the Yorkshire Dales in the 1930s, mixing everyday challenges with plenty of humor and heart. This is a remake of the 1978 series, bringing the stories to a new version of the setting.

name: The Misfit of Demon King Academy
description: A powerful demon king is reborn after centuries of peace and returns to a world where magic has weakened and people no longer recognize his strength. He joins an academy for the demon king’s reincarnation, only to be dismissed as a misfit while he tries to prove who he really is.

name: Tale of the Nine Tailed
description: A TV producer stumbles into a hidden supernatural world and finds herself drawn into its mysteries. As she gets closer to a centuries-old deity, his search for a lost lover reshapes everything around her.

name: Love & Anarchy
description: A married consultant starts a flirty game with a young IT technician, and the two soon push against social expectations. What begins as harmless excitement gradually forces them to question their routines, relationships, and the lives they thought they wanted.

name: The Silent Sea
description: During a high-stakes 24-hour moon mission, a crew heads to an abandoned research facility to retrieve samples tied to classified secrets. What starts as retrieval turns into a tense fight for survival as unsettling dangers and unanswered questions surface.

name: The Mosquito Coast
description: A brilliant inventor pushes his family to leave the United States and head through Mexico in search of safety. As they travel, the journey tests their trust, survival instincts, and willingness to follow his risky plans.

name: The Chair
description: At a major university, the first woman of color to take charge of an English department faces relentless pressure as the program struggles. Balancing expectations from above with conflicts among students and staff, she tries to steer the department through its tough season.

name: Taxi Driver
description: A former special forces soldier seeks revenge for victims of injustice while working for a secret organization that disguises itself as a taxi company. Each job draws the story deeper into a tense crime-and-action world shaped by secrecy and retribution.

name: Mouse
description: A ruthless serial killer sparks nationwide fear and chaos. An honest rookie officer and a seasoned detective with a painful past team up to stop the threat, but the encounter changes their lives completely.

name: Redo of Healer
description: In a fantasy world of monsters and magic, a gifted healer is forced into brutal captivity and exploitation by powerful forces. Gaining the ability to rewind time, he turns the tables with a revenge-driven mindset, unleashing dark fury as he reshapes his fate.

name: Calls
description: Interconnected phone conversations unfold a mysterious story about strangers whose lives spiral out of control ahead of an apocalyptic event. As messages and transmissions build, the pieces come together in an eerie, escalating chain of events.

name: 30 Coins
description: An ex-exorcist, boxer, and former convict tries to hide in a remote Spanish village, hoping the past will leave him alone. But supernatural trouble comes looking, turning his private life into a fight against escalating demons.

name: 86 EIGHTY-SIX
description: The Republic of San Magnolia fights back against the Empire of Giad with combat drones called “Juggernaut,” but they’re actually piloted by Eighty-sixers treated as tools. Under a captain’s command, an assigned squadron keeps fighting in a war that seems hopeless, driven by determination and unanswered motives.

name: ODDTAXI
description: A quiet walrus who drives a taxi through busy Tokyo becomes entangled in a mystery after a teenage girl goes missing. As his days run into odd people and unusual clues, his involvement only deepens the situation.

name: The Upshaws
description: Set in Indianapolis, a hardworking Black family man tries to balance his job and home life while keeping things running amid everyday chaos. With no clear blueprint for success, he leans on good intentions, stubborn resilience, and patience as family dynamics play out day to day.

name: Young Rock
description: In 2032, a comedic look back connects a future political run to the family and youth experiences that shaped his life. Through outrageous stories, he revisits childhood among wrestling icons, teenage years in Pennsylvania, and football time at a powerhouse college program.

name: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
description: Set in South Jamaica, Queens, in 1991, this prequel follows Kanan Stark as he comes of age. The series explores how his early experiences shape the person he becomes.

name: Move to Heaven
description: A detail-oriented trauma cleaner and his estranged uncle recover belongings and deliver untold stories of the departed to loved ones. Through their work, they find meaning in what remains and uncover the lives behind each cleanup.

name: Physical
description: In 1980s San Diego, a quietly tormented housewife wrestles with intense inner struggles behind closed doors. After she stumbles into aerobics, her life begins to shift, opening a path toward confidence, momentum, and a new kind of control.

name: Sky Rojo
description: Three women flee a violent boss and his enforcers, launching a frantic, unpredictable dash for freedom. As the chase escalates, their bond is tested by danger, dark humor, and the harsh realities they’re trying to escape.

name: The Mysterious Benedict Society
description: Four gifted orphans are recruited by an eccentric benefactor for a secret mission at a boarding school called The Institute. Undercover, they must stop a dangerous scheme with large-scale consequences while learning how to function as a family.

name: Nevertheless
description: An art school classmate’s bold flirtation draws in a reluctant love cynic, and their connection slips into a friends-with-benefits rhythm. As feelings and boundaries get tested, reputation worries and uncertainty add friction to their growing romance.

name: Who Killed Sara?
description: After serving time for a murder he says he didn’t commit, a determined man returns to pursue revenge and clear his name. His search for the truth uncovers far more than the identity of the culprit behind his sister’s death.

name: The Uncanny Counter
description: A team of supernatural demon hunters called “Counters” disguise themselves as noodle restaurant employees while searching for evil spirits that menace the mortal world. Each member brings special abilities as they work together to stop the threats and protect people on the ground.

name: Racket Boys
description: A city kid is sent to the countryside when his father takes on a coaching job. There, he joins a struggling middle school badminton team and helps bring it back from the brink.

name: The Equalizer
description: An enigmatic former CIA operative helps people who have nowhere else to turn, using her extensive skills to take on dangerous situations. The show blends mystery and action as she tries to navigate a life filled with unanswered questions.

name: Record of Ragnarok
description: Before humankind is erased, the gods offer one final chance to prove worthiness for survival. A new set of battles begins, turning the fate of humanity into a high-stakes contest decided through combat.

name: Ethos
description: A diverse group of people from very different backgrounds collide in surprising circumstances within Istanbul. Some are brought together by chance, while others arrive by force of will, leading to shifting relationships and culture clashes in a vibrant city.

name: Snowdrop
description: In 1987 Seoul, a university student cares for a bleeding classmate who unexpectedly ends up in a women’s dorm despite the risks. Their meeting turns into an enduring love story shaped by danger and difficult circumstances.

name: Mr. Queen
description: A modern chef is suddenly trapped inside a queen’s body from the Joseon era, turning everyday life into a chaotic collision of two worlds. Using his cooking skills, he tries to navigate palace life while working toward getting back to his own time.

name: How to Become a Tyrant
