description: The documentary series explores different political figures throughout history.

name: Trigger Point
description: In London, bomb disposal experts rush to neutralize threats and safeguard the city. With each call bringing new danger, their work demands constant readiness and high-stakes decisions.

name: Chapelwaite
description: In the 1850s, a widowed captain brings his three children to his ancestral home in a small Maine town. As strange forces and family secrets surface, he must confront a dark history that seems to linger through generations.

name: CSI: Vegas
description: Facing a major existential threat that could damage the Crime Lab, a dedicated team of forensic investigators must adapt and use fresh methods to keep justice on track. The season brings back familiar faces alongside new techniques in Sin City.

name: FBI: International
description: Follows elite agents from the FBI’s International Fly Team, based in Budapest, as they travel the world on missions to protect Americans wherever they may be. The show centers on fast-moving cases across different countries and local law enforcement environments.

name: Hit & Run
description: After a mysterious hit-and-run in Tel Aviv shatters a married man’s life, he follows the trail across borders in search of answers. As grief turns into suspicion, the case pulls him into a tense web of danger, hidden motives, and personal secrets.

name: La Brea
description: When a massive sinkhole opens in Los Angeles, hundreds of people and buildings are pulled into its depths. Those who fall into a mysterious primeval land must band together to survive, while the rest of the world races to understand what happened—especially one family trying to reunite.

name: The King's Affection
description: When the crown prince dies, a twin sister takes his place on the throne and tries to guard her identity. As she navigates royal expectations, she also holds onto her private affection for her first love as a carefully kept secret.

name: D.P.
description: A young private is tasked with capturing army deserters, only to uncover the harsh realities each recruit endures during compulsory service. As the job unfolds, the system’s damage becomes impossible to ignore.

name: Magpie Murders
description: An editor becomes entangled in a dangerous mystery after receiving an unfinished manuscript. As intrigue builds around it, murder draws her deeper into the investigation.

name: Komi Can't Communicate
description: In a bustling high school, Tadano tries to help Komi, a shy student who struggles to connect, work toward her goal of making 100 friends. Along the way, her attempts at conversation bring plenty of awkward moments and heartfelt progress.

name: Dug Days
description: Dug Days is a TV miniseries of short, humorous adventures featuring Dug, the talking dog from “Up.” Each episode shows everyday happenings in Dug’s backyard, viewed through his excited and slightly distorted perspective, with lots of lighthearted misadventures along the way.

name: The Empress
description: Rebellious Elisabeth unexpectedly finds herself swept into life at a powerful imperial court when she falls for the emperor and becomes his unlikely bride. As court life settles in, romantic sparks are tangled with tension, intrigue, and constant pressure behind the scenes.

name: Turning Point: 9/11 and the War on Terror
description: Modern history is often split into what came before and after September 11, 2001. This five-part docuseries follows the attacks and their major ripple effects, weaving together perspectives and personal stories to show how the day reshaped the nation.

name: NCIS: Hawai'i
description: Jane Tennant leads a team of specialists at NCIS Pearl Harbor, juggling duty to family and country as they investigate high-stakes crimes. Cases involve military personnel, national security, and the unsettling mysteries that emerge across sun-drenched island life.

name: Happiness
description: A deadly virus spreads across the city, and an apartment building housing different social classes is sealed off. As fear grows and tensions rise between residents, they must find ways to endure together while the situation worsens.

name: Goosebumps
description: Five high schoolers set out to investigate a tragic teen death from three decades ago, uncovering a web of unsettling truths tied to what their parents kept hidden. As their investigation deepens, the town’s past resurfaces in dark, twisted ways.

name: Let the Right One In
description: A father and his 12-year-old daughter face a life-altering curse that locks her into staying the same age. Restricted to nights and needing carefully measured human blood to survive, they carve out a quiet routine while her altered existence reshapes everything.

name: Dalgliesh
description: A recent widower and celebrated poet, an enigmatic inspector uses sharp empathy and insight to explore the darker side of human nature while investigating intricate crimes. Set in 1970s England, the cases bring tense interrogations and complex motives to the surface.

name: Harlem
description: Harlem follows four ambitious best girlfriends navigating life in New York City. A rising professor, a savvy tech entrepreneur, a no-filter singer, and a fashion designer juggle careers, friendships, and relationships as they chase bigger dreams and personal growth.

name: Our Beloved Summer
description: Years after making a viral high school documentary, two former lovers who used to bicker get pulled back on camera and find themselves tangled up in each other’s lives again. As filming returns, old feelings and familiar friction resurface in everyday moments.

name: The Cleaning Lady
description: A whip-smart doctor comes to the U.S. for a medical treatment to save her ailing son. But when the system fails and pushes her into hiding, she refuses to be beaten down and marginalized. Instead, she becomes a cleaning lady for the mob and starts playing the game by her own rules.

name: As We See It
description: This warm dramedy follows three roommates on the autism spectrum as they face dating, work, friendship, and the messy push toward adulthood. With support from family and a caregiver, they hit setbacks, celebrate small wins, and try to build more independent lives.

name: Super Pumped
description: Based on a shocking true story, this series follows an Uber founder as he helps turn a fledgling start-up into a multi-billion-dollar tech titan. Backed by influential allies, his aggressive, win-at-all-costs drive fuels rapid growth—until the fallout threatens to undo everything.

name: Not Me
description: After years abroad, a man returns to Thailand and finds his twin in a coma. Taking his brother’s place, he goes undercover to learn what happened and track down the person responsible for the betrayal, risking exposure as he searches for answers.

name: Family Secrets
description: A fierce defense attorney and a by-the-book prosecutor clash over what justice should mean, even as personal history and duty pull them into the same high-stakes case. When a family member is accused of murder, they are forced into a tense legal cat-and-mouse that keeps escalating.

name: Bel-Air
description: A book-smart teen is forced to leave his Philadelphia streets and relocate to Los Angeles to live with wealthy relatives. The move reshapes his life as family expectations and a harsher, modern reality collide.

name: Murderville
description: Eccentric detective Terry Seattle teams up with clueless celebrity guest stars to investigate a series of murders. With no script for the guests, they have to figure things out while the detective pushes them into increasingly goofy situations.

name: Wolf Like Me
description: After the death of his wife, Gary struggles to cope and support his daughter, while Mary keeps a secret she can’t share. When fate seems to bring them together, their bond is tied to a larger reason.

name: WeCrashed
description: Inspired by actual events, this miniseries follows a fast-rising coworking concept that becomes a massive global brand—then faces a dramatic collapse in value. At its center is a love story, raising the question: what really happened?

name: Money Heist: Korea - Joint Economic Area
description: A masked criminal crew teams up under “The Professor” to attempt Korea’s biggest heist. Their plans unfold with a group of specialists and a dedicated inspector, all driven by secrecy and high-stakes pressure.

name: The Chelsea Detective
description: A detective living on a battered houseboat in Chelsea works cases among the city’s wealthy and powerful after separating from his wife. Teaming up with a colleague, he draws on his local roots to solve crimes in a world far removed from his own.

name: Twenty Five Twenty One
description: In a time when dreams feel out of reach, a teen fencer chases ambitious goals while navigating setbacks and shifting circumstances. Along the way, she forms a meaningful bond with a hardworking young man trying to rebuild his life.

name: Diabolical
description: Diabolical is an animated anthology that spins off The Boys Universe with irreverent, emotionally intense short films. Each episode drops into a different corner of the world, mixing unsettling humor and shocking moments in a variety of animation styles.

name: Summer Time Rendering
description: After returning home for a childhood friend’s funeral, a young traveler finds a remote island haunted by a sinister supernatural force. What begins as a personal trip quickly turns into a tightly paced mystery filled with suspense and escalating danger.

name: The Last Days of Ptolemy Grey
description: Suddenly without his trusted caretaker, an elderly man with dementia is placed under the care of an orphaned teenager. As they pursue a treatment that may restore his memories, their journey leads them toward unsettling, life-changing truths.

name: The Devil's Hour
description: Lucy wakes every night at exactly 3:33am, and her life hasn’t felt right for years. As a brutal string of murders unfolds, she races to find answers—following a trail that seems to connect her to what’s happening.

name: Midnight at the Pera Palace
description: In a historic Istanbul hotel, a journalist is pulled into the past and forced to interfere with a plot that could reshape modern Turkey. As time layers collide, they must keep up while trying to prevent dangerous consequences that ripple forward.

name: Sunny
description: An American woman living in Kyoto, Japan, is thrown into turmoil when her husband and son vanish in a mysterious plane crash. As she searches for answers, she’s given Sunny, a domestic robot created by the husband’s electronics company.

name: American Born Chinese
description: An average teenager balances school life and home life while trying to fit in and figure out where he belongs. When a new student arrives, his world gets even more complicated, and he is pulled into a fantastical conflict tied to Chinese mythology.

name: The Eminence in Shadow
description: A would-be shadowed mastermind trains in secret to become someone unseen, only for an unexpected accident to send him to another world. There, he finds himself leading a real secret organization, where he finally gets to chase his imagined fantasies while fighting evil in the shadows.

name: Baymax!
description: In the vibrant city of San Fransokyo, a friendly inflatable healthcare robot goes on a series of short adventures focused on helping everyday people. Each vignette mixes humor and heart as it tackles common health and personal concerns with kindness, warmth, and a gentle sense of fun.

name: The Winchesters
description: Before the famous brothers, this prequel follows a legendary pair as their high-stakes romance collides with a dangerous supernatural world. Narrated by Dean Winchester, it shows how they fight to protect their love—and the world—from threats that won’t wait.

name: Call of the Night
description: A new companion draws Ko into the allure of dark gifts and vampire immortality, but only if he meets certain conditions. As he weighs what he truly wants, he finds out how far he’s willing to go for vampiric desires.

name: Reboot
description: When Hulu reboots an early 2000s family sitcom, the dysfunctional cast is pulled back together. As they revisit old problems, they’re forced to confront unresolved issues in today’s fast-changing world.

name: The Rig
description: The crew of an offshore oil rig is suddenly cut off by a mysterious fog from reaching the Scottish mainland. With environmental pressures and growing paranoia, the divided team struggles to stay together while uncovering a threat that goes beyond what they expected.

name: First Kill
description: Two teens find romance complicated by their opposing vampire worlds. As one is a vampire and the other is a vampire hunter, their feelings collide with dangerous duties—both determined to prove themselves and make their first kill.

name: Planet Earth III
description: Journeying to the far reaches of our planet, this eight-part series follows extraordinary species and the lives they lead in dramatic, thrilling, funny, and sometimes heartbreaking moments. Each story highlights how nature can inspire and sustain, and keeps the focus on hope throughout the journey.

name: Manhunt
description: A conspiracy thriller that follows the hunt for the assassin of Abraham Lincoln and the tense search that follows. As the country teeters on the edge, multiple threads of political turmoil, shifting alliances, and urgent pursuit come together.

name: Karen Pirie
description: A 25-year-old murder in St Andrews becomes the focus of a provocative true-crime podcast, pulling DS Karen Pirie into a fresh review of the case. As old leads resurface and new evidence emerges, the situation escalates when suspects begin facing attacks, turning the cold investigation into something urgent.

name: The Big Door Prize
description: A mysterious machine arrives in a small town, promising to reveal everyone's true potential. As residents chase a better future, they start rethinking their jobs, relationships, and beliefs, sparking a mix of humor, heart, and uncertainty about what the machine really means.

name: Death and Other Details
description: In a post-fact world, a renowned detective and a protégé try to solve a murder while sailing the Mediterranean aboard an ocean liner packed with the wealthy and powerful. Everyone on board is hiding something, and they must figure out who’s responsible before the truth gets buried.

name: Echo 3
description: When a scientist disappears near a tense border area, her brother and husband, both elite soldiers, join the search. As they push deeper into a dangerous conflict zone, they uncover hints that her disappearance may be tied to something more complicated than a simple kidnapping.

name: Black Knight
description: In a dystopian 2071 choked by air pollution, humanity clings to the Black Knights for survival, but they’re far from ordinary delivery workers. Amid a harsh, class-divided world, the mission-focused deliveries and escalating danger draw them into a fight against a powerful enemy.

name: Frasier
description: Frasier Crane returns to Boston with fresh challenges, new relationships, and the pressure of old dreams. As he settles into a changed life, he has to navigate unfamiliar dynamics while trying to move forward.

name: Pantheon
description: A bullied teenager receives mysterious online help tied to an experiment in uploading human consciousness. As this new form of intelligence emerges, personal grief, identity, and global power struggles collide in a fast-moving science fiction story.

name: Tomorrow
description: A young man becomes part human and part spirit after an accident and ends up working for a company of grim reapers. As he takes on special missions, the team helps troubled people find hope and meaning in life.

name: Wolf Pack
description: When a raging wildfire unleashes a supernatural threat, four young adults get pulled into a tense mystery as strange events begin to intensify under a full moon. Their lives collide as the danger closes in and forces them to band together.

name: Most Dangerous Game
description: A desperate man agrees to a high-stakes offer to secure his family’s future after receiving a devastating diagnosis. What starts as a chance to earn money quickly turns into a 24-hour survival challenge, as he’s forced to run, hide, and outthink a group that treats the city like their personal hunting ground.

name: The Patient
description: A psychotherapist finds himself held prisoner by a serial killer with an unusual request: curb his homicidal urges.

name: Liaison
description: Two agents—and former lovers—are pulled into a tense mission to stop international cyberattacks aimed at the UK. As they investigate, their work becomes tangled with the painful, long-buried truths behind their relationship.

name: Loot
description: After divorcing her husband of 20 years, Molly Novak must decide what to do with her massive settlement. She chooses to pour herself into her charitable foundation again, aiming to reconnect with the real world and rediscover meaning along the way.

name: The Life and Movies of Ersan Kuneri
description: A famous figure from erotic cinema looks back on his past and tries to reinvent himself by making films in other genres. As he pursues new ideas, the series mixes absurd comedy with a retro 1980s feel and a look at changing tastes in entertainment.

name: Waco: The Aftermath
description: This miniseries looks at the fallout after the Waco tragedy, following the legal battles involving surviving sect members and the wider effects that reached beyond the original standoff. It also explores how the事件 helped fuel later domestic extremism in the United States.

name: The Last Thing He Told Me
description: A woman must quickly build trust with her teenage stepdaughter after her husband mysteriously disappears. Together, they work through clues and memories to uncover what happened and why he left.

name: Uncoupled
description: After a sudden breakup ends a long marriage, a middle-aged man is forced to rebuild his life in New York. As he navigates dating again and leans on friends, he wrestles with heartbreak, identity, and what it means to start over when everything felt settled.

name: KinnPorsche
description: A young man takes a dangerous job protecting a powerful mafia heir to help his family, only to get pulled deeper into a world of shifting loyalties and constant threats. As trust becomes harder to find, duty and attraction collide, turning every close call into an emotional test.

name: Accused
description: This crime anthology series follows an ordinary person as one wrong turn spirals into an extraordinary situation. Each episode begins in a courtroom from the defendant’s point of view, with the accused on trial before anyone knows their crime or how it all began.

name: Quantum Leap
description: Nearly 30 years after a scientist vanished in a mysterious accelerator, a new team is assembled to restart the project and uncover what’s behind the machine and its creator. When the lead makes an unauthorized jump into the past, the team must figure out why—before it creates even more confusion.

name: Love on the Spectrum U.S.
description: This docuseries follows people on the autism spectrum as they search for romance and try to make sense of modern dating. It offers an honest look at connection, nerves, and the small victories that come with opening up to someone new.

name: Turn of the Tide
description: After a boat carrying cocaine sinks off his home island, Eduardo sees a risky way to profit and chase big dreams. The discovery reshapes daily life for the tight-knit community as everything spirals into chaos and opportunity.

name: Big Boys
description: Two boys with very different views on masculinity become best friends during freshers’ week at Brent University. Over their first year, they explore identity through experimentation and self-discovery, while supporting each other through personal challenges.

name: The Power
description: In an otherwise familiar world, teenage girls suddenly develop the ability to electrocute people at will. The Power follows remarkable characters across multiple countries as the new ability rapidly shifts power balances worldwide—from small sparks to a sweeping reversal of everyday life.

name: Beavis and Butt-Head
description: Two teenage heavy-metal music fans kill time with reckless, mindless antics, reacting to everything as either “cool” or “sucks.” Their boredom fuels the chaos, turning everyday moments into loud, lowbrow fun.

name: The Midnight Club
description: Inside a hospice for terminally ill teens, an exclusive midnight club makes a chilling pact: the first to die will send a sign from beyond the grave. As the group gathers at night, the atmosphere turns creepy and the stories they share add to a larger mystery.

name: Squid Game: The Challenge
description: Hundreds of contestants enter a high-stakes reality competition inspired by “Squid Game,” battling through familiar and new games for a massive cash prize. As the field shrinks, pressure mounts and players weigh strategy, alliances, and nerve to stay in the running.

name: Sprung
description: After serving more than two decades, a convicted criminal is suddenly released during the pandemic with nowhere to go. With lockdown keeping everyone apart, he shelters-in-place with a group of former inmates, teaming up with their criminal know-how for good while trying to rebuild their lives.

name: LIGHT & MAGIC
description: When a filmmaker sets out to create a new kind of space adventure, an innovative team takes the ideas further than anyone expected. This miniseries traces how creative breakthroughs helped reshape the way blockbuster movies are made, turning “magic” into something new for audiences to see.

name: Criminal Record
description: In London, an anonymous call pulls two detectives into a tense fight over a long-ago injustice. One is early in her career and hungry to get things right, while the other is determined to safeguard his own legacy as the case forces difficult choices.

name: Beyond Paradise
description: After leaving paradise for a quieter life, a detective takes a new job in his fiancée’s hometown, only to find a surprisingly busy, high-crime environment. As they try to settle in, the cases keep escalating and make the move feel anything but calm.

name: Big Mouth
description: A low-success lawyer is pulled into a murder case and is forced to become a notorious con artist, “Big Mouse.” To stay alive and protect his family, he digs into a large conspiracy tied to powerful, privileged people.

name: Kleo
description: After the fall of the Berlin Wall, a former East German spy is determined to uncover who betrayed her and why. Once she’s free, she uses her deadly skills to pursue justice and exact revenge, all while a determined investigator keeps close track of her.

name: Yu Yu Hakusho
description: After a selfless act costs him his life, a teen delinquent is chosen as a Spirit Detective. He investigates cases tied to rogue yokai and supernatural threats, balancing danger with a growing responsibility to protect the human world.

name: Another Self
description: Three friends arrive in a seaside town and form a close bond with their inner selves. As they dig into family history, they encounter unresolved emotional pain passed down from earlier generations, pushing them toward healing.

name: Anne Rice's Mayfair Witches
description: An intuitive young neurosurgeon discovers she’s the unlikely heir to a family of witches. As she grapples with dangerous new powers, she faces a sinister presence tied to her family for generations.

name: The Company You Keep
description: A night of passion sparks a romance between a con man and an undercover intelligence officer, but their jobs keep pulling them toward the same dangerous target. As the con man tries to step away from the family business, the officer closes in, forcing both to face the lies behind their lives and protect their families.

name: Little Women
description: Three sisters, strapped for cash and relying on each other, become entangled in a conspiracy tied to the rich and powerful. A sudden discovery involving a huge sum of money pulls them into a tense mystery that tests their loyalties.

name: The Woman in the Wall
description: After waking to find a corpse in her home, a woman grapples with whether she’s responsible, while her long history of extreme sleepwalking complicates everything. Her investigation pulls in Ireland’s Magdalene Laundries and the lasting impact of abuse, alongside a murder inquiry.

name: House of Ninjas
description: Years after stepping away from their ninja lives, a dysfunctional family is pulled back into shadowy missions when dangerous threats start closing in. Forced to rely on old skills and strained teamwork, they must deal with escalating danger while trying to hold on to a normal life.

name: Bocchi the Rock!
description: A shy high schooler who feels awkward and lonely dreams of joining a band, even as her doubts hold her back. When she’s recruited to become the guitarist for a group aiming to make it big, she starts to believe her dream can come true.

name: Golden Boy
description: In Istanbul, a wealthy playboy’s grandfather arranges a marriage, but his plans get disrupted when he falls for the younger sister of his intended bride. Their families clash as secrets and constant conflict pull relationships in different directions.

name: The Swarm
description: Strange events linked to the ocean begin unsettling people around the world. A team of scientists heads into the Arctic to face a dangerous intelligent force that threatens humanity, leading them into a tense struggle filled with uncertainty, global stakes, and difficult choices.

name: Interior Chinatown
description: Trapped in a police-procedural world, a background character tries to get into the larger story and discovers secrets about his strange surroundings and his family’s buried history. As he pushes for belonging, the show turns the whole setup into a satirical puzzle about identity and representation.

name: Parasyte: The Grey
description: Unidentified parasites invade human hosts and quickly gain power, turning everyday life into a fight for survival. As the threat spreads, people and a task force struggle to contain it while the world adapts to a new, dangerous reality.

name: Shahmaran
description: A lonely young woman searches for connection and discovers a soulmate linked to an ancient legend. As her investigation deepens, she is pulled into a mysterious world of mythology, mysticism, and suspense.

name: Found
description: A former missing person now leads a crisis management team that searches for people the system often overlooks. As the team works each case, they rely on their own painful experiences to help families and bring answers, while their leader keeps a troubling secret hidden from everyone.

name: Animal Control
description: Animal Control follows a local crew of animal control workers as their day-to-day routines collide with the tricky differences between animals and humans. Led by an opinionated officer with a deep understanding of animals, the team’s work drives fast, workplace-style misadventures that keep complications coming.

name: Not Dead Yet
description: Newly single and broke, Nell Serrano tries to rebuild her life and career after stepping away years ago. When she can only find work writing obituaries, she begins receiving unexpected life advice from a dead source.

name: Alpha Males
description: Four friends try to adjust as a new social reality reshapes expectations around gender and relationships. With their personalities colliding, each one fumbles through the shift in their own way, turning everyday tensions into comedic challenges.

name: Heavenly Delusion
description: In 2024, a collapsed world leaves Japan in ruins as monsters threaten the few survivors. An odd-job girl takes on a mysterious request to bring a boy to a place called “Heaven,” where he believes someone there looks exactly like him.

name: The Traitors UK
description: Strangers compete in a high-stakes game of detection, betrayal, and trust for a prize of up to £120,000. Hidden among them are three Traitors who secretly remove one player each night, forcing the rest to banish them before they are next.

name: The Traitors
description: In an ancient Scottish castle, reality stars and famous faces are drawn into a high-stakes murder-mystery game. As teams tackle missions to grow a prize fund, some players secretly work to eliminate others and claim it for themselves.

name: The Days
description: Blamed by some and hailed as heroes by others, those involved with Fukushima Daiichi confront a deadly, invisible threat. This miniseries dramatizes the unprecedented nuclear disaster as difficult decisions and frantic efforts unfold under extreme pressure.

name: Crash Course in Romance
description: This series explores the complicated world of private cram schools and the heavy pressure families place on students. A banchan shop owner whose daughter prepares for Korea’s college entrance exams becomes involved with a top instructor, bringing bittersweet feelings and challenging family dynamics to the forefront.

name: The Irrational
description: A world-renowned behavioral psychology professor applies his unique insight to high-stakes cases involving governments, corporations, and law enforcement. His carefully built approach is shaken when he encounters a domestic terror suspect who challenges his assumptions and turns his world upside down.

name: Bupkis
description: Pete Davidson tries to sort out his unique family situation while juggling the pressures and complications of fame. As he searches for genuine connection, the show blends heartfelt moments with comedic missteps and personal reflection.

name: Doona!
description: A college student tries to balance school and daily life while living with a former K-pop sensation in a shared house. As their worlds collide, their close proximity sparks romance, comedy, and growing emotional connection.

name: Physical: 100
description: One hundred contestants in top physical shape face grueling challenges for the chance to be the last one standing and win a cash reward. The competition tests endurance, strength, and other abilities across a variety of tough tasks.

name: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten
description: Amane lives alone in an apartment next door to the most beautiful girl at school. After he helps her on a rainy day, she returns the favour with help around the house, and their growing closeness turns into a gentle, slow-building romance.

name: A Time Called You
description: A grieving woman magically travels back to 1998, where she encounters a man who looks uncannily like her late love. As she tries to navigate this new time period, her emotional journey blends romance with mystery and keeps her facing hard choices.

name: The Dangers in My Heart
description: A shy student who feels socially left out secretly imagines himself as the lead in a psychological thriller, while he secretly fixates on the school idol and plots to disrupt classmates’ peace. As his obsession clashes with real life, their odd dynamic turns into something unexpectedly sweet and developmental.

name: Full Swing
description: This immersive documentary series follows a diverse group of professional golfers through a relentless season of competition, both on and off the course. Along the way, it looks at what drives them in tournaments and how their lives intersect with the pressure of performing at the highest level.

name: Love to Hate You
description: A brash attorney who hates losing and an A-list actor who distrusts women are forced into dating each other. Their rivalry turns awkward and funny as they confront what they believe about love and relationships, with changing feelings along the way.

name: Mask Girl
description: An office worker who feels insecure about her looks hides behind a mask to become an internet personality. But a run of bad events swallows her life and forces the fallout to spread far beyond her public persona.

name: The Law According to Lidia Poët
description: Set in late 19th-century Turin, a determined young woman fights to be enrolled in the official register of lawyers, a profession closed to men. Denied entry, she refuses to give up and pushes onward toward becoming the first female lawyer in Italy.

name: Drops of God
description: After the death of a major wine figure, his estranged daughter learns his collection is now hers. Before she can claim her inheritance, she must prove her skills by facing his protégé in a high-pressure contest of senses.

name: Boiling Point
description: Eight months after her mentor has a heart attack, a head chef tries to build a reputation for her London restaurant while leading her familiar kitchen crew. Under constant pressure to keep diners coming and finances stable, they juggle intense work demands with complicated personal lives and daily quality standards.

name: The Family
description: A dark, shrewd nightclub owner from a large family is pulled into an intense relationship with a psychologist. As her presence grows, their struggles and family pressure raise the stakes and keep everything emotionally charged and gripping.

name: Unstable
description: An eccentric biotech CEO runs a high-pressure business, while his pragmatist son tries to carve out an identity beyond his shadow. Their efforts to save the company pull them into ongoing family and workplace problems that threaten to derail everything.

name: Swarm
description: Murder. Sex. Music. This is not a work of fiction.

name: My Name Is Farah
description: After witnessing a murder, a mother on the run must keep her child safe while surviving illegally in a new place. A chance encounter that same night pulls her into a dangerous world, forcing uneasy alliances and hard choices that could reshape both of their futures.

name: The Edge of Sleep
description: After a night watchman clocks out, he’s horrified to learn that everyone who went to sleep has died. With only a small group of survivors left, they must stay awake and unravel the cause of the global epidemic before their time runs out.

name: The Good Bad Mother
description: After a tragic accident, an ambitious prosecutor is left with the mind of a child, forcing him to return home and reconnect with the mother he once pushed away. As they face old pain and new challenges together, their bond slowly begins to heal.

name: The Åre Murders
description: A Stockholm detective under internal scrutiny retreats to a ski resort to unwind, but a young girl’s disappearance pulls her back into the job. As the search unfolds, the case demands renewed attention and brings fresh danger into a remote, snowy community.

name: Light Shop
description: In a mysterious shop lined with lamps, the dead may return while the living face deadly consequences. Stories unfold around strange rules of light and darkness, where surviving isn’t guaranteed for anyone who steps inside.

name: Conan O'Brien Must Go
description: A comedian travels to different countries to meet listeners he first connected with through a fan-focused podcast. Along the way, he throws himself into local activities, awkward encounters, and playful stunts that mix big laughs with occasional heartfelt moments.

name: Fake Profile
description: A woman meets her “Prince Charming” through a dating app and quickly finds herself swept into a romance that feels too good to be true. When she tries to surprise him, things go wrong and she’s pulled into a carefully managed, false sense of paradise.

name: Survival of the Thickest
description: Black, plus-size, and newly single, Mavis has to rebuild her life after putting everything into one relationship. With the help of her chosen family, she works to not just survive, but thrive as she navigates dating, work, and new beginnings.

name: Who Is Erin Carter?
description: A British woman living a quiet life in Barcelona tries to keep things under control after a supermarket robbery exposes her secret and her violent past. What starts as a disruption quickly turns into a dangerous spiral where her past won’t stay buried.

name: Until I Kill You
description: Based on an extraordinary true story, the series follows a woman who survives a near-fatal relationship and then fights to be believed. As authorities and the criminal justice system attempt to prosecute a violent perpetrator, the show depicts the long, traumatic ordeal that follows.

name: Quarterback
description: Quarterback follows three NFL quarterbacks through the highs and lows of one season, from relentless preparation to bruising setbacks. It captures the pressure of every game and the emotional toll of losses, alongside moments of pure joy when it all clicks.

name: Celebrity
description: A young woman enters Seoul’s glossy influencer scene and quickly rises through attention, ambition, and secrets. As fame brings money and status, she also runs into jealousy, scandal, and the harsh side of online popularity.

name: My Happy Marriage
description: Miyo is treated as worthless by her abusive family, but her life starts to change when she’s drawn into a marriage of her own making. With a supportive partner and growing supernatural abilities, her true self begins to emerge.

name: See You in My 19th Life
description: Ban Ji-eum can endlessly reincarnate, but her 18th life ends early. In her next life, she sets out to reconnect with her grown-up childhood love, carrying memories of past experiences while trying to shape a new future.

name: The Prince
description: After the king dies, an unlikely heir—the youngest and least favored royal son—suddenly takes the throne in the fictional Kingdom of Bongomia. His rule sparks absurd palace politics, shifting alliances, and chaotic adventures that mix sharp comedy with growing intrigue, action, and occasional risqué moments.

name: The Trauma Code: Heroes on Call
description: A battle-tested doctor arrives to build a top trauma center and pushes an underprepared hospital team to act faster, think bigger, and save more lives. The series mixes urgent medical crises, workplace clashes, and bursts of humor as the unit finds its footing.

name: If You Love
description: Leyla, a resilient orphan with an intense spirit, joins a team of con men to help fund a search for her long-lost parents. Her first meeting with a wealthy, brooding scion starts off badly, but when they’re brought back together, their differences begin to soften amid mystery and emotional turmoil.

name: Hidden Love
description: Since high school, a longtime crush has kept feelings quietly growing. When the two finally reconnect, they get a chance to try a sweet, feel-good relationship and see where it can go.

name: Welcome to Samdalri
description: After a major personal setback, a photographer returns to her hometown and reconnects with a childhood friend. Their meeting rekindles an unfinished romance as they navigate life back where it all began, balancing old feelings with new pressures and dreams.

name: Dear Child
description: A mysterious woman escapes a harrowing captivity, sending investigators down a trail tied to an unsolved disappearance from 13 years earlier. As the case comes back into focus, investigators uncover unsettling truths behind what happened and why it was never resolved.

name: The Sixth Commandment
description: This four-part miniseries dramatises a shocking true murder in a small English village, involving an influential local man and a much younger church-connected figure. It explores how trust, faith, and loneliness can be exploited, building dread around the people left to investigate and seek answers after the crime.

name: Longing for You
description: A murder shatters a quiet town, and a detective begins searching for answers after his brother is wrongly accused. As more trouble follows, he is forced to dig into the case and face family secrets in the hunt for justice.

name: Mr. Plankton
description: A man plagued by misfortune and the unluckiest bride-to-be are forced to travel together on the final journey of his life, relying on each other as their luck seems to run out. The story blends bitterness with fragile hope as their past ties collide with the road ahead.

name: Shangri-La Frontier
description: A hardcore gamer who specializes in beating broken, low-quality VR titles decides to test his skills in a top-tier virtual reality MMO. What starts as a fun challenge quickly turns into a demanding adventure filled with tough battles, clever mechanics, and hints of deeper mysteries hidden inside the game world.

name: Good Boy
description: Olympic medalists join the police force via a special recruitment program, swapping medals for badges. They use their athletic skills to pursue justice and take on violent crimes.

name: Twinkling Watermelon
description: A CODA teen with a gift for music ends up in an unfamiliar past after a mysterious visit to a music shop. There, he connects with other curious youths and forms a band, chasing answers and trying to reshape what happens next.

name: Destined with You
description: A lawyer trapped by a centuries-old curse is pulled into a relationship with a civil servant who may hold the way out. Their search for freedom brings romance, mystery, and plenty of unexpected hurdles along the way.

name: A Killer Paradox
description: After one accidental killing, an ordinary young man is pulled into an endless game of pursuit and retaliation with a sharp detective. As more violence follows, the chase turns into a tense, psychological cat-and-mouse struggle that keeps escalating.

name: World War II: From the Frontlines
description: This WWII docuseries brings the conflict to life using vividly enhanced archival footage and voices from across the war. It presents events as they unfolded, aiming to make history feel immediate and deeply human.

name: Another Love
description: A shocking murder in the woods pulls a determined young prosecutor and a high-profile journalist into the same case. As they chase answers and grow closer, the investigation begins to shake their carefully built lives and the truths they thought they knew.

name: Karma
description: After a fateful accident, six lives become tightly linked in a crime thriller built around karma and consequence. As the fallout spreads, each person is forced to confront dark truths, hidden connections, and the costs of past choices.

name: Newtopia
description: A couple breaks up by phone over misunderstandings right as a zombie outbreak upends the world. With a national emergency and a crash that traps one man atop a Seoul skyscraper, his partner searches through the danger to reach him.

name: The Devil's Plan
description: In this high-stakes competition, contestants face a nonstop series of strategy challenges where wits, brains, and alliances are constantly tested. The goal is simple: win a massive prize by outthinking opponents and navigating shifting group dynamics.

name: The Worst of Evil
description: Set in the 1980s, a husband and wife who are both detectives go undercover to infiltrate a massive criminal organization tied to an illegal drug trade connecting Korea, China, and Japan. Their operation puts them in constant danger as they work to expose the network from the inside.

name: Doctor Slump
description: Once rivals in school, two brilliant doctors reunite by chance, but both are dealing with their own worst slumps. As they navigate recovery and life pressures, they find unexpected comfort in each other and their second chance at connection.

A zany nobleman gets pulled into nonstop family feuds as he butts heads with peasants while chasing fame in Poland. Set in a mockumentary-like world, his quest turns everyday power struggles into a barrage of social clashes and absurd situations.

name: Brilliant Minds
description: A rare condition affects the lead neurologist’s ability to recognize faces, shaping his unconventional approach to patient care. With a team of young interns, he tackles perplexing psychological cases and builds a mission to change how people see and treat those in need, even as workplace relationships grow complicated.

name: The Buccaneers
description: A group of fun-loving American girls arrives in tightly corseted 1870s London, sparking an Anglo-American culture clash. Sent to secure husbands and status, their plans for fitting in quickly collide with bigger wants and complicated feelings.

name: Jurassic World: Chaos Theory
description: The Camp Cretaceous group joins forces to investigate a mystery tied to a global conspiracy involving dinosaurs. As the threat expands, their search draws danger closer—not just to the creatures, but to the group itself.

name: Trigger
description: In South Korea, illegal firearms flood in and threaten public safety. A determined cop teams up with a mysterious partner to investigate the spread and stop the chaos from taking over the nation.

name: Carol & the End of the World
description: As a planetary apocalypse looms, a middle-aged woman who’s struggling to accept the end-times chaos searches for meaning during her final months on Earth. With daily routines breaking apart around her, she looks inward and toward others as the world changes fast.

name: Terminator Zero
description: Set in an alternate 1997 Tokyo, a warrior from a post-apocalyptic future travels back to protect an AI scientist from a relentless, indestructible cyborg. With an AI at the center of the conflict, the hunt pushes the scientist and those around them into danger.

name: Wild Cards
description: A spirited con artist and a by-the-book detective are forced to team up to solve crimes. Each brings their own skills and personality to the job, turning tense situations into opportunities for redemption as they work together to uncover answers.

name: Bodkin
description: A ragtag crew of podcasters investigates mysterious disappearances from decades earlier in a charming Irish town. As they dig in, the case reveals dark, dreadful secrets and forces them to navigate a community that won’t easily talk.

name: Love Next Door
description: A woman trying to reset her life returns to Korea and finds herself pulled back into her childhood neighborhood. Reconnecting with her childhood friend turns familiar comfort into complicated feelings as they navigate romance, community life, and family pressures.

name: Fight Night: The Million Dollar Heist
description: Set on the night of a major boxing upset in 1970s Atlanta, a high-profile after-party turns chaotic when hundreds of guests are robbed at gunpoint. The incident unfolds as one of the largest armed robberies the country has ever seen.

name: Murder in a Small Town
description: Karl Alberg settles in a quiet coastal town to recover from past big-city police work, expecting a slower pace. Instead, murders keep washing up on the shore, pulling him back into the kind of skills and persistence needed to solve them.

name: The On1y One
description: After their parents get married, two high school students are forced to become stepbrothers and share the same home. What starts as constant tension slowly shifts as they learn each other, navigating school and family life along the way.

name: The Gardener
description: A mother uses her son’s emotional numbness to run contract killings. When he starts caring about his next target, their quiet cover as local gardeners begins to fracture, putting their operation and their future plans under pressure from investigators.

name: Mary & George
description: In 17th century England, a determined woman pushes her son into a dangerous scheme aimed at the court of King James I. Hoping to secure power and wealth, she orchestrates increasingly outrageous moves that blur ambition, manipulation, and passion.

name: American Nightmare
description: After a home invasion and kidnapping in 2015, a couple faces accusations that they staged what happened when the woman reappears. The ordeal escalates into a fresh wave of tortures, turning their fear into a relentless fight as questions swirl around their claims.

name: Raising Voices
description: When a 17-year-old reports a sexual assault at her high school, an investigation turns her world upside down and strains the relationships around her. As the case unfolds, the pressure grows and her life begins to change in ways she never expected.

name: NCIS: Origins
description: Set in 1991, the series follows a newly minted special agent beginning his career at a fledgling NCIS camp office. Long before later events, he builds credibility on a gritty, ragtag team, mentored by a seasoned NCIS legend.

name: Missing You
description: A detective is pulled back into a painful mystery when a dating app match appears to be the fiancé who vanished years earlier. As old questions resurface, a missing-persons case and buried family history push the past into the present.

name: Ninja Kamui
description: A team of assassins targets a former ninja who escaped his clan and the people around him. Believed dead, he re-emerges as his old self to avenge his family and friends and bring down the clan that betrayed him.

name: Quiet on Set: The Dark Side of Kids TV
description: Quiet on Set: The Dark Side of Kids TV reveals a toxic, abusive environment behind 1990s kids TV, told through firsthand accounts from former child stars and crew. It examines how power worked in the industry and how the damage can linger long after the cameras stop.

name: Mahsun J
description: In Istanbul, a debt-ridden motorcycle courier searches for a way out and stumbles into an unexpected new line of work as a gigolo. With a friend acting as his manager, he navigates absurd jobs, awkward encounters, and the daily pressures of getting by, mixing big laughs with a sharp look at life on the edge.

name: Red Eye
description: London police officer DC Hana Li escorts a doctor back to Beijing after he’s accused of a crime. But on the return flight, she gets pulled into an escalating conspiracy as a growing string of murders threatens to turn the trip into a deadly mystery.

name: Teacup
description: A mysterious event traps people on a rural Georgia farm, cutting off escape and forcing them to unite against an unknown, deadly threat. As fear grows, a young boy becomes central to piecing together what’s really happening.

name: Wind Breaker
description: At a rough high school where strength rules, a group of delinquent students protect their town like an unofficial neighborhood watch. When a victory-obsessed newcomer arrives, shifting alliances and rivalries test their code, friendships, and what it really means to stand up for others.

name: Sentenced to Be a Hero
description: In a grim world where heroism is a punishment, a condemned fighter is forced to battle endless monstrous threats as part of a penal unit, with death offering no true escape. When they encounter a mysterious new goddess, their uneasy alliance sparks rebellion against the cycle of eternal combat.

name: Earth Abides
description: A fast, deadly plague wipes out nearly everyone. In the aftermath, a handful of survivors struggle as the routines and systems of civilization slowly fall apart, leaving them to confront extinction while trying to keep living and adapting.

name: St. Denis Medical
description: In an underfunded Oregon hospital, a mismatched team of doctors and nurses tries to care for patients while juggling workplace chaos, clashing personalities, and everyday stress. It’s a light workplace comedy built around the messy balance between professional duty and personal dynamics.

name: Murder Mindfully
description: A mafia lawyer joins a mindfulness class to find a healthier work-life balance, only to discover coping strategies that take on a darker edge. As his calm practices collide with criminal pressure, mindfulness becomes part of how he handles dangerous situations.

name: Geek Girl
description: Awkward teen Harriet dreams of fitting in until she’s unexpectedly scouted by a top London modeling agent. As she steps into the fashion world, she learns that standing out can be its own kind of power, alongside laughs and growth through social challenges.

name: Dream Productions
description: Growing up means Riley’s memories need extra help, and the Core Emotions route them to Dream Productions. Inside a dream-making “studio,” the team keeps things running while challenges and rising stakes test their approach.

name: Worst Ex Ever
description: This true-crime docuseries explores relationships that turn frightening and destructive, using firsthand accounts to trace betrayals, abuse, and deadly threats. Each episode focuses on how warning signs were missed, how victims tried to get help, and how the fallout kept escalating.

name: Friendly Rivalry
description: A high-teen mystery thriller follows two teenage girls whose close bond grows in a harsher survival-style competition tied to school pressure. As their relationship deepens, tension and danger rise, blending suspense with a darker edge.

name: Olympo
description: After a swimmer collapses at a high-performance sports center, an investigator starts probing the extreme risks athletes may be taking to chase their ambitions. As the inquiry unfolds, the pressure, rivalry, and hidden choices around the academy begin to come into focus.

name: The War Between the Land and the Sea
description: When an ancient, ocean-dwelling species reveals itself to humanity, a fast-moving global crisis erupts. With lives in danger, an international organization steps in as tensions escalate and land and sea appear to go to war.

name: Hysteria!
description: In late 1980s small-town America, a beloved varsity quarterback vanishes amid “Satanic Panic” rumors, and a struggling heavy metal band of outcasts leans into the occult buzz to get noticed. But when murders, kidnappings, and reported supernatural activity erupt, a frantic witch hunt turns its focus back on them.

name: Tempest
description: A top diplomat and a secret international agent team up to uncover the truth behind an attack that could shake stability on the Korean peninsula. As political tension rises, their race for answers pulls them deeper into a dangerous, high-stakes situation.

name: Into the Fire: The Lost Daughter
description: A tenacious mother begins to unravel the mystery of her daughter’s disappearance in 1989, the child she had placed for adoption. As she pushes to understand what happened, the story explores the long, complicated aftermath and the search for truth.

name: Under Salt Marsh
description: Morfa Halen, a Welsh town hemmed in by mountains and an advancing sea, faces growing danger as a once-in-a-generation storm gathers offshore. When a former detective turned teacher finds an 8-year-old pupil seemingly drowned, the case stirs up memories of another missing child that once shattered the community.

name: Secrets We Keep
description: When a neighbor’s au pair vanishes in an affluent Copenhagen suburb, a woman driven by answers starts digging. As her search continues, she finds unsettling secrets that pull apart the calm, polished life around her.

name: The Asset
description: A young agent goes undercover by getting close to a drug smuggler’s partner, hoping to gather information that can bring a criminal network down. As trust builds, the operation turns into a tense balancing act between duty, deception, and personal consequences that threaten to blur every line.

name: The Journey of Legend
description: A martial arts novel enthusiast is swept into a fictional martial arts world, taking on the role of the story’s protagonist. As the journey unfolds, he grows from a passionate youth into a noble hero.

name: Riot Women
description: Five women and two backing singers form a makeshift punk-rock band to enter a local talent contest. But as they write their first original song, they realize they have a lot to say—and this is how they say it.

name: To Be Hero X
description: In a world where heroes’ powers depend on fan trust, trust is gathered, measured, and shown on a wrist ranking. Every two years, the top heroes enter a tournament to fight, reset trust values, and compete for their place.

name: Orb: On the Movements of the Earth
description: After being exposed to forbidden teachings about how the Earth and the Sun work, a curious young scholar searches for his mentor’s concealed research. He must keep moving while the Inquisition tightens its grip on belief and knowledge.

name: Grand Army
description: Five students at a major Brooklyn public high school face a chaotic mix of school pressure, survival, and personal change. As they try to succeed, break free, and seize the future, their lives collide with intense real-world hardship and big emotional stakes.

name: Man vs. Bee
description: While house-sitting a luxurious mansion, a well-meaning but clumsy dad becomes fixated on outsmarting a stubborn bee. What starts as a small annoyance quickly spirals into a string of escalating mishaps, as every attempted solution makes the situation messier and more stressful.

name: The Consultant
description: After an unspeakable tragedy at a downtown Los Angeles games studio, a mysterious consultant arrives and quickly takes charge. As decisions start to ripple through the workplace, control and trust are put to the test.

name: The Art of Sarah
description: A body is found in the middle of town, and a rising luxe brand draws even more attention. A detective digs into a woman’s shifting story, stitching together accounts from different people to uncover what really happened.

name: Unfamiliar
description: Two former spies are forced to confront their past when it resurfaces in their safe setting, turning ordinary life into a pressure-filled test. As pursuit closes in, their real challenge becomes deciding how much truth to share with each other while staying alive.

name: The Glass Dome
description: When her friend's daughter goes missing, a criminologist joins the search and is drawn into a case that echoes the haunting trauma of her own childhood abduction. As tensions rise, the investigation forces her to revisit painful memories while trying to find who is behind the disappearances.

name: City of Shadows
description: In La Pedrera–Casa Milà, a burned body is discovered on the facade of Gaudí’s iconic building, sparking a brutal investigation. Back in Barcelona after prior trouble, an inspector teams up with a sharp sub-inspector to track down those behind the crime.

name: The Summer Hikaru Died
description: Six months after his disappearance, a boy returns, but his best friend senses something is deeply wrong. Their confrontation opens the door to a terrifying mystery tied to the change that has followed the vanishing.

name: Witch Hat Atelier
description: In a world where only witches can cast magic, they must keep their powers hidden from ordinary people. A shy apprentice-in-training starts studying after a newcomer reveals a major secret, facing despair while searching for hope and belonging.

name: Top Form
description: A celebrated veteran actor is shaken when a rising star takes his long-held spotlight. As their professional rivalry heats up, private admiration and complicated feelings blur the line between competition and connection, forcing both to face pressure, pride, and what they truly want.

name: Boyfriend on Demand
description: A work-stressed woman puts love on the back burner until a virtual dating service stirs up unexpected feelings. As her rented romance experience blurs the lines between fantasy and reality, she may get a real shot at connection.

name: The Jewel of Section E
description: A new student in a chaotic high-school section gets targeted by rowdy classmates determined to push her out. Branded as their “Mutya,” she keeps fighting back with wit and charm, while unexpected friendships and misunderstandings spark sweeter moments amid the mayhem.

name: Secret Service
description: A British intelligence officer races against time to investigate a UK politician’s potential links to the Kremlin. As a murder and an election draw near, her mission puts her reputation and family under mounting pressure.

name: Radioactive Emergency
description: A team of specialists confronts a large radiological disaster, working under intense pressure to limit the danger and protect thousands of people. The story focuses on urgent response, public risk, and the human effort behind a crisis.

name: Believe Me
description: This TV series tells the horrific true story of one of Britain’s most notorious serial rapists. It follows how he lured women with promises of money and champagne, then drugged them until they became unconscious, leading to convictions for multiple assaults.

name: RJ Decker
description: In South Florida, an ex-con photographer reinvents himself as a private investigator, taking on oddball cases with help from people close to law, media, and his complicated past. The show mixes mystery, humor, and local weirdness with a laid-back detective vibe.

name: Gone
description: When a headmaster’s wife goes missing, suspicion turns toward him, casting doubt on what he’s keeping to himself. As the investigation unfolds, the case grows increasingly complicated, raising the question of whether there’s more going on than it first appears.

name: Prisoner
description: A young, ambitious prison officer is pulled into a power struggle as crime lords work to escape justice. To keep up, she must rapidly trust someone from the very world she came to stop.

name: Should I Marry a Murderer?
description: In this documentary series, a woman stays engaged to a man accused of murder while secretly helping build a case against him. As she becomes a key witness, the story follows the risks and pressure of remaining close to someone under suspicion.

name: Dispatch
description: A dysfunctional superhero team faces emergencies, office politics, and personal drama in a workplace comedy built around choices. The story follows the pressure of keeping a chaotic team together while trying to live up to the idea of being a hero.

name: The Nightmare Upstairs: What Happened to Ty and Bryn?
description: When allegations of abuse fracture a Utah family, a bitter custody battle erupts. After a controversial reunification program is ordered, two children barricade themselves in a bedroom for 54 days, livestream their protest, and spark a national viral reckoning.

name: Gameoverse
description: Gameoverse is an animated series about VIDEO GAME WORLDS!!!... Horrifically exploding. And saving them means helping the bad guy stop the good guy or everyone dies.

name: Hightown
description: A body washes ashore on Cape Cod amid the drug trade, and a blunt National Marine Fisheries Service officer jumps in to help solve the murder. She pushes for answers even as state cops try to keep her away from the case.

name: Made for Love
description: Thirty-something Hazel Green tries to escape a suffocating marriage, only to discover her tech billionaire husband has implanted a revolutionary tracking device in her brain. As she wrestles with control and consent, she seeks freedom in a world that feels tightly monitored.

name: Breeders
description: This comedy digs into the emotional tug-of-war of parenthood: in the same moment, love can feel limitless while frustration boils over fast. It turns daily struggles into a sharp look at what families go through when patience is stretched thin.

name: Kevin Can F**k Himself
description: The series follows a woman who feels trapped in the role of a sitcom wife, imagining what her world looks like when she escapes the boundaries around her. It blends grounded realism with over-the-top sitcom moments that clash to reshape everyday life.

name: American Rust
description: In a Pennsylvania Rust Belt town, a weary chief of police navigates a family drama shaped by tense loyalties and hard compromises. As everyday lives collide with a troubling case, the story unfolds through the choices of people who are trying to get through it.

name: Debris
description: Two federal agents from different continents and very different approaches team up to investigate wreckage from a destroyed alien spacecraft. As fragments fall to Earth, each piece triggers strange, sometimes unsettling effects on people, turning their cases into a growing mystery with bigger implications.

name: The Mighty Ducks: Game Changers
description: A youth hockey powerhouse has become obsessed with winning, and a 12-year-old is cut without much compassion. He and his mom decide to start a new team of misfits, aiming to bring back the fun of the game while pushing back against the pressure-cooker culture of competitive youth sports.

name: Alaska Daily
description: A career journalist heads to Alaska for a fresh start after a serious professional setback. Settling into a daily metro newspaper in Anchorage, she works her way toward redemption while tackling urgent local stories and rebuilding her life.

name: Small Axe
description: Small Axe is an anthology miniseries of five stories following the lives of friends and their families in London’s West Indian community from the late 1960s to the early 80s. Each episode stands alone while sharing themes of community, protest, and resilience.

name: Uzumaki
description: In the cursed town of Kurouzu-cho, a spiral obsession spreads among the residents, driven by something unexplained. As the strange pull tightens, one young woman tries to break free and escape the town’s unsettling reality-bending effects.

name: Masters of the Universe: Revelation
description: The war for Eternia reignites in what feels like a make-or-break battle, as the struggle between He-Man and Skeletor escalates once again. The animated series returns with a high-stakes, final-fight energy, bringing fresh momentum to the ongoing fight for Eternia.

name: The Murders at White House Farm
description: The Murders at White House Farm is a factual drama rooted in the White House Farm murders, following the police investigation and court case that followed. It presents the events as they were pursued through inquiry and trial, emphasizing the aftermath and the legal process.

name: Freud
description: In 19th-century Vienna, an ambitious young psychiatrist teams up with a psychic and an inspector to investigate brutal mysteries. The cases blend drama, horror, and psychological questions as they dig into what’s really happening.

name: Unorthodox
description: A Hasidic Jewish woman in Brooklyn flees an arranged marriage and travels to Berlin. There, she is taken in by a group of musicians, but her past resurfaces and demands attention.

name: The Trials of Gabriel Fernandez
description: This true-crime miniseries examines the aftermath of a child's brutal death, following public trials and the broader failures raised by the case. It focuses on how institutions respond when vulnerable children need protection.

name: The Comey Rule
description: This two-part biopic recounts turbulent events around the 2016 presidential election and its aftermath, showing how two powerful figures came into conflict. Told in an immersive, behind-the-headlines style, it explores clashing approaches to ethics, loyalty, and duty.

name: Down to Earth with Zac Efron
description: In this travel series, Zac Efron teams up with a wellness expert to explore healthy, sustainable ways to live around the world. Each stop focuses on practical routines and mindful choices inspired by local culture.

name: We Are Who We Are
description: Two American kids who live on a U.S. military base in Italy explore friendship, first love, identity, and all the messy exhilaration and anguish of being a teenager.

name: Challenger: The Final Flight
description: Engineers, officials, and crew members’ families revisit the 1986 Space Shuttle Challenger disaster and what followed in its wake. The series shares multiple perspectives on the events leading up to the tragedy and the lasting impact on the people around the mission.

name: Brand New Cherry Flavor
description: In early-’90s Hollywood, a filmmaker chasing her big break spirals into a surreal world where sex, magic, and revenge collide. What begins as a movie-making mission turns into a darker, stranger journey filled with disturbing twists and unexpected kittens.

name: The Billion Dollar Code
description: In 1990s Berlin, two innovators create a groundbreaking way to explore the world through technology. Years later, they reconnect and take on a major company in a high-stakes patent fight, revisiting old ambitions, setbacks, and the cost of big ideas.

name: Stay Close
description: Seventeen years after one person disappears on the same night as another, the vanishing sets off a chain reaction for others whose lives overlap. As connections tighten, multiple threads of the past and present begin to collide.

name: Landscapers
description: A British couple becomes the focus of a major police investigation after two bodies are found in the garden of a house in Nottingham. The story follows the case and the couple’s unusual inner world, mixing crime drama with a strange, emotional tone.

name: Sherwood
description: Old grudges and new rivalries collide in a fractured Nottinghamshire mining community. Murder and revenge intertwine, driving a powerful drama through escalating tensions.

name: The Santa Clauses
description: After decades as Santa Claus, Scott Calvin’s magic begins to falter. As he scrambles to meet the job’s demands, he discovers a new clause that changes how he views his role—and his responsibilities as a father.

name: We Own This City
description: We Own This City follows the rise and fall of a Baltimore police unit focused on gun traces, amid corruption and moral breakdown. The series examines how harsh policies can undermine genuine police work in an embattled American city.

name: Pistol
description: This TV miniseries follows a group of unruly, working-class kids who form a notorious punk band and shake up the corrupt establishment around them. As their rise builds momentum, their fame collides with dangerous choices and escalating chaos that leaves lasting impact on music and culture.

name: Inside Man
description: A death-row prisoner in the US, a vicar in a quiet English town, and a maths teacher trapped in a cellar cross paths in a surprising way. Their stories collide as the show builds a tense, unexpected crime thriller around fate, fear, and consequences.

name: Candy
description: A 1980s housewife and mother tries to keep up appearances, but mounting pressure and personal restlessness push her toward choices that have shocking consequences. When she’s told to stay quiet, the situation spirals out of control in a way no one can ignore.

name: Conversations with a Killer: The John Wayne Gacy Tapes
description: He dined with the powerful and preyed on the vulnerable, all while presenting a smiling exterior. The series explores the horrifying reality behind a sadistic serial killer through chilling accounts and disturbing material.

name: Three-Body
description: A nanotechnology researcher is pulled into a police investigation after a wave of scientists dies under mysterious circumstances. Recruited to infiltrate an organization, he’s introduced to an advanced VR “game” that quickly feels far more real than entertainment, expanding the mystery beyond any single case.

name: The Sympathizer
description: Near the end of the Vietnam War, a spy embedded in the South Vietnamese army flees to the United States. In a refugee community, he continues gathering intelligence and sending reports back to the Viet Cong, while navigating life in exile.

name: Trainwreck: Woodstock '99
description: A nostalgic attempt to revive a legendary music festival turns into a tense account of heat, crowd frustration, poor planning, and escalating disorder. This miniseries looks at how high expectations, commercial pressure, and basic safety failures helped push a massive event into chaos.

name: Conversations with a Killer: The Jeffrey Dahmer Tapes
description: Serial killer Jeffrey Dahmer confesses to his gruesome crimes in unguarded interviews, offering an unsettling view into a disturbed mind. The miniseries presents disturbing first-person accounts that feel chillingly direct and close-up.

name: Black Snow
description: In a small town marked by grief, a detective pushes to solve unsolved murders and cold cases while coping with the pain of not knowing what happened to his missing younger brother. As the investigations unfold, past and present pressures collide, revealing how the community endures unresolved loss.

name: Senna
description: Born in Brazil and obsessed with cars from childhood, Ayrton Senna rises to become a defining force in Formula 1. The miniseries traces his career, rivalries, and the intense pressure around the sport, building toward the moments that helped reshape racing worldwide.

name: Asterix & Obelix: The Big Fight
description: Asterix and Obelix face trouble when their druid forgets how to prepare the magic potion, leaving their village vulnerable. As Caesar looks for an opening, the pair must defend their home and keep chaos from taking over.

name: Maestro
description: A musician heads to lead a festival on a scenic island, where an unexpected romance begins to take hold. As the event unfolds, he becomes pulled into the personal troubles of those around him.

name: The Snow Girl
description: When a young girl disappears in Málaga, a trainee journalist becomes determined to uncover the truth, pressing for closure for the family. Years later, a VHS tape reignites the case and pushes the investigation forward, even as police progress stalls and new clues emerge.

name: Tiny Beautiful Things
description: A floundering writer takes on a revered advice role as her own life unravels. The story moves between her present struggles and earlier memories, exploring grief and complicated relationships as she tries to make sense of who she’s become.

name: Class of '09
description: Class of '09 follows a class of FBI recruits as they face massive shifts in the criminal justice system shaped by artificial intelligence. The story unfolds across three time periods, showing training and rising stakes as AI begins changing how cases are handled.

name: Apples Never Fall
description: The Delaneys look like a happily settled family after selling their tennis academy and starting their golden years. Then the mother disappears, forcing the household to revisit their relationships, memories, and family history with new, unsettling questions.

name: American Manhunt: The Boston Marathon Bombing
description: This three-part series blends archive footage, dramatic reenactments, and exclusive interviews to explore a tragedy that shook a city. It follows the lead-up, the attack, and the tense investigations afterward, with attention on two brothers and how the aftermath rippled through families and communities.

name: Queen Cleopatra
description: This docuseries explores Cleopatra’s struggle to protect her throne, family, and legacy in the final years of ancient Egypt. It blends reenactments with expert interviews to show her world, her court, and the pressures surrounding her rule.

name: A Nearly Normal Family
description: A seemingly perfect family is rocked by a shocking murder, forcing them to confront just how far they’ll go to protect one another. As tensions rise, secrets and uneasy truths surface, turning a close-knit home into a gripping suspenseful struggle.

name: A Shop for Killers
description: A young woman inherits a dark web weapons shop after her uncle’s sudden death, forcing her to confront new truths about her past. Raised under his control at a shopping-mall front, she must navigate a dangerous world of assassins, mercenaries, and old memories.

name: The Madness
description: After a media pundit discovers a dead body in the Poconos woods, he quickly finds himself blamed for a murder tied to a notorious white supremacist. With danger closing in, he must fight to clear his name while uncovering what really happened.

name: The Breakthrough
description: When a double homicide remains unsolved for 16 years, a detective teams up with a genealogist to track down the killer. Spanning years of grief and investigation, the search builds toward a solution before the case can slip fully into the past.

name: Stargirl
description: Courtney, a kind and athletic teen, learns her step-father has a secret past as the sidekick to a superhero. After discovering a cosmic staff tied to a long-lost hero, she steps into the role of an unlikely inspiration for a new generation of superheroes.

name: The Underground Railroad
description: Young Cora flees a Georgia plantation in a desperate bid for freedom. What begins as a rumor about an Underground Railroad becomes an actual underground railroad with its own engineers, conductors, tracks, and tunnels, as she travels through a dangerous, shifting landscape.

name: Belgravia
description: Belgravia is a secrets-and-scandals period drama set in 1840s London. After a family accepts an invitation to a legendary ball tied to the Battle of Waterloo, a chain of revelations unfolds behind grand doors with consequences lasting for decades.

name: The New Pope
description: As Pope Pius XIII lies in a coma between life and death, a charming, sophisticated English aristocrat is placed on the papal throne and takes a new name. Set in the aftermath, the series explores the challenges and responsibilities that come with the role.

name: Utopia
description: A group of young adults who connect online become the target of a shadowy deep state organization after they obtain a near-mythical cult underground graphic novel. As danger closes in, they are pulled into unraveling the mystery tied to the book’s hidden meaning.

name: Tell Me Your Secrets
description: This complex thriller follows three intertwined lives shaped by painful histories. A young woman is tied to a dangerous past, a man seeks redemption after a dark reputation, and a grieving mother races to find her missing daughter—driving tense, shifting motives as secrets collide.

name: Avenue 5
description: 40 years in the future, a luxury space cruise is thrown off course after technical difficulties, leaving its crew to deal with disgruntled passengers and unexpected problems onboard. As tensions rise, they scramble to keep the journey moving despite constant disruptions.

name: Brave New World
description: In a “perfect” society where monogamy and privacy are tightly controlled, people start to question the rules that keep everything running. As forbidden feelings grow, the carefully managed world faces unrest and a fight for change.

name: Tales from the Loop
description: Set above a vast machine called “The Loop,” this series explores how a scientific breakthrough can affect the lives of the people in a small town. As mysteries of the universe unfold, the show connects the wonder of sci-fi with everyday human emotion.

name: James May: Our Man in...
description: James May travels across Japan, moving from the chilly north to the warmer south. Along the way, he visits sights, meets locals, and digs into local food to better understand the country’s culture.

name: Transplant
