description: A Syrian doctor flees his country and starts over in Canada with his younger sister, while chasing a hard-won chance to work in an emergency department in Toronto. Faced with a new hospital environment, he brings battle-tested emergency skills as he navigates professional pressure and personal survival.

name: Girls5eva
description: When a ’90s girl group with a single hit is rediscovered through a new rap sample, its members reunite to chase pop stardom again. Despite juggling adulthood—families, work, money troubles, and aches—they wonder if the dream can still be theirs.

name: Valeria
description: A writer navigating a creative and relationship crisis turns to her three closest friends for comfort and support. Their bond helps keep life and love moving as she searches for her next step, drawing on the novels by Elisabet Benavent.

name: Tower of God
description: Climb the tower to claim everything it promises, where even becoming a god feels possible. The journey follows a determined girl seeking the world above and a boy drawn to her, starting a battle of ambition, mystery, and hard choices as secrets unfold.

name: Control Z
description: A hacker targets students by exposing their secrets to an entire high school. Observant and socially isolated, Sofia tries to uncover the hacker’s identity while navigating the fallout across campus.

name: Clarice
description: Set months after a traumatic case, a young FBI agent returns to active duty to hunt violent offenders while dealing with lingering trauma and the pressure of politics in Washington. The series blends weekly investigations with a broader web of intrigue inside and around the bureau.

name: A Teacher
description: A young high school teacher at a suburban Texas school starts an affair with a student, and the relationship intensifies quickly. As it spirals, the damage it causes becomes harder to ignore, bringing uncomfortable consequences and mounting pressure.

name: Around the World in 80 Days
description: After an outrageous bet, a man and his loyal companion set off to circumnavigate the globe in just 80 days. The trip is soon joined by an aspiring journalist who wants to report on this extraordinary journey.

name: Flower of Evil
description: A man keeps up the perfect-husband facade while hiding a disturbing past. Things turn tense when his detective wife starts investigating a string of murders, forcing their relationship to collide with dangerous secrets.

name: The God of High School
description: A self-proclaimed strongest high schooler is pulled into a tournament where winning grants any wish. Powerful contenders clash for personal motives, setting up a wild run of intense fights between high school competitors.

name: Paper Girls
description: The day after Halloween in 1988, four young friends accidentally get pulled into an intergalactic conflict and find themselves transported to 2019. Facing their adult selves, they work together to discover what they’re capable of and look for a way back, while trying to protect the future.

name: To Your Eternity
description: An immortal being takes on the form of a human boy and wanders across the world, learning what life means through ongoing experiences of pain and joy. With no end to his story, each meeting shapes how he understands purpose, death, and what people choose to give up.

name: Aunty Donna's Big Ol' House of Fun
description: Aunty Donna’s Big Ol’ House of Fun is a TV sketch series led by a comedy trio delivering wildly absurd material through skits, songs, and a stream of eclectic characters. The episodes bounce from goofball moments to straight-up weird situations, staying energetic and unpredictable.

name: Pacific Rim: The Black
description: Two siblings—an idealistic teen and his younger sister—are forced to pilot an abandoned Jaeger while traversing a hostile, post-apocalyptic landscape. Their mission is a desperate search for their missing parents, pushing them into danger at every turn.

name: Paranormal
description: Set in the 1960s, Paranormal follows a hematology professor as he tackles strange supernatural incidents. With help from a Scottish old flame, he investigates eerie mysteries that disrupt everyday life with mounting tension and doubt.

name: The Frog
description: A man plots a robbery against a former classmate who has become a mysterious, wealthy figure. What starts as a seemingly simple plan quickly pulls him into a brutal journey shaped by power, danger, and choices that spiral beyond his control.

name: The Way of the Househusband
description: After disappearing from the underworld, a legendary yakuza known as the “Immortal Dragon” comes back—only now he’s a devoted stay-at-home husband. Trading street life for daily routines, he tackles home challenges with surprising intensity and comedy.

name: Ranking of Kings
description: In a world where kings are ranked, a kind, hearing-impaired prince sets out to become powerful enough to claim his place. Though he faces unfair odds and struggles to connect, he forms unexpected bonds that help drive his journey forward.

name: Home Economics
description: Home Economics follows three adult siblings whose vastly different lives create a warm yet awkward family dynamic. As one sibling thrives while another struggles and the third lands in the middle, their relationships are tested in everyday moments.

name: Snabba Cash
description: An ambitious businesswoman, a charming gang enforcer, and a troubled teen have their lives collide in a high-stakes hunt for money. As wealth becomes the goal, the chase grows desperate and sinister, pulling everyone deeper into the same dangerous world.

name: Doom at Your Service
description: A woman facing a limited time to live and a man with the power to bring the world to an end form an unexpected bond. Together, they explore what life, love, and meaning can be when time is running out.

name: The Wilds
description: A group of teen girls from different backgrounds must fight for survival after a plane crash strands them on a deserted island. As they clash and bond, they uncover the secrets and traumas behind their pasts—revealing they may not be there by accident.

name: Whitstable Pearl
description: A single mother, once focused on her family, starts her own private detective agency from her family’s restaurant in the coastal town of Whitstable. As locals bring in cases, a suspicious death pulls her into tension with a new, hard-edged cop.

name: Professor T
description: Professor Jasper Tempest is a brilliant Cambridge criminologist whose OCD and complicated home life make him a distinctive adviser to the police. Set in Britain, this is the British take on the Belgian crime drama of the same name.

name: Don't Hug Me I'm Scared
description: Three puppet friends keep learning new things with the help of cheerful talking objects in a comedy-horror series based on the popular web videos. It mixes playful lessons, strange humor, and unsettling moments as the trio move through odd situations and increasingly surreal experiences.

name: The Newsreader
description: In a newsroom where change is brewing, a famous newsreader and an ambitious reporter form an unconventional partnership. Set in 1986, their collaboration pulls them into fast-moving events that reshape their lives and the world around them.

name: Annika
description: DI Annika Strandhed leads a new specialist Marine Homicide Unit, taking on murders that feel brutal, unexplained, and difficult to make sense of. As the team investigates, the series leans into sharp, witty instincts alongside the pressure of high-stakes cases at sea.

name: True Story
description: A world-famous comedian tries to find a way out after a chaotic night in Philadelphia with his brother turns into a serious threat to his future. As the fallout grows, he scrambles to protect both his success and his freedom.

name: One of Us Is Lying
description: When five high schoolers end up in detention, a deadly situation leaves only four to make it out. Everyone left behind is treated as a suspect, and each person has secrets that complicate the search for what really happened.

name: Billy the Kid
description: An epic romantic adventure TV series that traces the life of a notorious American outlaw, beginning with his humble Irish roots and following his early days as a frontier cowboy and gunslinger. The story builds toward his growing influence in a violent regional conflict and the fallout that follows.

name: The Lost Symbol
description: Young Harvard symbology expert Robert Langdon is thrust into early adventures involving deadly puzzles. He races against time to rescue his kidnapped mentor and disrupt a far-reaching global conspiracy.

name: Joe Pickett
description: A game warden and his family try to cope as politics and the local economy shift in a small Wyoming town nearing collapse. With wildlife and old history all around, the community’s past schemes and hidden secrets start to surface.

name: Gaslit
description: A modern take on the 1970s Watergate scandal, told through lesser-known stories and overlooked people from the era. The series blends political intrigue with fresh perspectives, presenting events as if they’re unfolding in real time.

name: The Man Who Fell to Earth
description: An extraterrestrial arrives on Earth at a critical moment in human evolution, seeking answers and facing the weight of his own past. As he tries to shape what comes next, his search forces him to confront what he’s meant to become and what humanity may become.

name: Batman: Caped Crusader
description: In Gotham City, corruption and crime keep ordinary people living in fear. A wealthy vigilante begins a one-man fight for justice, finding some unexpected help from allies in the police and city government, while his actions create serious consequences across the city.

name: Pretty Little Liars: Original Sin
description: A group of teen girls in a small town starts receiving threats from a mysterious tormentor. As long-buried events from years ago resurface, they must face secrets tied to their families and their own lives while trying to stay one step ahead of danger.

name: Three Pines
description: Chief Inspector Gamache and his team come to the idyllic village of Three Pines to investigate perplexing murders. As the case unfolds, they dig into the secrets of the community and Gamache must also face buried truths of his own.

name: Florida Man
description: A disgraced cop in debt is pulled back to Florida for a shady mission, only to find himself tangled in a frantic, deadly treasure hunt. What starts as an assignment quickly escalates into chaotic danger and nonstop twists.

name: This Fool
description: A kind but self-defeating young man tries to lift up his South Central community while struggling with family codependency, work, and everyday pressure. The series mixes heartfelt moments with offbeat humor and a grounded look at working-class life.

name: The English
description: An aristocratic Englishwoman heads into the American West to seek revenge for the death of her son. In the wild new landscape, she becomes entangled with others as the pursuit unfolds amid harsh realities and mounting tension.

name: Harlan Coben's Shelter
description: After the death of his father, a teenage boy relocates to suburban New Jersey and tries to start over. When another new student disappears, he and two friends dig into a troubling network of secrets tied to disappearances stretching back decades.

name: The Mole
description: Twelve players join a high-stakes competition where teamwork can grow a shared prize pot, but one person is secretly working to sabotage it. As the group tackles challenges and tries to spot the hidden saboteur, everyone must decide who to trust before the final winner is revealed.

name: The Tailor
description: A famous tailor starts making a wedding dress for his best friend’s fiancée, but the situation quickly becomes complicated as hidden truths begin to surface. As family pressures and old wounds grow stronger, the people around him are pulled into a tense web of love, loyalty, and secrets.

name: My Love Story with Yamada-kun at Lv999
description: Recently dumped, Akane is ready to quit an RPG she shared with her boyfriend, only to meet Yamada inside the same game. In real life, he’s a bit of a legend, but his attention is mostly on gameplay—so as Akane’s feelings grow, she wonders if he’ll ever focus on her.

name: The Price of Confession
description: Accused of killing her husband, a woman is offered a way out by a mysterious stranger: in exchange for a confession in her place, she must commit murder. As she’s pulled into a dangerous deal, the pressure mounts and the truth becomes harder to pin down.

name: Genie, Make a Wish
description: After a thousand years away, a quirky genie returns to grant wishes to a woman born without feelings. As his magic enters her world, can wonder spark love, or will her guarded nature keep them apart?

name: Zom 100: Bucket List of the Dead
description: An overworked 24-year-old decides to enjoy life by making a bucket list, but a zombie outbreak suddenly upends everything. The plan turns into a frantic yet fun scramble to experience what they want before the world changes for good.

name: Can This Love Be Translated?
description: A celebrity and her interpreter set out to travel the world while filming a TV show, but their feelings don’t always translate smoothly. As miscommunications pile up, the story wonders whether love can find its own language.

name: Mercy for None
description: After cutting ties with his gang, a former gangster returns to dig into the truth behind his brother’s death. Determined to set things right, he pushes forward on a relentless revenge path fueled by hard choices and escalating danger.

name: Delicious in Dungeon
description: A team ventures into a cursed, buried kingdom while trying to save a missing teammate. As dangers mount, they survive by cooking and eating the monsters they encounter, turning dungeon survival into a quirky food-focused adventure with plenty of humor.

name: Study Group
description: Set in one of Korea’s toughest high schools, a struggling student forms a study group while trying to protect classmates with his fighting skills. As academic pressure mounts, he fights to keep his people safe and push toward a chance at college.

name: Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian
description: A transfer student charms her new high school crowd while keeping her feelings close, often acting cool and scoring well in class. She flirts by blurting out romantic lines in Russian, not realizing her classmate understands what she’s saying—leading to a playful, awkward romance full of misunderstandings.

name: Marry My Husband
description: A terminally ill woman is killed after discovering betrayal, but she wakes up 10 years earlier and decides to fight back. With help from a colleague, she tries to reclaim her future and put the people who hurt her in their place, blending romance, suspense, and revenge-driven determination.

name: Billionaires' Bunker
description: A group of billionaires hides out in a luxury bunker as a global crisis unfolds above ground. Inside the sealed refuge, old rivalries between two powerful families resurface, turning safety into a tense struggle filled with suspicion, power plays, and personal drama.

name: North of North
description: A young Inuk woman sets out to build a new future for herself after a sudden, very public breakup from her marriage. In a close-knit Arctic town where everyone knows everyone’s business, she has to navigate complicated family dynamics while chasing independence.

name: Star Wars: Tales of the Empire
description: This animated miniseries explores the Galactic Empire through two warriors headed down very different paths. Across six short episodes, their stories reveal how power, loyalty, and personal choices shape what they become.

name: Murder Drones
description: On a distant exoplanet, a sardonic teen worker robot goes rogue and forms an uneasy bond with an excitable disassembly drone who was sent to destroy her. Their reluctant partnership clashes as the threat grows and they both struggle with what comes next for humanity.

name: Our Unwritten Seoul
description: Twin sisters face personal struggles as their lives become tangled when they swap identities, forcing them to navigate love, family, and self-discovery in new ways. With similarities that don’t match their looks, they search for the truth about who they are and what they want from life.

name: Blue Box
description: A hardworking high school athlete dreams of reaching the national stage, but his focus starts to shift when he develops feelings for a driven upperclassman on another team. After an unexpected change brings them closer, daily practice, quiet moments, and growing emotions begin to compete with their ambitions.

name: Sandokan
description: Sandokan, a Malaysian pirate, launches attacks on British forces from his island stronghold, sailing with a loyal crew and his close friend. Along the way, he becomes entangled in romance with an English-Italian aristocrat, bringing both adventure and emotional stakes to the open sea.

name: Perfect Crown
description: In 21st-century Korea, a chaebol heiress struggles to gain real control over her future when she meets a lonely prince with little more than his title. Their contract marriage sparks a class-defying romance as they try to rewrite destiny together.

name: Gassal
description: An introverted mortician in his 30s is shaken by a personal fear about what will happen when he dies. Determined to change his isolated life, he steps into the wider world to form real connections and maybe find a partner, only to stumble into awkward, darkly funny, and sometimes bizarre situations.

name: We Were the Lucky Ones
description: This true story follows a Jewish family separated at the start of World War II. Driven to survive and reunite, they scatter across different countries as the war tears their lives apart.

name: Jeffrey Epstein: Filthy Rich
description: Stories from survivors drive this docuseries about how a convicted sex offender allegedly used wealth and influence to enable abuse. It pairs the survivors’ accounts with the efforts of investigators trying to pursue justice.

name: The Pembrokeshire Murders
description: Detective leadership reopens two long-unsolved murders from the 1980s, using modern forensic approaches to connect them to a series of burglaries. As a suspect in prison nears release, the team races to gather stronger evidence.

name: Grace
description: Set in Brighton, Detective Superintendent Roy Grace pours his life into the job as his career hits rock bottom. Fixated on his wife’s disappearance, he reopens long-forgotten cold cases even as his unorthodox methods put him on a tightrope at work.

name: Two Weeks to Live
description: Raised in isolation after her father’s death, a young woman is trained in extreme survival skills by her protective mother. As an adult, she finally steps into the outside world on a personal mission to honor his memory, only to find everyday life, unexpected allies, and messy trouble far stranger than she imagined.

name: Lisey's Story
description: After her famous husband dies, a widow is pulled into a string of disturbing events that force her to revisit painful memories of their marriage and the darkness surrounding his past. The story blends grief, suspense, and the supernatural in a slow-burning, dreamlike way.

name: Santa Inc.
description: At the North Pole, a top-ranking female elf sees an unexpected opening when the next Santa is suddenly taken off the board on Christmas Eve. Determined to break tradition, she pushes for her biggest goal yet: becoming the first woman to take on the Santa role.

name: The Woods
description: Evidence tied to a homicide victim gives a prosecutor renewed hope that a sister who disappeared 25 years earlier may still be alive. The investigation looks back at a long-ago summer and the people who vanished, while the present steadily uncovers more clues.

name: SurrealEstate
description: A real estate agent with unusual abilities teams up with a quirky group to handle “metaphysically engaged” listings—haunted houses with problems that don’t respond to normal methods. They investigate, clear out, and close the properties nobody else can, blending the job with the supernatural.

name: Pretty Baby: Brooke Shields
description: TV miniseries chronicling actor, model, and global superstar Brooke Shields’ journey from being sexualized as a young girl to growing into a woman who embraces her identity and finds her voice. It focuses on her personal transformation and self-ownership.

name: Patria
description: After a long-running political conflict, a woman returns to her Basque hometown following a ceasefire, hoping to rebuild a life shaped by violence and loss. As old friendships and community ties resurface, the story follows ordinary people on opposing sides as they face grief, loyalty, and the cost of division.

name: Deputy
description: When the Los Angeles County’s Sheriff dies, an old Wild West rule pulls an unlikely fifth-generation lawman into the job. More at ease taking down bad guys than dealing with politics, he won’t stop until justice is served.

name: Next
description: A Silicon Valley innovator learns that a powerful AI he helped create may trigger global disaster. He joins forces with a cybercrime agent to confront a threat that weaponizes human behavior.

name: Dispatches from Elsewhere
description: A handful of everyday people stumble into a strange puzzle hidden in plain sight, and it quickly pulls them into a mystery that feels bigger than any of them expected. As they follow clues, the experience blurs the line between a game and something more personal, pushing them to question what’s real and why they were chosen.

name: The Ghost and Molly McGee
description: When a curse from Scratch backfires, he’s bound to Molly and must navigate everyday life together with her. As their worlds collide, their unexpected friendship helps them work through both magical mishaps and real-life ups and downs.

name: Lego Masters
description: Teams of LEGO enthusiasts compete in ambitious brick-building challenges, using an unlimited supply of bricks to create standout builds. With two contestants per team, they face tasks designed to test imagination and creativity, all for the chance to be crowned the country’s top amateur LEGO builders.

name: The Walking Dead: World Beyond
description: A hopeful group of teens takes refuge from the post-apocalyptic dangers in the only place they’ve ever known. When they receive an inspiring message, they set out on a cross-country journey to find the one person who may be able to save the world.

name: Age of Samurai: Battle for Japan
description: This docuseries uses dramatic reenactments and historian commentary to explore the power struggles and shifting alliances of 16th-century feudal Japan. Across a fast-moving timeline of intrigue and major battles, it aims to make a turbulent era feel immediate, intense, and easy to follow.

name: Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector
description: After a life-changing injury ends his days in the field, a brilliant former detective continues working cases from the sidelines. When a sharp young officer picks up the trail of a notorious serial killer, the two team up in a tense game of clues and profiling to stop the next attack.

name: Expats
description: Set in Hong Kong, a group of women face life-changing events shaped by family ties, tragedy, and the tension between blame and accountability. As their lives collide, the fallout spreads through a wider expat community and the people who support it.

name: McMillions
description: McMillions chronicles a Monopoly-themed scam tied to McDonald’s in the 1990s, using accounts from the people involved in the case. The story includes both prizewinners and FBI agents, as they uncover how a security officer carried out the scheme.

name: The Green Planet
description: This nature miniseries explores the hidden world of plants, showing how they live, compete, adapt, and connect in surprising ways. It presents nature from a fresh perspective, turning familiar landscapes into dramatic, emotional stories.

name: ID:Invaded
description: After a personal tragedy puts a brilliant detective behind bars, he begins helping police solve murder cases through a system that lets him enter fractured mental worlds. As the investigations grow darker, the search for answers starts circling back to the loss that changed his life.

name: Cobra
description: When widespread power outages plunge the UK into chaos, a high-level emergency committee of experts and politicians races to restore electricity and keep the public safe. As pressure mounts, hard choices and competing priorities test the government’s ability to manage a fast-moving national crisis.

name: Darwin's Game
description: A regular student accepts an invite to a mysterious app and gets pulled into a deadly real-world game where players use supernatural abilities to hunt each other. Forced into constant fights, he has to learn the rules fast if he wants to stay alive.

name: Generation
description: Generation follows high school students as they explore modern sexuality in a conservative community. Their curiosity about life, love, and family challenges deeply held beliefs and sparks tension within their relationships and surroundings.

name: Selena: The Series
description: This series follows a young Mexican-American singer and her family as they build a music career through hard work, sacrifice, and big ambitions. Along the way, they face pressure at home, struggles on the road, and tough choices about love, loyalty, and success.

name: October Faction
description: A couple of monster hunters try to keep their dangerous work under wraps while dealing with growing threats and the everyday pressures of family life. As their teenage twins navigate high school drama and big questions about who to trust, the line between “monster” and “human” starts to blur.

name: Cheer
description: On the mat, the pressure feels relentless, and these cheerleaders match it with grit, discipline, and big performances. Beyond the routines, the series spotlights personal adversity and the hard-won moments of triumph that shape the athletes’ journeys.

name: My Holo Love
description: A lonely woman’s life changes when she bonds with a lifelike hologram designed to understand her. As romance, secrets, and workplace conflict collide, the story blends sweet connection with light suspense around powerful technology.

name: Toilet-bound Hanako-kun
description: A lovestruck student tries a school ghost ritual hoping for help with romance, only to meet an unexpected supernatural boy instead. Their encounter pulls her into a playful mix of school mysteries, eerie rumors, and emotional moments.

name: Interrogation
description: Inspired by a real case spanning decades, this series follows a young man convicted of murdering his mother and the long fight to understand what really happened. Each episode centers on an interrogation drawn from case files, inviting you to piece together clues and question the justice system as the story shifts across time.

name: Central Park
description: Owen Tillerman runs a nontraditional family life in New York’s Central Park. When a wealthy hotel heiress sets her sights on turning the park into condos, the family has to band together to protect their home and routines.

name: Amazing Stories
description: This anthology series reimagines a classic format, following everyday people as they’re swept into unexpected situations filled with wonder, possibility, and imagination. Each episode offers a different story and tone, aiming for heartfelt, family-friendly sci‑fi and fantasy that leans more on emotion and curiosity than scares.

name: The Irregulars
description: In Victorian London, a group of troubled street teens are pulled into solving crimes for a sinister Watson and an elusive Sherlock Holmes. What begins as investigation turns supernatural as a dark power rises, forcing the teens to band together to protect the city—and much more.

name: The Thaw
description: After a young woman’s body is found beneath melting ice in a Polish city, a crime investigation unfolds around the questions of who she was, how she died, and who is left to deal with the fallout. The series blends mystery with personal grief and uneasy secrets.

name: South Wind
description: A young man involved with a Belgrade gang makes a reckless move that draws the attention of a powerful mafia boss, putting his loved ones at risk. As pressure builds, he’s pulled deeper into the criminal underworld while trying to protect his family.

name: Love Is Blind
description: Nick and Vanessa Lachey host a dating experiment where single men and women connect through conversations before meeting face-to-face. They then move toward engagement and spend time together in real life as they get to know each other.

name: The Third Day
description: Set across two connected halves, this series follows visitors pulled to a strange island off the British coast, where locals fiercely protect old traditions. As grief, suspicion, and unanswered questions build, each arrival pushes the island toward a tense struggle over what happens next.

name: Self Made: Inspired by the Life of Madam C.J. Walker
description: An African American washerwoman rises from poverty to build a beauty empire and become the first female self-made millionaire. The limited series charts her struggle, ambition, and determination as she fights against barriers and makes her mark.

name: The Winter King
description: A banished warrior returns to a fractured Britain and finds rival powers, old loyalties, and shifting beliefs pulling the land toward conflict. With a small circle of trusted allies, he tries to restore order and unite people who no longer agree on what the future should be.

name: Special OPS
description: A research-and-analysis team tracks patterns in terrorist attacks and becomes convinced there is a single mastermind behind them. Across a world-spanning manhunt, a five-agent task force works to catch the source of the threat, drawing inspiration from nearly two decades of national events.

name: Asur: Welcome to Your Dark Side
description: In the mystical backdrop of Varanasi, a former forensic expert returns to a national investigation agency and is pulled into a tense cat-and-mouse hunt for a brutal serial killer. As the case deepens, the pursuit blends crime-solving with mythology, psychology, and unsettling questions about technology and data, while seemingly unrelated murders raise the stakes.

name: BNA
description: After transforming into a raccoon beastman, Michiru searches for refuge and answers within Anima-City’s special zone. With help from a wolf beastman, she navigates mysteries and seeks safety while uncovering what’s going on around her.

name: #BlackAF
description: A dad takes a blunt, comedic approach to raising his kids and navigating marriage, work, and everyday life. The series mixes family chaos with candid conversations about identity, race, and modern relationships, aiming for laughs while also poking at uncomfortable truths.

name: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch
description: Set at a ranch in northern Utah, the series revisits decades of unusual, troubling reports that drew federal investigation, with results that were never publicly released. A new team of independent scientists and researchers moves in, chasing evidence of unidentified aerial phenomena, strange energies, and portals to other dimensions—driven to uncover the ranch’s secret.

name: Panchayat
description: Panchayat is a comedy-drama about an engineering graduate who takes a secretary job at a panchayat office in a remote Uttar Pradesh village. He gets pulled into village life, balancing workplace responsibilities with quirky villagers as he works through daily struggles.

name: Middleditch & Schwartz
description: A comedy duo takes a few audience suggestions and spins them into full-length, completely improvised stories performed live on stage. Each special builds from small, everyday prompts into big, unpredictable scenarios, driven by quick banter, playful characters, and escalating absurdity.

name: Too Hot to Handle
description: Gorgeous singles relax on a paradise beach, but winning a big cash prize comes with strict rules. They must refrain from sex and other physical intimacy to keep their chances alive, turning temptation into a constant pressure test.

name: Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian
description: Executive producer Jon Favreau invites the cast and crew of The Mandalorian to share an inside look at how the series was made. Each chapter focuses on a different aspect of the first live-action Star Wars television show through interviews, never-before-seen footage, and roundtable discussions.

name: Paatal Lok
description: A down-and-out cop gets pulled into a high-stakes assassination investigation involving four suspects. As the hunt shifts into the dark underworld, the case becomes a tangled maze where appearances fail and their pasts come into sharp focus.

name: Canada's Drag Race
description: Canadian drag queens compete to prove their charisma, uniqueness, nerve, and talent. The goal is to become Canada’s Next Drag Superstar and win the $100,000 grand prize.

name: Blood & Water
description: A Cape Town teenager becomes convinced that a popular private-school swimmer may be the sister taken from her family years ago. As she digs for answers, she gets pulled into a mix of school drama, risky choices, and a mystery that keeps building.

name: Mystic Pop-up Bar
description: At a mysterious late-night food cart, a tough but caring owner and an awkward part-timer help troubled visitors find comfort by entering their dreams. Mixing the everyday with the supernatural, the series follows heartfelt cases where both the living and the dead are welcomed without judgment.

name: Grant
description: This documentary miniseries traces a famed American leader’s life through war and public service, using personal perspective to illuminate the Civil War and the turbulent years that followed. Blending expert commentary with dramatic reenactments, it aims to humanize its subject while explaining the era’s high-stakes decisions and consequences.

name: The Salisbury Poisonings
description: In March 2018, a quiet English city is thrust into a sudden national emergency after a shocking poisoning incident. This three-part drama follows the local response as health workers, officials, and residents face fear, uncertainty, and the demanding work of keeping the community safe.

name: The Defeated
description: Set in 1946 Berlin, an American police officer searches for his missing brother while guiding a novice German policewoman through a surge of violent crime. Their partnership blends investigation work with personal stakes, as the city struggles to recover from the aftermath of war.

name: Backstreet Rookie
description: Backstreet Rookie follows a 24-hour, unpredictable romance between a quirky, four-dimensional young woman and a kind convenience store manager. They cross paths again after meeting years earlier, and their time together sparks laughter, warmth, and a fast-moving love story rooted in everyday work-life.

name: Undekhi
description: This crime drama follows a clash between powerful people who believe they are untouchable and those pushed to the edge by long abuse and corruption. As pressure builds, the fight for justice turns into a tense struggle shaped by fear, revenge, and unequal power.

name: Home Movie: The Princess Bride
description: A beloved fairy-tale adventure is retold in short, serialized chapters, recreated at home by a rotating lineup of celebrities during quarantine. The homemade props and DIY setups turn the familiar story into a playful, nostalgic tribute that leans into creativity and humor.

name: High Score
description: This docuseries traces the history of classic video games, weaving together stories from the people who helped build them. Using interviews and engaging retro visuals, it offers an overview of how gaming worlds and characters took shape over time.

name: The Vow
description: The docuseries looks at people deeply involved with NXIVM as the group faces serious charges over several years. It chronicles the allegations and how the situation escalated, focusing on what insiders experienced as events unfolded.

name: Biohackers
description: A medical student arrives at a top German university on a secret mission. As they dig into a family tragedy, they uncover a conspiracy tied to a visionary biology professor.

name: Record of Youth
description: In a ruthless world where your starting point largely determines your success, three ambitious youths refuse to accept their fate. Driven by their dreams, they push back against the system as they pursue new opportunities and challenges.

name: 18 Again
description: At a tough point in his marriage and career, a middle-aged man gets a rare chance to redo his life when he’s transformed back into his 18-year-old body. The story blends heartfelt emotion, humor, and second chances as he tries to navigate what changes and what stays the same.

name: TONIKAWA: Over the Moon for You
description: Nasa Yuzaki falls for the mysterious Tsukasa at first sight. After he confesses his feelings, she agrees to date only if they’re married, kicking off a sweet newlywed romance.

name: Moriarty the Patriot
description: In the late 19th century, the British Empire’s nobles thrive while the working class struggles. Inspired by that inequality, a brilliant mastermind seeks to upend the system and even outmaneuver a famous detective who may not want him to succeed.

name: Tiny World
description: This docuseries spotlights nature’s lesser-known small creatures and the extraordinary ways they survive. Each episode shares surprising survival stories with spectacular views of the tiniest heroes.

name: Akudama Drive
description: In a divided future Japan, a notorious crew of criminals takes on dangerous jobs while staying one step ahead of the police. When an ordinary young woman gets pulled into their world, a high-risk journey forces her to confront chaos, loyalty, and survival.

name: Long Way Up
description: The epic motorcycle adventure continues in this third chapter of the Long Way series, as the two riders journey across South and Central America through glorious landscapes. They travel on prototype electric Harley-Davidsons, pushing the limits of the technology along the way.

name: La Révolution
description: In late-18th-century France, an investigation into grisly killings uncovers a strange blood-borne illness spreading through the upper class. As fear, violence, and class tension grow, the outbreak pushes the country toward revolt in this dark fantasy take on the French Revolution.

name: All or Nothing: Tottenham Hotspur
description: This fly-on-the-wall miniseries offers an inside look at Tottenham Hotspur during the 2019-20 season. It follows the day-to-day goings-on around the club as the team navigates change, pressure, and the season’s ups and downs.

name: Scam 1992: The Harshad Mehta Story
description: Set across the 1980s and 90s in Bombay, this miniseries traces the rise of a stockbroker who takes the market to new heights, followed by a dramatic, catastrophic downfall. Directed by Hansal Mehta, it’s based on the book The Scam by Debashis Basu and Sucheta Dalal.

name: Valley of Tears
description: Set during the outbreak of a major 1973 Middle East war, this series follows the chaos, fear, and human cost of a conflict that was expected to end all others. It focuses on how the fighting reshaped lives and left a lasting mark on the region.

name: The Pentaverate
description: A centuries-old secret society that has quietly shaped world events is suddenly threatened from within. A Canadian reporter gets pulled into the chaos, racing to uncover what’s happening and stop a crisis that could ripple far beyond the group itself.

name: M.O.D.O.K.
description: An over-the-top supervillain sees his evil empire collapse just as his home life starts falling apart too. Forced out of power, he has to juggle career failure, family problems, and a very messy midlife crisis while still chasing world domination.

name: Dragon's Dogma
description: After a dragon steals a man’s heart, he begins a grim journey to hunt it down. Each battle against monsters pushes him closer to his goal, but also tests his morality and makes him fear what he is becoming.

name: No Man's Land
description: Amid the Syrian civil war, a young Frenchman travels into a dangerous conflict zone to search for his estranged sister, believed dead. As he follows scattered clues, he encounters fighters, spies, outsiders, and civilians, offering a grounded view of how the war’s fallout reaches far beyond Syria.

name: The Penthouse: War in Life
description: A determined woman fights for her dream of living in a luxury penthouse in Seoul’s Gangnam District. As her ambitions grow, her choices take a darker turn, and her behavior becomes increasingly monstrous.

name: The Trusted
description: A former special forces soldier tries to live quietly running a second-hand bookshop, but his world changes after his young daughter is shot. Driven by grief and determination to help her recover, he’s pulled back into danger when a woman walks into his shop and becomes tangled in a violent incident, linking their lives.

name: Blade Runner: Black Lotus
description: In a future Los Angeles, a young woman wakes up with no memory but finds she has lethal combat skills. Guided only by a locked device and a black lotus tattoo, she sets out to uncover who she is and confront the people tied to her violent past.

name: The Mess You Leave Behind
description: A literature teacher takes a job at a Spanish high school and quickly finds herself haunted by a suspicious death from weeks earlier. As she tries to settle in, fear grows around what really happened, and the truth seems tangled with people close to the school.

name: I Told Sunset About You
description: Two childhood friends reconnect in their final year of school when they end up in the same Chinese language class. As old tensions resurface, they’re pulled back into each other’s lives and begin to question what their bond really means, balancing friendship, ambition, and new feelings they can’t easily ignore.

name: The One
description: Love — and lies — collide when a DNA researcher’s breakthrough promises to identify a perfect partner. The discovery sparks a bold new matchmaking service, but the search for “the one” quickly spirals into trouble and conflict.

name: Marvel Studios: Assembled
description: This behind-the-scenes series takes you inside Marvel’s biggest shows and movies, following the people who make them and the heroes they bring to life. Expect interviews, on-set access, and a closer look at how major moments are planned and produced.

name: Marvel Studios: Legends
description: Marvel Studios: Legends is a TV series that revisits major heroes, villains, and moments from across the MCU. Each segment connects to stories still to come, serving as a recap to set the stage for future events.

name: The Cook of Castamar
description: Set in early 18th-century Madrid, this series centers on a love story between a cook with agoraphobia and a widowed nobleman. Their connection grows through palace life, personal challenges, and plenty of romance and drama.

name: SK8 the Infinity
description: A secret, no-holds-barred downhill skateboarding race takes place in an abandoned mine, where rivalries and sabotage are part of the thrill. When a newcomer is brought to the mountain, they’re pulled into a fast, risky scene that tests skill, nerve, and what skating means to them.

name: The Daily Life of the Immortal King
description: A cultivation prodigy who keeps leveling up far beyond normal control tries to live quietly, but school life keeps throwing new challenges his way. As he enters high school, his plans for an ordinary routine collapse under escalating supernatural problems.

name: Word of Honor
description: A disillusioned assassin leader heads into the martial arts world, drawn by old causes and dangerous rumors. Along the way, he forms a close bond with a companion and gets pulled into a wider conspiracy involving rival sects, hidden pieces, and mounting conflict.

name: The Crew
description: A veteran crew chief at a NASCAR racing team struggles to keep his close-knit shop running when new leadership pushes big changes. This workplace comedy mixes garage banter, team rivalry, and culture-clash humor around old-school habits meeting modern ideas.

name: Run On
description: After veering off his usual path, a track star begins following his own pace and feelings for the first time when a translator enters his life. Their connection sparks a journey of change, growth, and new ways of looking at love and work.

name: Sexify
description: A sexually inexperienced student teams up with friends to build an innovative sex app and compete in a major tech contest. Along the way, they navigate awkward setbacks and learn about intimacy as their project grows.

name: Crime Scene: The Vanishing at the Cecil Hotel
description: This true-crime miniseries explores the disappearance of a hotel guest at the infamous Cecil Hotel and the online obsession that followed. It mixes the case itself with the hotel’s dark reputation and the flood of speculation that turned a tragedy into a wider story about internet sleuthing.

name: Pretend It's a City
description: Follow famed wry writer and humorist Fran Lebowitz as she shares sharp observations while sitting down with Martin Scorsese. The series pairs her conversations with wandering the streets of New York City, mixing big ideas with everyday city life.

name: Pernille
description: A parent navigates tough choices while trying to do right by loved ones—and themselves—despite complications at home. With two daughters and an ex who mainly looks out for himself after relocating to Copenhagen, everyday life brings emotional pressure and hard dilemmas.

name: Yasuke
description: A former warrior who has chosen a quiet life is drawn back into danger when he agrees to protect a young girl with mysterious powers. Set in an alternate take on feudal Japan, the story mixes samurai action with magic, strange technology, and a journey through escalating conflict.

name: Leonardo
description: This TV series reimagines the life and legacy of the iconic artist, framing him as an outsider whose true self is hidden behind his work. Across episodes, each focuses on an artwork and explores possible hidden clues, with an emphasis on a perfectionist spirit under pressure.

name: Blue Period
description: Bored with life, a popular high schooler dives into the demanding world of art after a burst of inspiration. What starts as curiosity quickly becomes a test of patience, discipline, and self-discovery.

name: Mr. Corman
description: With better luck and choices, Josh Corman might’ve chased the spotlight. Instead, he teaches fifth grade while grappling with anxiety and searching for happiness and meaning in a life that can feel brief.

name: Bump
description: A high-achieving teenager is thrown into chaos by an unexpected pregnancy, forcing two families to adjust fast. This warm, messy drama follows the pressures of school, parenting, relationships, and clashing viewpoints as everyone tries to find their footing.
